name: CRITICAL RESPONSE TEAM (via VPP)
subject: SIGN NOW: Demand the Senate Codify 𝑹𝒐𝒆 𝒗. 𝑾𝒂𝒅𝒆
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
we need to take immediate action >>
| **BREAKING: Department of Justice to Take Abortion Medication Case to Supreme Court**

The Supreme Court’s overturn of _Roe v. Wade_ has given far-right judges the green light to ram through a NATIONAL abortion pill ban.

We REFUSE to stand for this attack on reproductive freedom — so we’re launching an urgent petition DEMANDING the Senate codify _Roe_ as law of the land. [**Our petition is only open until MIDNIGHT: Please add your name immediately »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/codify-rvw/?source=VPP_20230414_EMPET_E4_T0_AC&t=6&akid=7110%2E878179%2EFEozwK) | [**25,000 DEMOCRATS NEEDED: DEMAND THE SENATE CODIFY _ROE V. WADE_ »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/codify-rvw/?source=VPP_20230414_EMPET_E4_T0_AC&t=7&akid=7110%2E878179%2EFEozwK)
---
Republicans will stop at NOTHING strip Americans of their reproductive rights and make abortion a crime - _and they’ve almost succeeded._

Many states have already moved to make abortion illegal, prosecute people who have abortions, **and now they’re introducing a nation-wide abortion ban.**

The best way we can stop them is to codify _Roe v. Wade_ NOW.
[**We’re counting on you to add your signature and urge Congress to codify _Roe v. Wade_ into federal law. This cannot wait. Sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/codify-rvw/?source=VPP_20230414_EMPET_E4_T0_AC&t=8&akid=7110%2E878179%2EFEozwK)
[**25,000 DEMOCRATS NEEDED: DEMAND THE SENATE CODIFY _ROE V. WADE_ »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/codify-rvw/?source=VPP_20230414_EMPET_E4_T0_AC&t=9&akid=7110%2E878179%2EFEozwK)
---
Thanks for standing for what’s right,

VPP
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=7110%2E878179%2EFEozwK). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=7110%2E878179%2EFEozwK).**

Peter,

**The RNC just announced the location of the first Presidential Debate.**

I am going to put in the work EVERY DAY to make sure I am on that debate stage.

While we don't know today the criteria to be invited to the main debate stage yet, it's clear that the number of unique grassroots donors will play a major role.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

Peter,

Late last night, Gov. Ron DeSantis signed a six-week abortion ban into law in Florida.

Simply put, this is devastating. Millions of people woke up with fewer rights than they had yesterday – and our country has yet again inched closer toward Republicans’ master plan to enact a nationwide abortion ban.

**We cannot let this stand, Peter. We're counting on top supporters like you to fight for our fundamental freedoms:****[Will you be one of 1,000 signers on our urgent petition to protect abortion rights? Please sign on before midnight tonight.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61821075/401303531/-1262223934?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1193-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVjNWU2NDU5LTI1ZGItZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VJ5ATFQU4_eOQuC17pK-FEI4xw8zvPJ9b3SPcZC2lSE=&emci=6c7b1548-12db-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=ec5e6459-25db-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=920818)**

When our elected officials fail us, we know what we have to do: replace them.
And here's what gives us hope: Emerge women are stepping up to run for office at every level in states across the country. They will fight to protect abortion access and defend our fundamental freedoms – both in the short-term, in the face of backward policies like this one in Florida, and in the long-term, for decades to come.

But Emerge women can't do it without a solid network of supporters behind them, united in protecting our fragile democracy. **That's why we're reaching out to ask if you'll sign this petition to help us send a strong message at this critical moment.[Click here to be one of 1,000 signers we need before midnight tonight to protect abortion rights.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61821077/401303533/-1262223934?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1193-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVjNWU2NDU5LTI1ZGItZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VJ5ATFQU4_eOQuC17pK-FEI4xw8zvPJ9b3SPcZC2lSE=&emci=6c7b1548-12db-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=ec5e6459-25db-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=920818)**

clean_body: | | | Peter, Late last night, Gov. Ron DeSantis signed a six-week abortion ban into law in Florida. Simply put, this is devastating. Millions of people woke up with fewer rights than they had yesterday – and our country has yet again inched closer toward Republicans’ master plan to enact a nationwide abortion ban. We cannot let this stand, Peter. We're counting on top supporters like you to fight for our fundamental freedoms: | | When our elected officials fail us, we know what we have to do: replace them. And here's what gives us hope: Emerge women are stepping up to run for office at every level in states across the country. They will fight to protect abortion access and defend our fundamental freedoms – both in the short-term, in the face of backward policies like this one in Florida, and in the long-term, for decades to come. But Emerge women can't do it without a solid network of supporters behind them, united in protecting our fragile democracy. That's why we're reaching out to ask if you'll sign this petition to help us send a strong message at this critical moment. | | Thank you for taking action, Team Emerge | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is an important way for Emerge America to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. name: Tom Fitton
subject: Hunter Gun Scandal Update!
body:
Supreme Court Justices at Risk!

[INSIDE JW]

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FBI FOR RECORDS ON HUNTER BIDEN GUN SCANDAL

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62971&L=29311&F=T&&hash=7484e4f0a2051460d0e10fb5db623cf82b8ecbd1eec1d785f9ec9b30c5e01893]
Joe Biden’s FBI and Secret Service are actively trying to keep
the American people from learning the facts about how a gun owned by
Hunter Biden was reportedly tossed in a grocery store trash can across
the street from a high school.

We filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit for FBI records
about the gun (_Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of Justice_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62971&L=29289&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWh1bnRlci1iaWRlbi1ndW4tY29tcGxhaW50LTAwOTIwLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=c7aa91c1bd5c0583479577faddd3a81574c82e39728fe233b0fd5dbe85e4d127]
(No. 1:23-cv-00920)).

Judicial Watch sued after the FBI withheld records in response to our
January 30, 2023, FOIA request for:

* All records, including investigative reports, telephone logs,
witness statements, memoranda, and firearms purchase documentation,
related to the reported purchase, possession, and disposal of a
firearm owned by Hunter Biden discarded in a Delaware trash receptacle
circa October 2018.
* All records of communications of FBI officials regarding the
reported purchase, possession, and disposal of the firearm.

In a separate lawsuit, we received records
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62971&L=28878&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvc2VjcmV0LXNlcnZpY2UtaHVudGVyLWJpZGVucy1ndW4vP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=7e2cba8873654bbf1661b2899b1b0454c31500f331b415a4db313cd9678404dd]
from
the United States Secret Service that implicate the FBI in the unusual
action to help Hunter Biden.

Included in those records is a response to a February 2021 email
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62971&L=28854&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZGhzLWh1bnRlci1iaWRlbnMtZ3VuLXJlY29yZHMtMDI4NDEtcGdzLTEyLTMwLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=1eae730968e762e7505406b48cb2af6b4b4d00ee8aea5e99b237f5e4629e9056]
inquiry from _Politico _reporter Ben Schreckinger regarding the Secret
Service’s involvement in the investigation of the Hunter Biden gun
incident. In the response, the Communications Department asks for
“more information or documentation.” Schreckinger responds:
“Sure thing. Agents visited StarQuest Shooters & Survival Supply and
asked to take possession of the paperwork Hunter had filled out to
purchase a gun there. The FBI also had some involvement in the
investigation.”

Also in those records is a March 2021 email from _New York Post_
reporter Lorena Mongelli, who reached out
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62971&L=28865&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZGhzLWh1bnRlci1iaWRlbnMtZ3VuLXJlY29yZHMtMDI4NDEtcGdzLTM3MS0zNzQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=378bfffbbe0f49f67cda7d7e336fc5424bb4b4c420589fcb4df16caa8c1653e3]
to the Secret Service Communications Office, asking for comment on
text messages on Hunter Biden’s lost laptop:

> It appears the text messages were sent from Hunter Biden in which he
> indicates that the Secret Service did in fact respond to the Oct.
> 23, 2018 [gun] incident. This information contradicts your previous
> statement relating to the incident and we would like to know whether
> the Secret Service would like to respond to these new findings.
A person from the Communications Office, whose name is redacted
replies: “We have received your inquiry, would you be able to
provide copies of these alleged text messages for reference?”
Mongelli responds:

> The Daily Mail actually posted
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62971&L=28866&F=T&&hash=c9d83247329464674c4ff5197428460302226a96972f4e041327baa23c5263e2]
> copies of the same text messages the NY Post is referencing.
>
> This is what one text message says:
>
> “She stole the gun out of my trunk lock box and threw it in a
> garbage can full to the top at Jansens [sic]. Then told me it was my
> problem to deal with,” Hunter wrote.
>
> “Then when the police the FBI the secret service came on the scene
> she said she took it from me because she was scared I would harm
> myself due to o my drug and alcohol problem and our volatile
> relationship and that she was afraid for the kids.”
In October 2020, _The Blaze _reported
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62971&L=28123&F=T&&hash=9b0a68ac00f51cfd04b9f46df4e7141431b6e7fb4eab41c636bde19aaabc7c66]
that in October 2018, Hunter Biden’s handgun was taken by Hallie
Biden, the widow of then-presidential nominee Joe Biden’s son Beau.
In 2021,_ Politico _reported
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62971&L=28124&F=T&&hash=5f75a1d0eb47ec1b68a7341e255145d274947348046221fb2157cd2b3869ad87

> Hallie took Hunter’s gun and threw it in a trash can behind a
> grocery store, only to return later to find it gone.
>
> Delaware police began investigating, concerned that the trash can
> was across from a high school and that the missing gun could be used
> in a crime, according to law enforcement officials and a copy of the
> police report obtained by POLITICO.
>
> But a curious thing happened at the time: Secret Service agents
> approached the owner of the store where Hunter bought the gun and
> asked to take the paperwork involving the sale, according to two
> people, one of whom has firsthand knowledge of the episode and the
> other was briefed by a Secret Service agent after the fact.
What all this means: the FBI and Secret Service have both been
implicated in a corrupt clean-up operation to protect Hunter Biden
from the criminal consequences of his gun scandal. We will keep you
updated as we learn more!

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FOR RECORDS ABOUT INTIMIDATION OF SUPREME COURT
JUSTICES BY THE LEFT

Conservative Supreme Court justices are under assault by the extremist
left with the tacit support of the Biden administration. And Judicial
Watch just filed suit to expose this attack on our constitutional
system of government.

We filed a Maryland Public Information Act (PIA) lawsuit for records
from the Montgomery County Police Department concerning unlawful
protests outside the homes of U.S. Supreme Court Justice Kavanaugh and
Chief Justice Roberts (_Judicial Watch, Inc. v. Montgomery County
Police Department_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62971&L=29299&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtbW9udGdvbWVyeS1jby1wb2xpY2UtY29tcGxhaW50LTAwMTM2MC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=e61b384401d06e9f57c538915f986d62ec5ceae414ab0b12713597aec2591d99]
(No. C-15-CV-23-001360)).

Judicial Watch filed the suit in Montgomery County Circuit Court after
the Montgomery County Police failed to respond to a June 16, 2022,
Public Information Act (PIA) request for:

> All records including email communications (including emails,
> complete email chains, and email attachments), memoranda, draft
> memoranda, reports, investigative reports, incident reports and
> other communications maintained by the Montgomery County Police
> Department and/or communicated with any of the below listed
> agencies, or employees of those agencies concerning protests,
> demonstrations, marches, pickets, or gatherings at the Montgomery
> County dwellings of Supreme Court Chief Justice John G. Roberts Jr.
> and Justice Brett M. Kavanaugh.
>
> (1) The U.S. Marshals Service (domain usdoj.gov)
>
> (2) The Federal Bureau of Investigation (domain fbi.gov)
>
> (3) The Department of Justice (domain justice.gov)
>
> (4) Maryland State Police (domain maryland.gov)
>
> (5) Maryland Attorney General’s Office (domain oag.state.md.gov)
On May 2, 2022, _Politico_ published a leaked draft
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62971&L=29300&F=T&&hash=4d4ae92915c5d5599c3b15fc54922fd7d6ab73f9b22673a4a83b8b6c2b20b658]
of what would soon be U.S. Supreme Court’s majority opinion in
_Dobbs v. Jackson Women’s Health Organization_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62971&L=29301&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc3VwcmVtZWNvdXJ0Lmdvdi9kb2NrZXQvZG9ja2V0ZmlsZXMvaHRtbC9wdWJsaWMvMTktMTM5Mi5odG1sP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=a465289699f7f0395f1ee4b6db4493edc4d36f6c1b79a4e622c0c217bd2be723]
(No. 19-1392), a decision that would later overturn the court’s
pro-abortion decisions _Roe v. Wade_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62971&L=29302&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9pMmkub3JnL3dwLWNvbnRlbnQvdXBsb2Fkcy9Sb2Utdi4tV2FkZS5wZGY/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=f4bf766ad5192b734438b4dd81dfa2e347a0e1b238c778af1e0f91fc098c0cbf]
(410 U.S. 113
(1971)) and _Planned Parenthood of Southeastern Pa. v. Casey_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62971&L=29303&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubGF3LmNvcm5lbGwuZWR1L3N1cHJlbWVjb3VydC90ZXh0LzUwNS84MzM/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=1373c01196db84a28a6e19b992d4518de0431512a7130566c20198f45e109fac]
(505 U.S. 833
(1992)).

After the leak, leftists targeted conservative justices’ homes with
protests
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62971&L=29304&F=T&&hash=73af171e36ee3cff7694d9ffc24fd83699a1d4237a8e48ad8eb1cfbc2d9c35ab]
in violation of federal law
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62971&L=29305&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubGF3LmNvcm5lbGwuZWR1L3VzY29kZS90ZXh0LzE4LzE1MDc/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=d8d4eb14cf3626bdb15481ebcccd2c66a3524812cc7299e5a871d11334a55d48],
which prohibits
“interfering with, obstructing, or impeding the administration of
justice ... with the intent of influencing any judge, juror, witness,
or court officer.” Several justices received death threats
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62971&L=29306&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubmV3c3dlZWsuY29tL3N1cHJlbWUtY291cnQtanVzdGljZXMtdGhyZWF0ZW5lZC1tdXJkZXItcm9lLXYtd2FkZS1vdmVydHVybmVkLTE3MDc4Njk/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=d421d9af7de5b295e49285d120ce3ec23eaeb59779255f8b10159a8f676dd0cf]
and, on June 8, 2022, a heavily armed
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62971&L=29307&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubmF0aW9uYWxyZXZpZXcuY29tLzIwMjIvMDYvdGhlLWZyaWdodGVuaW5nLXRocmVhdC10by1icmV0dC1rYXZhbmF1Z2gvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=ac5b04d8e06993f2e3eb49a0eb47a329396225d8a7e7db04704dc7c38205c749]
man was arrested outside Justice Kavanaugh’s home in Bethesda and
was charged with attempted murder
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62971&L=29308&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94bmV3cy5jb20vcG9saXRpY3Mva2F2YW5hdWdoLWFzc2Fzc2luYXRpb24tYXR0ZW1wdC12aW9sZW5jZS1pbnRpbWlkYXRpb24tcHJvLWxpZmVycz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=c3e1d43e96a0993f35a58040f77ca29caf3ef3dba76d105ff82d76891dce4ac9].

Because the violations of the protest law protecting justices has yet
to be enforced, Attorney General Merrick Garland was accused during a
recent Senate Judiciary Committee hearing
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62971&L=29309&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYXJ5LnNlbmF0ZS5nb3YvY29tbWl0dGVlLWFjdGl2aXR5L2hlYXJpbmdzLzAyLzIyLzIwMjMvb3ZlcnNpZ2h0LW9mLXRoZS1kZXBhcnRtZW50LW9mLWp1c3RpY2U/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=986e36d2fa08a26c87d90379472689e2af844578acaa63e08e817ce10fc101c6]
of politicizing
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62971&L=29310&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94bmV3cy5jb20vcG9saXRpY3MvY3J1ei1hY2N1c2VzLWdhcmxhbmQtZG9qLXBvbGl0aWNpemF0aW9uLWFnLWZpcmVzLWJhY2stZmllcnktZXhjaGFuZ2U/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=23077080e3c6fa5beb5d5d723fdb0234688336ffc4ef42b013eee6235df6e502]
the Justice Department and prosecuting conservatives more aggressively
than liberals.

For more than a year, the Montgomery County Police Department has
unlawfully stonewalled our request for records and communications with
the Biden administration about the dangerous and illegal protests that
were trying to intimidate Supreme Court justices at their homes. So
now we’re going to court.

NASA SEEKS PUBLIC INPUT TO BETTER SUPPORT MINORITIES IN ITS EQUITY
MISSION

Now you, too, can participate in President Biden’s “equity”
mission. Our space agency isn’t looking to the stars with this one
but rather to “underserved communities” – our _Corruption
Chronicles_ blog has the details
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62971&L=29312&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbmFzYS1zZWVrcy1wdWJsaWMtaW5wdXQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=61717bdc70daba73ce6d384781a07dd985ded99855a8664ecf484b2147d40056]
on this
latest critical race theory-inspired Biden program:

> A year after launching an extensive Equity Action Plan
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62971&L=29313&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubmFzYS5nb3Yvc2l0ZXMvZGVmYXVsdC9maWxlcy9hdG9tcy9maWxlcy9uYXNhXy1fZXF1aXR5X3JlcG9ydF8tX3Y4LnBkZl10aGF0P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=5fd362bf6602bbb57839759ca89fab60433e50897bf4ce4fcf6563ac4c4f29c7
> gave around $2 billion to “small disadvantaged businesses,” the
> nation’s space agency wants to do more to advance racial equity
> and support underserved communities with the billions of dollars in
> grants and contracts it distributes annually. To complete this
> important mission the National Aeronautics and Space Administration
> (NASA) is seeking input from the public on the barriers and
> challenges that prevent members of underserved communities from
> receiving funds. The agency is explicitly “seeking for the public
> to provide specific feedback on the procurement, grant and
> cooperative agreement regulations, policies, practices, and
> processes that deter entities from pursuing opportunities for NASA
> procurements, grants, and cooperative agreements,” according to a
> recently published Federal Register announcement
>

> Equity Action Plan NASA already requires contractors to submit
> diversity, equity, inclusion, and accessibility plans for contracts

> and practices that have prevented minorities from receiving awards.

> suggestions to better collaborate with Historically Black Colleges
> and Universities (HBCU) and other Minority Serving Institutions
> (MSI) to advance outreach and increase the number of contracts and
> grants awarded to the “underserved communities.”

> To clarify certain terms, the space agency offers definitions in the
> new announcement. It describes equity as the consistent and
> systematic treatment of all individuals in a fair, just, and

clean_body: Supreme Court Justices at Risk! [INSIDE JW] JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FBI FOR RECORDS ON HUNTER BIDEN GUN SCANDAL [] Joe Biden’s FBI and Secret Service are actively trying to keep the American people from learning the facts about how a gun owned by Hunter Biden was reportedly tossed in a grocery store trash can across the street from a high school. We filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit for FBI records about the gun (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of Justice [] (No. 1:23-cv-00920)). Judicial Watch sued after the FBI withheld records in response to our January 30, 2023, FOIA request for: All records, including investigative reports, telephone logs, witness statements, memoranda, and firearms purchase documentation, related to the reported purchase, possession, and disposal of a firearm owned by Hunter Biden discarded in a Delaware trash receptacle circa October 2018. All records of communications of FBI officials regarding the reported purchase, possession, and disposal of the firearm. In a separate lawsuit, we received records [] from the United States Secret Service that implicate the FBI in the unusual action to help Hunter Biden. Included in those records is a response to a February 2021 email [] inquiry from Politico reporter Ben Schreckinger regarding the Secret Service’s involvement in the investigation of the Hunter Biden gun incident. In the response, the Communications Department asks for “more information or documentation.” Schreckinger responds: “Sure thing. Agents visited StarQuest Shooters & Survival Supply and asked to take possession of the paperwork Hunter had filled out to purchase a gun there. The FBI also had some involvement in the investigation.” Also in those records is a March 2021 email from New York Post reporter Lorena Mongelli, who reached out [] to the Secret Service Communications Office, asking for comment on text messages on Hunter Biden’s lost laptop: It appears the text messages were sent from Hunter Biden in which he indicates that the Secret Service did in fact respond to the Oct. 23, 2018 [gun] incident. This information contradicts your previous statement relating to the incident and we would like to know whether the Secret Service would like to respond to these new findings. A person from the Communications Office, whose name is redacted replies: “We have received your inquiry, would you be able to provide copies of these alleged text messages for reference?” Mongelli responds: The Daily Mail actually posted [] copies of the same text messages the NY Post is referencing. This is what one text message says: “She stole the gun out of my trunk lock box and threw it in a garbage can full to the top at Jansens [sic]. Then told me it was my problem to deal with,” Hunter wrote. “Then when the police the FBI the secret service came on the scene she said she took it from me because she was scared I would harm myself due to o my drug and alcohol problem and our volatile relationship and that she was afraid for the kids.” In October 2020, The Blaze reported [] that in October 2018, Hunter Biden’s handgun was taken by Hallie Biden, the widow of then-presidential nominee Joe Biden’s son Beau. In 2021, Politico reported [ Hallie took Hunter’s gun and threw it in a trash can behind a grocery store, only to return later to find it gone. Delaware police began investigating, concerned that the trash can was across from a high school and that the missing gun could be used in a crime, according to law enforcement officials and a copy of the police report obtained by POLITICO. But a curious thing happened at the time: Secret Service agents approached the owner of the store where Hunter bought the gun and asked to take the paperwork involving the sale, according to two people, one of whom has firsthand knowledge of the episode and the other was briefed by a Secret Service agent after the fact. What all this means: the FBI and Secret Service have both been implicated in a corrupt clean-up operation to protect Hunter Biden from the criminal consequences of his gun scandal. We will keep you updated as we learn more! JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FOR RECORDS ABOUT INTIMIDATION OF SUPREME COURT JUSTICES BY THE LEFT Conservative Supreme Court justices are under assault by the extremist left with the tacit support of the Biden administration. And Judicial Watch just filed suit to expose this attack on our constitutional system of government. We filed a Maryland Public Information Act (PIA) lawsuit for records from the Montgomery County Police Department concerning unlawful protests outside the homes of U.S. Supreme Court Justice Kavanaugh and Chief Justice Roberts (Judicial Watch, Inc. v. Montgomery County Police Department [] (No. C-15-CV-23-001360)). Judicial Watch filed the suit in Montgomery County Circuit Court after the Montgomery County Police failed to respond to a June 16, 2022, Public Information Act (PIA) request for: All records including email communications (including emails, complete email chains, and email attachments), memoranda, draft memoranda, reports, investigative reports, incident reports and other communications maintained by the Montgomery County Police Department and/or communicated with any of the below listed agencies, or employees of those agencies concerning protests, demonstrations, marches, pickets, or gatherings at the Montgomery County dwellings of Supreme Court Chief Justice John G. Roberts Jr. and Justice Brett M. Kavanaugh. (1) The U.S. Marshals Service (domain usdoj.gov) (2) The Federal Bureau of Investigation (domain fbi.gov) (3) The Department of Justice (domain justice.gov) (4) Maryland State Police (domain maryland.gov) (5) Maryland Attorney General’s Office (domain oag.state.md.gov) On May 2, 2022, Politico published a leaked draft [] of what would soon be U.S. Supreme Court’s majority opinion in Dobbs v. Jackson Women’s Health Organization [] (No. 19-1392), a decision that would later overturn the court’s pro-abortion decisions Roe v. Wade [] (410 U.S. 113 (1971)) and Planned Parenthood of Southeastern Pa. v. Casey [] (505 U.S. 833 (1992)). After the leak, leftists targeted conservative justices’ homes with protests [] in violation of federal law [], which prohibits “interfering with, obstructing, or impeding the administration of justice ... with the intent of influencing any judge, juror, witness, or court officer.” Several justices received death threats [] and, on June 8, 2022, a heavily armed [] man was arrested outside Justice Kavanaugh’s home in Bethesda and was charged with attempted murder []. Because the violations of the protest law protecting justices has yet to be enforced, Attorney General Merrick Garland was accused during a recent Senate Judiciary Committee hearing [] of politicizing [] the Justice Department and prosecuting conservatives more aggressively than liberals. For more than a year, the Montgomery County Police Department has unlawfully stonewalled our request for records and communications with the Biden administration about the dangerous and illegal protests that were trying to intimidate Supreme Court justices at their homes. So now we’re going to court. NASA SEEKS PUBLIC INPUT TO BETTER SUPPORT MINORITIES IN ITS EQUITY MISSION Now you, too, can participate in President Biden’s “equity” mission. Our space agency isn’t looking to the stars with this one but rather to “underserved communities” – our Corruption Chronicles blog has the details [] on this latest critical race theory-inspired Biden program: A year after launching an extensive Equity Action Plan [ gave around $2 billion to “small disadvantaged businesses,” the nation’s space agency wants to do more to advance racial equity and support underserved communities with the billions of dollars in grants and contracts it distributes annually. To complete this important mission the National Aeronautics and Space Administration (NASA) is seeking input from the public on the barriers and challenges that prevent members of underserved communities from receiving funds. The agency is explicitly “seeking for the public to provide specific feedback on the procurement, grant and cooperative agreement regulations, policies, practices, and processes that deter entities from pursuing opportunities for NASA procurements, grants, and cooperative agreements,” according to a recently published Federal Register announcement []. NASA will review the input and use the information to evaluate, implement, modify, expand, and streamline how it doles out money to “remove systemic inequitable barriers and challenges facing members of underserved communities,” the new Request for Information (RFI) document states. NASA’s fiscal year 2023 budget is $32.35 billion [] and it plans to spend a big chunk, about one-third or $10.42 billion, on the type of awards it wants to give more minorities via thousands of grants and contracts. It is not enough that under its Equity Action Plan NASA already requires contractors to submit diversity, equity, inclusion, and accessibility plans for contracts and that at least one quote be from a minority-owned business. When the agency published the plan about a year ago it promised to assess programs, identify systemic barriers, and engage in outreach to ensure fair and impartial access and representation for all those who seek to contribute to work in space. The areas of focus include increasing contractors from underserved communities, expanding equity in the procurement process, mitigating environmental challenges in underserved communities, and expanding access to Limited English Proficient (LEP) populations within underserved communities. As for the new public input venture, NASA provides a list of questions as guidance. The agency asks for additional Diversity, Equity, Inclusion and Accessibility (DEIA) suggestions (besides its minority contract quota) to ensure grants include members of underserved communities. It also wants ideas to investigate and ensure contractors are “diligently working to include members of underserved communities” and specifics on regulations, policies and practices that have prevented minorities from receiving awards. NASA also wants to know what resources it could provide to better assist underserved communities in identifying new opportunities and suggestions to better collaborate with Historically Black Colleges and Universities (HBCU) and other Minority Serving Institutions (MSI) to advance outreach and increase the number of contracts and grants awarded to the “underserved communities.” To clarify certain terms, the space agency offers definitions in the new announcement. It describes equity as the consistent and systematic treatment of all individuals in a fair, just, and impartial manner, including individuals who belong to communities that often have been denied such treatment, such as Black, Latino, Indigenous, Native American, other persons of color and LGBTQI+ persons. Underserved communities are defined as populations and geographic communities that have been systematically denied the opportunity to participate fully in aspects of economic, social, and civic life. Under NASA’s “journey towards equity” a key agency goal is to overcome visible and invisible systemic barriers that hinder equitable, inclusive access to government programs, according to NASA Administrator Bill Nelson. The former astronaut and Democratic Florida senator claims his agency’s new objective “seeks to further identify and remove the barriers that limit opportunity in historically underserved and underrepresented communities and anchor equity as a core component in every NASA mission to inspire a new, more inclusive generation.” Until next week ... clean_body: | Peter — Seth reached out to ask for your help. Whether it’s defending abortion rights or lowering costs for working people, Seth is fighting to deliver for Rhode Islanders. And we need your help to keep him in Congress. = Thanks, Team Magaziner Begin Forwarded Message: Hi Peter, Last month, you helped us close out the first quarter of 2023 with strength. It was our first opportunity this year to show the strength of our grassroots campaign as we prepare for another tough race, and I’m so appreciative of the support you showed our team. But our fundraising can’t slow down for even a second. In 2022, Republicans spent big trying to defeat me, and they came within 4 points of winning. We know the same attacks are coming again ahead of 2024 — in fact, Republicans already named me to their list of top targets going into the next election. That means the attacks could start at any moment, and we need to be prepared for whatever comes next. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = | = From lowering costs and protecting Social Security to defending abortion rights and addressing gun violence in our communities, there’s a lot that I’m working on. Help elect leaders to beat back anti-choice radicals’ ongoing attacks. | |

Last night, under the cover of darkness and behind closed doors, Florida Governor Ron DeSantis signed a six-week abortion ban into law. _That’s before many people even know they’re pregnant._ This is not an isolated attack. It’s the latest salvo of abortion extremism as 2024 Republican hopefuls work to out-MAGA each other in the pursuit of winning over the MAGA base. **Despite the overwhelming unpopularity of their anti-choice agenda, MAGA Republicans have made clear they will not stop until they ban abortion nationwide.** We need to elect leaders in every corner of this country, at every level of government, who will fight for reproductive freedom. We knew that the Supreme Court’s decision to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ would not be the end of the road. Electing pro-choice leaders at the federal, state, and local levels has -- _and will_ \-- determine the future of abortion access. Just look to Michigan, where earlier this month Democratic Governor Gretchen Whitmer signed a repeal of the state’s 1931 draconian abortion ban. Or to Democratic Governor Tim Walz, who made Minnesota the first state to legally enshrine via legislature the right to an abortion since _Roe_ was overturned. These victories wouldn’t have been possible without this grassroots team coming together to help our party to make early, critical investments that help Democrats compete and win everywhere. **The DNC is working to elect leaders up and down the ticket who will defend our fundamental rights. Every dollar you chip in today will go towards supporting the organizing, voter protection, and grassroots programs that will help elect pro-choice Democrats nationwide.** [Don’t let MAGA Republicans like Ron DeSantis have the final word. clean_body: Help elect leaders to beat back anti-choice radicals’ ongoing attacks. | | Last night, under the cover of darkness and behind closed doors, Florida Governor Ron DeSantis signed a six-week abortion ban into law. That’s before many people even know they’re pregnant. This is not an isolated attack. It’s the latest salvo of abortion extremism as 2024 Republican hopefuls work to out-MAGA each other in the pursuit of winning over the MAGA base. Despite the overwhelming unpopularity of their anti-choice agenda, MAGA Republicans have made clear they will not stop until they ban abortion nationwide. We need to elect leaders in every corner of this country, at every level of government, who will fight for reproductive freedom. We knew that the Supreme Court’s decision to overturn Roe v. Wade would not be the end of the road. Electing pro-choice leaders at the federal, state, and local levels has -- and will \-- determine the future of abortion access. Just look to Michigan, where earlier this month Democratic Governor Gretchen Whitmer signed a repeal of the state’s 1931 draconian abortion ban. Or to Democratic Governor Tim Walz, who made Minnesota the first state to legally enshrine via legislature the right to an abortion since Roe was overturned. These victories wouldn’t have been possible without this grassroots team coming together to help our party to make early, critical investments that help Democrats compete and win everywhere. The DNC is working to elect leaders up and down the ticket who will defend our fundamental rights. Every dollar you chip in today will go towards supporting the organizing, voter protection, and grassroots programs that will help elect pro-choice Democrats nationwide. subject: Take back the US House!
body:
To win a congressional seat, it's important to build a strong campaign strategy. | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/alfonsoforcongress.com/take-back-the-us-house?e=16d812e81c)
---
# The House majority runs through the 4th!

To win a congressional seat, it's important to build a strong campaign strategy that resonates with the voters in the district. This includes identifying key issues that are important to the community and crafting a message that speaks to those issues.

It's also important to have a strong ground game, which includes door-to-door canvassing, phone banking, and organizing volunteers to help with the campaign.
Another critical aspect of winning a congressional seat is fundraising.
Running a successful campaign requires a significant amount of money, so it's important to build a network of donors and supporters who can contribute to the campaign.

Lastly, it's important to have a strong candidate who is well-prepared to represent the district in Congress. This includes having a clear understanding of the issues facing the district, as well as a vision for how to address those issues.

Overall, winning a congressional seat requires a combination of strong messaging, grassroots organizing, fundraising, and a strong candidate.
| [Show your support!](https://josephalfonsoforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bb75364011dcc8a637f1fdd6f&id=f1b8cc7f21&e=16d812e81c)

name: Sean Spicer
subject: I’m parting ways with Newsmax. Here’s what I’m up to now:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR.

| |

---
| | | Hey - this is Sean Spicer:

With a heavy heart, I just announced I'm parting ways with Newsmax. My show reached millions and helped viewers see what's _really_ happening in our country. Something the Mainstream Media fails to do time and time again.

_**[But with that in the rearview mirror, I'm thrilled at what's coming next...](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z3ltl9ldtdq77vr5o427pgm3mbboojuohv4j8vf0_rp22sh2s8i66o74clim4o73c1h2bs "But with that in the rearview mirror, I’m thrilled at what’s coming next...")**_

---
| | | [READ MY FULL STATEMENT >>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ziu56vrmg4454ckq4jkunn2ha269fh6shesidsdo_rp22sh2s8i66o74clim4o73c1h2bs "READ MY FULL STATEMENT")
---

The 2024 election will be the single most important one in the history of our country. Joe Biden and Democrats in Congress have set our country into a tailspin. It's an emergency situation and we're running dangerously short on time to change course.

We have our work cut out for us ahead of 2024:

- Fire Joe Biden and retake the presidency
- Expand our razor-thin Majority in the House
- Win back the Senate and send Chuck Schumer into retirement

**The Democrats aren 't going to give us an inch... so we have no choice but to 1) outwork, 2) outsmart, and - most importantly - 3) outraise them. **

Unfortunately, that last point is the most important. Why? Because no one works harder than strong Conservatives like you. And Republicans are WINNING on the issues - they can't outsmart us when we're the ones fighting for freedom, defending our country and flag, and resisting their radical woke agenda.

But Democrats have a MAJOR advantage in fundraising thanks to their armies of Hollywood megadonors and woke Liberals whipping out their credit cards whenever they flip on MSNBC.

_**[Look- if we want to win in 2024, it's going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z3bg7u02ek8ocjqjg4pd254t1qpid9qjllam3lv0_rp22sh2s8i66o74clim4o73c1h2bs "Look – if we want to win in 2024, it’s going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW.")**_

That's why I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR. We ran the numbers on what it'll take to outraise the Democrats and pull off an overwhelming victory.

We came to the conclusion that if every last one of you gave between $27 and $54, we would have the resources to MAX OUT all our voter contact budgets, GOTV operations, and volunteer recruitment efforts.

_In other words ... if everyone here steps up RIGHT NOW, the Democrats would suffer a defeat like nothing we've ever seen before._

**But that 's a big "if" - it requires 100% participation. **

This plan falls apart if too many folks sit out. We need everyone on board to pull this off.

So I'll cut to the chase.

_**[From the bottom of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54? If we can pull this off, we'll make history.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zrelb6iqm496hbke5c625d14738rpumsp9f8h8o0_rp22sh2s8i66o74clim4o73c1h2bs "From the bottom of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54? If we can pull this off, we’ll make history.")**_

Are you in?

clean_body: I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR. | | | | | Hey - this is Sean Spicer: With a heavy heart, I just announced I'm parting ways with Newsmax. My show reached millions and helped viewers see what's really happening in our country. Something the Mainstream Media fails to do time and time again. "But with that in the rearview mirror, I’m thrilled at what’s coming next..." | | | "READ MY FULL STATEMENT" The 2024 election will be the single most important one in the history of our country. Joe Biden and Democrats in Congress have set our country into a tailspin. It's an emergency situation and we're running dangerously short on time to change course. We have our work cut out for us ahead of 2024: - Fire Joe Biden and retake the presidency - Expand our razor-thin Majority in the House - Win back the Senate and send Chuck Schumer into retirement The Democrats aren 't going to give us an inch... so we have no choice but to 1) outwork, 2) outsmart, and - most importantly - 3) outraise them. Unfortunately, that last point is the most important. Why? Because no one works harder than strong Conservatives like you. And Republicans are WINNING on the issues - they can't outsmart us when we're the ones fighting for freedom, defending our country and flag, and resisting their radical woke agenda. But Democrats have a MAJOR advantage in fundraising thanks to their armies of Hollywood megadonors and woke Liberals whipping out their credit cards whenever they flip on MSNBC. "Look – if we want to win in 2024, it’s going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW." That's why I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR. We ran the numbers on what it'll take to outraise the Democrats and pull off an overwhelming victory. We came to the conclusion that if every last one of you gave between $27 and $54, we would have the resources to MAX OUT all our voter contact budgets, GOTV operations, and volunteer recruitment efforts. In other words ... if everyone here steps up RIGHT NOW, the Democrats would suffer a defeat like nothing we've ever seen before. But that 's a big "if" - it requires 100% participation. This plan falls apart if too many folks sit out. We need everyone on board to pull this off. So I'll cut to the chase. "From the bottom of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54? If we can pull this off, we’ll make history." Are you in? Friend,
I sat down with Tucker Carlson on Tuesday night for my FIRST INTERVIEW since I was arrested and arraigned.
_Tucker asked if there’s**ANYTHING** the Democrats could throw at me that would make me drop out of the presidential race._
Without hesitation, I said, _**“NO. I’D NEVER DROP OUT.”**_
Because the fate of America hangs in the balance – and I will _NEVER SURRENDER_ our country to the radical Left.
If an unjust, and possibly illegal, ARREST didn’t even make me flinch – then I promise you, NOTHING WILL.
**Now, I’m asking YOU to stand with me as the Left tries to throw everything they can at us to _force me out of the presidential election._**

subject: Can you confirm this for me?

body:
This is your LAST chance.

|
---
| | | |

**Are you there? I still haven 't heard back from you...**

Friend,

It's Kevin McCarthy. Because you are one of our _**TOP**_ patriots, I am giving you _**one last chance**_ to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership and confirm you are a patriot willing to fight for the future of our country. **[Will you please confirm before the deadline passes?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z506kbkdjagcdk7fvkjtgq1vfmqp0a34bgf3tsd8_rp22sh2s8i66o74clim4o72cth2bs "Will you please confirm before the deadline passes?")**

name: Tim Scott (Personal)
subject: Regarding South Carolina
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT PRESIDENTIAL EXPLORATORY COMMITTEE
body:
I was raised in a single-parent household in North Charleston, South Carolina.

| |
---
| | |
I was raised in a single-parent household in North Charleston, South Carolina. My mom worked 16-hour days to keep food on the table and a roof over our heads. I got my first job, changing oil at a gas station, when I was 13. And I wouldn’t ask for it to be any other way.

Charleston is home to me. It’s where I grew up, it’s where I learned to play football, and it’s where I learned to be a man of faith and conservative values.

It’s all of these things that I learned in Charleston that have led me to this exact moment: **I’m officially launching my Presidential Exploratory Committee.**
---
| | | [SUPPORT TIM SCOTT HERE](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16155%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=eFGjpXHHojJBxKEdySvvww&sysid=1 "SUPPORT TIM SCOTT HERE")
---
Today, our country is being tested. Once again, our divisions run deep and the threat to our future is real. Joe Biden and the radical left have chosen a culture of grievance over greatness.
They’re promoting victimhood instead of personal responsibility and they’re indoctrinating our children to believe we live in an evil country.

And all too often when they get called out for their failures they weaponize race to divide us... to hold onto their power. When I fought back against their liberal agenda they called me a prop. A token. Because I disrupt their narrative. I threaten their control.

And that’s how I know I’m doing something right. And that’s why I will continue to fight because I believe America’s best days are ahead of us.

**[So, will you please be one of the first donors to my Presidential Exploratory Committee Fund? I really hope to see your name as a fellow American that has faith in this country.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16156%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2pAJxy7tIvLw0iYRgqMjLQ&sysid=1 "So, will you please be one
of the first donors to my Presidential Exploratory Committee Fund? I really hope
to see your name as a fellow American that has faith in this country.")**
---
| | | [YES TIM, I SUPPORT YOU!](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16157%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4%2b1zSTUyWAhn1PDFUGUG8A&sysid=1 "YES TIM, I SUPPORT YOU!")
---
God bless you,
Tim

---
* * *
---
| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16158%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=k17R49vijpCKUsKo%2fB5xqA&sysid=1)
---

I just launched my Presidential Exploratory Committee, and I couldn’t be more excited to hit the ground and listen to more Americans about their concerns, worries, fears, and priorities.

But the truth is, accomplishing our goal isn’t cheap. _**[So today, I’m humbly asking if you could please chip in $5, $10, $25, or anything you can afford to help my team and I keep trying to restore FAITH in America.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16159%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PBY5%2bCo3NxO9TY12gaG%2bUg&sysid=1 "So today, I’m humbly
asking if you could please chip in $5, $10, $25, or anything you can afford to
help my team and I keep trying to restore FAITH in America.")**_ I believe our best days are ahead of us, but I can’t do this alone. Are you with me?
---
| | [I’M WITH TIM SCOTT](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16150%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aDtmBhM71HQngznvFjZjpw&sysid=1 "JOIN MY TEAM")
---

I was raised in a single-parent household in North Charleston, South Carolina. My mom worked 16-hour days to keep food on the table and a roof over our heads. I got my first job, changing oil at a gas station, when I was 13. **I understand the value of a dollar.**

I don’t take asking for money lightly. I know that every donation made is a sacrifice, and I am forever grateful for each and every gift.

_**[I know we have been asking a lot lately, but it would mean so much if you could give $5 to help us restore faith in America.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16151%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OkqGUQ9dLKC%2fj91mvjBDUw&sysid=1 "I know we have been asking
a lot lately, but it would mean so much if you could give $5 to help us restore
faith in America.")**_
---
| | [I’M WITH TIM SCOTT](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16150%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aDtmBhM71HQngznvFjZjpw&sysid=1 "JOIN MY TEAM")

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: Citizens’ Grand Jury to seek indictment of NYC District Attorney Alvin Bragg
body:
New York City District Attorney Alvin Bragg has declared war on President Trump and the American people.

New York City District Attorney Alvin Bragg has declared war on President Trump and the American people. | | | | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zm3ombqto4r0o7dtf2285hueh9gp0jhqnts2egh8_rp22sh2s8i66o74clim4o71cjh2bs)
---
| |
---
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zits2q1aqnqvgi6hhsf670j3mee2q8ocqofch8ro_rp22sh2s8i66o74clim4o71cjh2bs)Dear Patriot,

New York City District Attorney Alvin Bragg has declared war on President Trump and the American people.

**Like I told you yesterday, this shocking indictment threatens the rule of law, honest elections, and the future of our country.**

What’s more, what District Attorney Bragg has done is **ILLEGAL.**

So once again, Freedom Watch turns to its Citizens’ Grand Jury. We’re going to seek a criminal indictment against Alvin Bragg for his crime...and we’re going to seek justice, peacefully and legally.

[**Patriot, please help Freedom Watch fully fund this critically important effort with your best gift of $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zqkc02al2nauv2ef7skbla1tjrkfkkdq6fqdi3a8_rp22sh2s8i66o74clim4o71cjh2bs)

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years. You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I’m the only lawyer in American history to have a court rule that a sitting President had committed a crime. And the only lawyer to enjoin the National Security Agency from conducting mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of American citizens.**

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents, and WIN.**

[**The time to act is now. Please help us fully fund our fight against the injustice of Biden’s corrupt regime.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zsen5v4h4vomki4nq2hs0s5lv5lfgjuggsjc7ae0_rp22sh2s8i66o74clim4o71cjh2bs)

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, you and I can’t let George Soros-backed District Attorney Alvin Bragg get away with his illegal indictment of President Trump.**

[**Please help Freedom Watch fight back peacefully and legally with your crucial gift of $25, $50, $100 or more right away.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zfl7ht6jfu4dop39k2ud0r71bkk75l1jrrgoudi0_rp22sh2s8i66o74clim4o71cjh2bs)

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Ambushed and assaulted
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Nine PAC
body:
There is a disturbing trend on the left

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6mm8inragi9elbkt8l6o772a3dq6bo3289bv0bg_rp22sh2s8i66o74clim4o74c3h2bs)
---
Fellow American,

There is a disturbing trend on the left-- Transgender activists are increasingly emboldened to attack those who oppose them. Time after time, we watch the left enable the rhetoric and justify the violence-- **ENOUGH IS ENOUGH!** This weekend, I was ambushed and assaulted by a transgender activist after speaking to a group of students at San Francisco State University. Students gathered wanting to hear the pro-woman side of the sports debate but were impeded by transgender activists, shouting, cursing, and threatening. This left-wing intimidation campaign won't work! This is only more evidence that I'm fighting the good fight, and proof that women need sex-protected spaces! I know what I'm doing is right. When they want you silent, speak louder. I'm on the frontlines fighting for women and girls and speaking TRUTH to all, even those who refuse to hear it. [**Will you step up and stand with me in this fight? Donate to NinePAC and help me continue to speak TRUTH where it's not welcome and FIGHT to protect the future of women's sports!**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4a0a4bl2u0attc59jsaoaih5gtdgdj46t0f0img_rp22sh2s8i66o74clim4o74c3h2bs)

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: Back to our FAITH, back to winning!
body:
Episode #4 of Unleashed with Heidi Ganahl is LIVE!
[](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujhlkl-ttjjilthht-r/) Hi Peter, As I celebrated Easter last weekend with my family, I was reminded of how powerful our faith can be when all seems lost. And right now, Colorado is lost. Our beautiful state has been labeled one of the "least religious states in America." As I visited 100s of churches across Colorado encouraging congregations and spiritual leaders to get politically engaged during the campaign, I was discouraged by the continued silence from people in the faith community despite the rapid decline of our state. To live out our faith, we have an obligation to speak out against evil, including government evil, and participate in the political process. We must VOTE OUR VALUES. It's time for the church to stand up and enter the battle. We are most definitely in the midst of a spiritual battle... for our children, for our lands, and for our future. This week on _Unleashed with Heidi Ganahl_ , I talk about the attack against the church in Colorado and the power we have to singlehandedly return our state to the beautiful place it used to be. I introduce you to Eric Metaxas' book [_Letter to the American Church_](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujhlkl-ttjjilthht-y/) which discusses the haunting similarities between today's American Church and the German Church of the 1930s. I also interview a dear friend of mine and a longtime fighter for Conservative values here in Colorado, Derrick Wilburn.
### **Episode #4 - BACK TO OUR FAITH, BACK TO WINNING**
[](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujhlkl-ttjjilthht-j/) [WATCH ON YOUTUBE](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujhlkl-ttjjilthht-t/) [WATCH ON RUMBLE](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujhlkl-ttjjilthht-i/) [LISTEN HERE](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujhlkl-ttjjilthht-d/) _Not into podcasts? I post transcripts of my monologues and full episode breakdowns every week on my Substack.[You can subscribe here!](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujhlkl-ttjjilthht-h/)_
## **ICYMI: A weekly recap of some lies exposed and truths UNLEASHED...**
### **1\. Judicial Watch reaches a settlement here in CO, confirming that we do in fact have dirty voter rolls.****What does this mean and how will it change things?**
Both guests on last week's episode of Unleashed made one thing perfectly clear... Clean voter rolls are KEY to secure, safe and FREE elections. We have dirty voter rolls here in CO, but nothing's been done because it's not in the official's interest to clean them up. In fact, it benefits them to have DIRTY voter rolls. Especially in a state like Colorado where we are 1) a part of [ERIC](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujhlkl-ttjjilthht-k/), 2) have automatic voter registration, and 3) have universal mail-in ballots... all strategies the left uses to KEEP our voter rolls dirty. In [this post](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujhlkl-ttjjilthht-b/), Shawn Smith discusses how the Judicial Watch lawsuit *should have* triggered an FBI investigation. So how do we move forward? Check out my "go-forward" tactics on [Substack](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujhlkl-ttjjilthht-n/). [](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujhlkl-ttjjilthht-p/)
### **2\. Ned Jones exposes how left-wing orgs funded by billionaires like Zuckerberg and Soros are playing in our election process, and how a Republican in CO is at the forefront of their mischief.**
If you were paying attention to statewide races this midterm election, you probably heard something about Pam Anderson (Republican candidate for Secretary of State) and her involvement in left-wing boards and organizations. On this last week's episode of Unleashed, Ned Jones, Deputy Director of Election Integrity Network, exposes the TRUTH behind these groups and their motives when it comes to changing our election process. Watch the entire 7-minute clip on my [YouTube](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujhlkl-ttjjilthht-x/) and [Rumble](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujhlkl-ttjjilthht-m/) or listen to the [full episode here](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujhlkl-ttjjilthht-c/). [](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujhlkl-ttjjilthht-q/)
### **3\. Senate Bill 23-213 is a huge power grab by Gov. Polis. Your neighborhoods and property values are about to tank. **
Do your research, friends. This [105-page bill](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujhlkl-ttjjilthht-a/) is a doozy so I tried to break down the most important pieces of it, in my opinion. [You can read my summary here.](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujhlkl-ttjjilthht-f/) I strongly encourage you to talk to your local city officials, house representatives, and state senators about how this will directly impact your community and how you can help fight against it. [](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujhlkl-ttjjilthht-z/) We've got some great episodes planned for you in the next couple of weeks. Follow or subscribe on your given podcast platform so you get notified when new episodes are released. Below are the direct links if you need them!_[YouTube](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujhlkl-ttjjilthht-v/) | [Rumble](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujhlkl-ttjjilthht-e/) | [Apple Podcasts](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujhlkl-ttjjilthht-s/) | [Spotify](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujhlkl-ttjjilthht-g/) | [Amazon Music](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujhlkl-ttjjilthht-w/) | [iHeart Radio](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujhlkl-ttjjilthht-yd/) | [Google Podcasts](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujhlkl-ttjjilthht-yh/) | [Castbox](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujhlkl-ttjjilthht-yk/) | [RadioPublic](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujhlkl-ttjjilthht-yu/) | [Stitcher](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujhlkl-ttjjilthht-jl/)_
See you next week!Heidi [](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujhlkl-ttjjilthht-jr/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujhlkl-ttjjilthht-jy/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujhlkl-ttjjilthht-jj/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujhlkl-ttjjilthht-jt/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujhlkl-ttjjilthht-ji/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujhlkl-ttjjilthht-jd/) | Heidi GanahlLone Tree, CO [Preferences](https://heidi4gov.updatemyprofile.com/i-qujhlkl-E8C3E4FD-ttjjilthht-jh) | [Unsubscribe](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-u-qujhlkl-ttjjilthht-jk/)
---

This week on Unleashed with Heidi Ganahl , I talk about the attack against the church in Colorado and the power we have to singlehandedly return our state to the beautiful place it used to be. I introduce you to Eric Metaxas' book which discusses the haunting similarities between today's American Church and the German Church of the 1930s. I also interview a dear friend of mine and a longtime fighter for Conservative values here in Colorado, Derrick Wilburn. Episode #4 - BACK TO OUR FAITH, BACK TO WINNING Not into podcasts? I post transcripts of my monologues and full episode breakdowns every week on my Substack. ICYMI: A weekly recap of some lies exposed and truths UNLEASHED... 1\. Judicial Watch reaches a settlement here in CO, confirming that we do in fact have dirty voter rolls.What does this mean and how will it change things? Both guests on last week's episode of Unleashed made one thing perfectly clear... Clean voter rolls are KEY to secure, safe and FREE elections. We have dirty voter rolls here in CO, but nothing's been done because it's not in the official's interest to clean them up. In fact, it benefits them to have DIRTY voter rolls. Especially in a state like Colorado where we are 1) a part of , 2) have automatic voter registration, and 3) have universal mail-in ballots... all strategies the left uses to KEEP our voter rolls dirty. In , Shawn Smith discusses how the Judicial Watch lawsuit should have triggered an FBI investigation. So how do we move forward? Check out my "go-forward" tactics on . 2\. Ned Jones exposes how left-wing orgs funded by billionaires like Zuckerberg and Soros are playing in our election process, and how a Republican in CO is at the forefront of their mischief. If you were paying attention to statewide races this midterm election, you probably heard something about Pam Anderson (Republican candidate for Secretary of State) and her involvement in left-wing boards and organizations. On this last week's episode of Unleashed, Ned Jones, Deputy Director of Election Integrity Network, exposes the TRUTH behind these groups and their motives when it comes to changing our election process. Watch the entire 7-minute clip on my and or listen to the . 3\. Senate Bill 23-213 is a huge power grab by Gov. Polis. Your neighborhoods and property values are about to tank. Do your research, friends. This is a doozy so I tried to break down the most important pieces of it, in my opinion. I strongly encourage you to talk to your local city officials, house representatives, and state senators about how this will directly impact your community and how you can help fight against it. We've got some great episodes planned for you in the next couple of weeks. Follow or subscribe on your given podcast platform so you get notified when new episodes are released. Below are the direct links if you need them! | | | | | | | | | See you next week!Heidi | Heidi GanahlLone Tree, CO |

### _Friday, April 14, 2023_
People will pay a lot for a chance to own old things and collectibles. An original IPhone just sold for 63 k, and tennis shoes go for hundreds of dollars, we take a look at what drives this market. Also you might be a red neck if you resort to cheating at a fishing tournament by stuffing weights down the fishes mouths. Another rousing episode of Fridays Finest. [ ](http://click1.srnemail.com/clcmclkkcsgfsszkfggntfqsvcfjlvvsdlnzvdgpdcjqmt_unhffggwgqwcshfmhnfyyyy.html)

### _Wednesday, April 12, 2023_
Have you ever been caught off guard by a question and instead of taking the time to understand the question you answered and found yourself in trouble with your response. I am taking a passage out of the New Testament in which Jesus is put to a test with a question and his handling of the situation can be applied to all areas of your life. This is a lesson for all of us that cannot only improve relationships but also lead to more success in business. [ ](http://click1.srnemail.com/jmjnvmzzvptwppkzwttdbwfpcvwqmccprmdkcrtjrvqfnj_unhffggwgqwcshfmhnfyyyy.html)

### _Monday, April 10, 2023_
The country is going through a crisis of understanding in the role of our legal system. Liberals want to make it a tool to go after those they don’t like and Conservatives believe that it is no longer fair. I sit down with former US attorney Jay Town and have a wide ranging discussion on what is going on and what we should expect out of our Judicial System. subject: New J6 Choir song with Donald Trump
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zggbqnga3ld1bsvl9iqv92d4e0alsb5v4q36fme8_rp22sh2s8i66o74clim6ob2cph2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

---
Fellow American,

There is a disturbing trend on the left— Transgender activists are increasingly emboldened to attack those who oppose them. Time after time, we watch the left enable the rhetoric and justify the violence— **ENOUGH IS ENOUGH!** This weekend, I was ambushed and assaulted by a transgender activist after speaking to a group of students at San Francisco State University. Students gathered wanting to hear the pro-woman side of the sports debate but were impeded by transgender activists, shouting, cursing, and threatening. This left-wing intimidation campaign won’t work! This is only more evidence that I’m fighting the good fight, and proof that women need sex-protected spaces! I know what I'm doing is right. When they want you silent, speak louder. I’m on the frontlines fighting for women and girls and speaking TRUTH to all, even those who refuse to hear it. [**Will you step up and stand with me in this fight? | | | | | Dear Subscriber, The 2008 housing collapse was among the most challenging economic downturns our country has ever been through. But today's housing crisis could be far, far worse ... It's not just real estate, but stocks, bonds ... even the money you have sitting in banks. Most people don't realize how bad it already is. The stock market has seen trillions in value disappear ... Bonds have seen several yield curve inversions ... And real estate has seen the fastest price drops since just before the 2008 housing crisis. But unlike 2008, the government isn't coming to the rescue. In fact, their actions may make things worse. I'm writing today to give you immediate guidance on what steps you can take to protect your real estate portfolio ... **without selling a single property!** All the details are in this **[free video from Dr. Martin Weiss](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkvj5lt0fflla3cg3g6r330josg9u1ec42vkk3qg_rp22sh2s8i66o74climcpr4clh2bs)**. **[Click here](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z41brsjl9efmfg3gtdtgved9p4r509rsmolcd6ag_rp22sh2s8i66o74climcpr4clh2bs)** to watch this urgent briefing now. name: ICYMI News
subject: Theology 101
body:
Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him.

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z53p7qqfu4aqufpvqh9hjomql6268fe84l9f1hb0_rp22sh2s8i66o74clim6ob4cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning. Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2msum8ei73oscu600mk8e1emjasb739kr4t863g_rp22sh2s8i66o74clim6ob4cjh2bs) One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose. That, in turn, makes it possible to begin to understand our relationship to God.

The study of God, also known as “theology,” has had a profound impact on Western civilization, stretching back thousands of years to the ancient Hebrews. And that’s what Hillsdale’s **“Theology 101”** online course is about—the development of theology from the Old Testament through the twentieth century.

**“Theology 101”** has been a popular course, so I’m pleased to let you know that it is [**now available for you to own on DVD**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcubnp10qi4aeult78oru7kcho9bdic1hkmuopeg_rp22sh2s8i66o74clim6ob4cjh2bs). You can add it to your home library or give it as a gift to a friend or relative.

We do have a limited number of sets in stock, though—and they go fast—so don’t delay in getting your copy of **“Theology 101”** on DVD. Secure yours right now at: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-theology-101-dvd](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2nrm5k63u8jat9hln02v09f9sh79g9203fopjc8_rp22sh2s8i66o74clim6ob4cjh2bs)** Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

ICYMI News
---
