name: Sean Spicer
subject: I’m parting ways with Newsmax. Here’s what I’m up to now:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR.

| |

---
| | | Hey - this is Sean Spicer:

With a heavy heart, I just announced I’m parting ways with Newsmax. My show reached millions and helped viewers see what’s _really_ happening in our country. Something the Mainstream Media fails to do time and time again.

_**[But with that in the rearview mirror, I’m thrilled at what’s coming next...](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16161%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4HK3XObNs%2bK%2b707LS%2fDXng&sysid=1 "But with that in the
rearview mirror, I’m thrilled at what’s coming next... ")**_

---
| | | [READ MY FULL STATEMENT >>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16162%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yU%2b02o5VBL1uFbe7qeW6zQ&sysid=1 "READ MY FULL STATEMENT")
---

The 2024 election will be the single most important one in the history of our country. Joe Biden and Democrats in Congress have set our country into a tailspin. It’s an emergency situation and we’re running dangerously short on time to change course.

We have our work cut out for us ahead of 2024:

- Fire Joe Biden and retake the presidency
- Expand our razor-thin Majority in the House
- Win back the Senate and send Chuck Schumer into retirement

**The Democrats aren’t going to give us an inch ... so we have no choice but to 1) outwork, 2) outsmart, and - most importantly - 3) outraise them. **

Unfortunately, that last point is the most important. Why? Because no one works harder than strong Conservatives like you. And Republicans are WINNING on the issues - they can’t outsmart us when we’re the ones fighting for freedom, defending our country and flag, and resisting their radical woke agenda.

But Democrats have a MAJOR advantage in fundraising thanks to their armies of Hollywood megadonors and woke Liberals whipping out their credit cards whenever they flip on MSNBC.

_**[Look- if we want to win in 2024, it’s going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16163%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XP3XeXX1mEp7Gxd%2fKiTszw&sysid=1 "Look – if we want to
win in 2024, it’s going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW. ")**_

That’s why I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR. We ran the numbers on what it’ll take to outraise the Democrats and pull off an overwhelming victory.

We came to the conclusion that if every last one of you gave between $27 and $54, we would have the resources to MAX OUT all our voter contact budgets, GOTV operations, and volunteer recruitment efforts.

_In other words ... if everyone here steps up RIGHT NOW, the Democrats would suffer a defeat like nothing we’ve ever seen before._

**But that’s a big “if” - it requires 100% participation. **

This plan falls apart if too many folks sit out. We need everyone on board to pull this off.

So I’ll cut to the chase.

_**[From the bottom of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54? If we can pull this off, we’ll make history.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16164%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gngAQomdqwAQzb6i9MS5iw&sysid=1 "From the bottom of my
heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54?
If we can pull this off, we’ll make history.")**_

Are you in?

---
**[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16175%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JgYGRjB%2foIGsX9Jba%2bvVoA&sysid=1)[**YES >>**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16176%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8LLsMQdktvo0k1TmS5CjEA&sysid=1)_[**NO >>**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16177%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nI86PsRApjxjqSRSpxYe9Q&sysid=1)**
---

More from me soon,
Sean Spicer

---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16178%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1N0S6Da2cBvD9zcuX1Z0qg&sysid=1 "image")

name: American Action News
subject: They’re “canceling” patriotism
body:
I have a special gift for you—a set of unique notecards featuring pictures of the “Liberty Walk” statues found on the Hillsdale College campus.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlr0adj3pbtms1mu27ktc6u84vpb4egt22hm6h5o_rp22sh2s8i66o74clim1oj6cdh2bs) Friend of Liberty, I have a special gift for you—a set of unique notecards featuring pictures of the “Liberty Walk” statues found on the Hillsdale College campus. These beautiful cards include _George Washington_ and _Thomas Jefferson_ ... _Abraham Lincoln_ and _Frederick Douglass_ ... _Winston Churchill_ , _Margaret Thatcher_ , and _Ronald Reagan_. _All of these statues stand proudly on Hillsdale’s Michigan campus_ —one of the only institutions of higher learning that refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. You can view the cards at this secure link: [https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/get-your-liberty-walk-notecards](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z98pja4ql3noq6s60npb738d4cm7p7rrgueq48n8_rp22sh2s8i66o74clim1oj6cdh2bs) Let the cards serve as a reminder to you of the vigilance and commitment needed to defend liberty—especially right now, a critical time for our country. **Sadly, several polls and events around the country show that increasing numbers of young Americans are being drawn to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty.** And the unrest in communities nationwide, where statues of our Founding Fathers are being vandalized or torn down, is another symptom of this underlying disease. What explains this development? As an educator and president of Hillsdale, I’ve been thinking about this for a long time. Here’s one primary reason... For decades, the “progressive” leftist academics who became dominant in most of America’s colleges and universities after the 1960s have been teaching a **biased** and **distorted** view of American history. _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project” is a prime example. According to the “1619 Project,” the key to understanding America is not freedom, but slavery—and the Project’s main goal is to inject this false teaching into the curricula of America’s K–12 schools. Imagine young minds in classrooms all over American learning this. Does it make you as concerned as it does me? And given this trend in American education, is it any wonder that our young people feel less of a patriotic attachment to our nation and are increasingly attracted—out of ignorance—to failed ideas such as socialism, ideas that are destructive of liberty? Another sign of the “progressive” Left’s influence is the continuing attempt to erase our American heritage by destroying monuments, renaming schools and streets, and censoring works of literature in the name of “political correctness.” The Left knows that it cannot remake society according to its ever-evolving idea of “progress” until it has “canceled” patriotism and hallowed out the idea that we should be grateful for our blessings to the great men and women of the past—many of whom are depicted on the cards I’d like to send you. **This is why we are engaging the Left on the battlefield of education ... and why your generous support is needed right away.** After all, those on the Left are extremely well-funded, thanks to liberal billionaires like George Soros and his ilk. **With the support of citizens like you—citizens who understand the importance of education to liberty—we are ramping up its outreach efforts on behalf of liberty, especially to our nation’s youth.** It is even more urgent that we do so in the face of efforts such as _The New York Times_ ’ “1619 Project” that undermine patriotism and lead to an increased pull toward socialism. Hillsdale is the only educational institution in America that is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens of all ages, from coast to coast, about America’s great heritage of liberty. **Your generous support today will...**
* **Expand** the circulation of _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s digest of liberty, to reach millions more Americans (you can also receive a free subscription of _Imprimis_ ...for life).

* **Send** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to schools across America, and to members of our armed forces, who have sworn to defend the Constitution.

* **Increase** the number of citizens (especially younger Americans) enrolling in Hillsdale’s free online courses such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope.”

* **Launch** and support more and more Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, returning excellence to American K-12 education and impacting thousands of our youngest citizens.

One other thing you should be aware of... As I mentioned, to maintain our independence, we do all of this liberty-defending work while refusing EVERY PENNY of government funding—even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY. So, your support is even more crucial to ensuring that future generations of Americans will be educated in American civics and prepared to defend freedom. **With a gift of $17.76 or more today to support educational outreach efforts that reach and teach millions, Hillsdale will send you a special notecard set featuring the statues on our “Liberty Walk.” The cards are a thank you for your support.** Supplies are limited, so please make your best tax-deductible gift right away. **You can view the cards and give your best tax-deductible gift of $17.76, $25, $50, $100, or even $250 or more by following the secure link below:** [https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/get-your-liberty-walk-notecards](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zctv97bho9201i6icdcvja4p4ge9sshn8kpkhf28_rp22sh2s8i66o74clim1oj6cdh2bs) After receiving your notecards, I hope you’ll send one to a young person you know, encouraging them to learn more about the Constitution and American history. You can even recommend that they take advantage of Hillsdale’s many free educational resources. The Left is going all out, as illustrated by _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project.” It is urgent that we engage forcefully on the battlefield of education ... which is why your support is needed today. **Because as always, our only sure defense is an educated citizenry prepared to defend liberty—no matter the cost.** Warm regards, Bill Gray Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

clean_body: I have a special gift for you—a set of unique notecards featuring pictures of the “Liberty Walk” statues found on the Hillsdale College campus. This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College Friend of Liberty, I have a special gift for you—a set of unique notecards featuring pictures of the “Liberty Walk” statues found on the Hillsdale College campus. These beautiful cards include George Washington and Thomas Jefferson ... Abraham Lincoln and Frederick Douglass ... Winston Churchill , Margaret Thatcher , and Ronald Reagan. All of these statues stand proudly on Hillsdale’s Michigan campus —one of the only institutions of higher learning that refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. You can view the cards at this secure link: Let the cards serve as a reminder to you of the vigilance and commitment needed to defend liberty—especially right now, a critical time for our country. Sadly, several polls and events around the country show that increasing numbers of young Americans are being drawn to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty. And the unrest in communities nationwide, where statues of our Founding Fathers are being vandalized or torn down, is another symptom of this underlying disease. What explains this development? As an educator and president of Hillsdale, I’ve been thinking about this for a long time. Here’s one primary reason... For decades, the “progressive” leftist academics who became dominant in most of America’s colleges and universities after the 1960s have been teaching a biased and distorted view of American history. The New York Times’ “1619 Project” is a prime example. According to the “1619 Project,” the key to understanding America is not freedom, but slavery—and the Project’s main goal is to inject this false teaching into the curricula of America’s K–12 schools. Imagine young minds in classrooms all over American learning this. Does it make you as concerned as it does me? And given this trend in American education, is it any wonder that our young people feel less of a patriotic attachment to our nation and are increasingly attracted—out of ignorance—to failed ideas such as socialism, ideas that are destructive of liberty? Another sign of the “progressive” Left’s influence is the continuing attempt to erase our American heritage by destroying monuments, renaming schools and streets, and censoring works of literature in the name of “political correctness.” The Left knows that it cannot remake society according to its ever-evolving idea of “progress” until it has “canceled” patriotism and hallowed out the idea that we should be grateful for our blessings to the great men and women of the past—many of whom are depicted on the cards I’d like to send you. This is why we are engaging the Left on the battlefield of education ... and why your generous support is needed right away. After all, those on the Left are extremely well-funded, thanks to liberal billionaires like George Soros and his ilk. With the support of citizens like you—citizens who understand the importance of education to liberty—we are ramping up its outreach efforts on behalf of liberty, especially to our nation’s youth. It is even more urgent that we do so in the face of efforts such as The New York Times ’ “1619 Project” that undermine patriotism and lead to an increased pull toward socialism. Hillsdale is the only educational institution in America that is reaching and teaching millions of citizens of all ages, from coast to coast, about America’s great heritage of liberty. Your generous support today will... Expand the circulation of Imprimis , Hillsdale’s digest of liberty, to reach millions more Americans (you can also receive a free subscription of Imprimis ...for life). Send millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to schools across America, and to members of our armed forces, who have sworn to defend the Constitution. Increase the number of citizens (especially younger Americans) enrolling in Hillsdale’s free online courses such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope.” Launch and support more and more Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, returning excellence to American K-12 education and impacting thousands of our youngest citizens. One other thing you should be aware of... As I mentioned, to maintain our independence, we do all of this liberty-defending work while refusing EVERY PENNY of government funding—even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY. So, your support is even more crucial to ensuring that future generations of Americans will be educated in American civics and prepared to defend freedom. name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: Citizens’ Grand Jury to seek indictment of NYC District Attorney Alvin Bragg
body:
New York City District Attorney Alvin Bragg has declared war on President Trump and the American people.

| | | | | [ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665765%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BS0ZS4ROH0CcdkdQxLrhOw&sysid=1)

---
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665766%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UiNO7sGRFXO3sVNFbJeawg&sysid=1)Dear Patriot,

New York City District Attorney Alvin Bragg has declared war on President Trump and the American people.

**Like I told you yesterday, this shocking indictment threatens the rule of law, honest elections, and the future of our country.**

What’s more, what District Attorney Bragg has done is **ILLEGAL.**

So once again, Freedom Watch turns to its Citizens’ Grand Jury. We’re going to seek a criminal indictment against Alvin Bragg for his crime...and we’re going to seek justice, peacefully and legally.

[ **Patriot, please help Freedom Watch fully fund this critically important effort with your best gift of $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY.** ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665767%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=g2mhsiVZuIDCDFwvtagpNw&sysid=1)

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years. You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I’m the only lawyer in American history to have a court rule that a sitting President had committed a crime. And the only lawyer to enjoin the National Security Agency from conducting mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of American citizens.**

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents, and WIN.**

[ **The time to act is now. Please help us fully fund our fight against the injustice of Biden’s corrupt regime.** ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665768%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Hsz4hdPwcafXdMSqdzYtDQ&sysid=1)

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, you and I can’t let George Soros-backed District Attorney Alvin Bragg get away with his illegal indictment of President Trump.**

[ **Please help Freedom Watch fight back peacefully and legally with your crucial gift of $25, $50, $100 or more right away.** ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665769%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ck5mz1PsgkJ1onOzTJsltw&sysid=1)

subject: I need your help to get on the debate stage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
The number of grassroots donors will likely be one of the main criteria for an invitation to the first Presidential Debate.

| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlasi92ti7qkiju9kqsu8kb8k7uv2fv3oc2qr5co_rp22sh2s8i66o74clim1oj6cth2bs)
Fellow American,

**The RNC announced the location of the first Presidential Debate.**

I am going to put in the work EVERY DAY to make sure I am on that debate stage.

While we don't know today the criteria to be invited to the main debate stage yet, it's clear that the number of unique grassroots donors will play a major role.

To make sure I can share my vision for America on the debate stage, _**[I need your help.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zotulmhdhilmkqcqkicnnk970iiefg9nvf4psj80_rp22sh2s8i66o74clim1oj6cth2bs)**_

**[Even if it's a small amount, can I count on you to join our movement by chipping in $1, $5, or even $20 today?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zat0c7jcvbq4e81oinrdhb4h26u8cpnpb90itri8_rp22sh2s8i66o74clim1oj6cth2bs)**

---

Whatever amount you are comfortable giving will help us drive forward and get our ideas a prominent spot on the debate stage.

**[Your support today will help build our American revival and prepare for the first debate this August!](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4j26r10v6j0bpsofatjm5d3prlf24tb4b69uci8_rp22sh2s8i66o74clim1oj6cth2bs)**

Thanks,

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1n5bbjpd1taaicuefjslu2g6ias687qprirmm6g_rp22sh2s8i66o74clim1oj6cth2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** DONATE TODAY -> **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z254hgtqebs8g49nsu9ht7dodun1r74o08ad4pj8_rp22sh2s8i66o74clim1oj6cth2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1smahhag8h7b2oefdg3q0limm078o64ptel8t80_rp22sh2s8i66o74clim1oj6cth2bs)

---

| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znsup98ggp3gs8d0ciihcmdhudsurtkh7upeileg_rp22sh2s8i66o74clim1oj6cth2bs)| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zktg3t6fh9qnr53giedjq14jn1oj3esul6akn6q8_rp22sh2s8i66o74clim1oj6cth2bs)| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpl3diog334eif0kvb3vo2f8g92p37o9t2mgkvco_rp22sh2s8i66o74clim1oj6cth2bs)
---|---|---

subject: FWD: only four others like me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for Michigan |
body:
It’s critical every Co-Pilot sees this message, which is why I’m re-upping it for you.
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://click.action.jjforcongress.com/?qs=405c4c9d5d8f2dc417578461a0f69ba23dfe8d06f0162bc52cd8f7631d2096c8f7df2c326ffc89e12ea748e77a0deaf99ec3f170e2f5752b)
---
Hey, Peter. Wanted to make sure you saw the email my team sent. The DCCC and their allies are singling me out and making my seat a top target in 2024. Want to know why? **Because my seat was****[one of only FIVE seats](https://click.action.jjforcongress.com/?qs=405c4c9d5d8f2dc4d3f0ecc928bc4c1bc99f781e2a767fb22372278020fc83cc3a5cd9ba844c26700b1df17f41bcb92a6b67cbcf6209ccf5 "one of only FIVE seats") that flipped the House back to conservatives.** They're trying to buy my seat and replace me with a progressive that cares more about advancing Joe Biden's agenda than they do about addressing the kitchen table issues you and I care so deeply about. They want to shove their woke ESG requirements down our throats when families struggle to put food on the table and keep a roof over their heads. They want to force us to drive expensive $60,000 electric vehicles when we can't even afford to put gas in the cars we already drive. Peter, they're doing all of this while the Chinese Communist Party continues to show hostility toward the United States and our way of life - and our president does absolutely NOTHING. **_[With the help of Co-Pilots like you, we can defend my seat, defend our values, and EXPAND the conservative majority.](https://click.action.jjforcongress.com/?qs=405c4c9d5d8f2dc43329e2aaff5388933057b75ddd1585b1781ebe85472ee303eaff73644ceaac6aa0cb2a2be58466614db7e51cae250c7c "With the help of Co-Pilots like you, we can defend my seat, defend our values, and EXPAND the conservative majority.")_** **[Become a recurring donor to help fuel my fight.](https://click.action.jjforcongress.com/?qs=405c4c9d5d8f2dc447364c332f5999d9f9439d0964163e670e3e41d876bdf51d173b8ae4548210ceb3421f0679713749c10e5c636bb4d6b4 "Become a recurring donor to help fuel my fight.")** It doesn't matter if it's **[$5](https://click.action.jjforcongress.com/?qs=405c4c9d5d8f2dc4a92cf5c99926b484120d12497807a9b0b0db7ce115a694add919edf458f1edf1ecbc349aef387df0257772d8ff6f4f56 "$5")** , **[$10](https://click.action.jjforcongress.com/?qs=405c4c9d5d8f2dc4a745c73cf8d65ad98d046044c2b553bbbcb3fba737f89789f28f3d500e6ace1b6a1d62feaf7732245d2e9363c55af261 "$10")** , or even **[$20](https://click.action.jjforcongress.com/?qs=405c4c9d5d8f2dc468480746ee5b45214ebfc5be4ce539273ac728f90f8071a7b59e5fe91b77a1a4f89e4718f226b914a74b1a42d0491752 "$20")**. _Every single dollar_ from Co-Pilots like you fuels my fight for MI-10 and our nation. Want to fuel my fight but can only make a one-time contribution? **[Click here.](https://click.action.jjforcongress.com/?qs=405c4c9d5d8f2dc45790d92928741932e5ec300147caf95e26489379db951b778303c4ffb8733646a5f7e102f0e66b08876cea5e93a87f42 "Click here.")** I would be honored to have your support, Peter.

Let's Fly!
John James

_"[The Afghanistan withdrawal] was the definition of chaos. It was dishonorable. It was shameful. It was humiliating. _ _" ... As the old saying goes, war is hell. This is _**_nothing_** _to brag about. "_ -Mike Gallagher

Peter,

In the fall of 2021, John Kirby admitted there was chaos after Joe Biden's botched withdrawal in Afghanistan. **_Now, he 's flip-flopping, saying he "didn't see" chaos unfold._** **Peter, Mike has led the charge to hold Joe Biden and his administration accountable for leaving hundreds of Americans behind enemy lines and abandoning our allies.** Thank you,
Team Gallagher

Thank you, Team Gallagher | No one has fought harder to make America safer and more secure than Mike Gallagher. He's taking on the CCP so American principles lead the way in the 21st century. name: Riley Gaines
subject: Ambushed and assaulted
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Nine PAC
body:
There is a disturbing trend on the left

| | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjcfd2mr511c1r1race0r6rlbferr58r3spjqpbo_rp22sh2s8i66o74clhm8o74cth2bs)
---
Fellow American,

There is a disturbing trend on the left-- Transgender activists are increasingly emboldened to attack those who oppose them. Time after time, we watch the left enable the rhetoric and justify the violence-- **ENOUGH IS ENOUGH!** This weekend, I was ambushed and assaulted by a transgender activist after speaking to a group of students at San Francisco State University. Students gathered wanting to hear the pro-woman side of the sports debate but were impeded by transgender activists, shouting, cursing, and threatening. This left-wing intimidation campaign won't work! This is only more evidence that I'm fighting the good fight, and proof that women need sex-protected spaces! I know what I'm doing is right. When they want you silent, speak louder. I'm on the frontlines fighting for women and girls and speaking TRUTH to all, even those who refuse to hear it. [**Will you step up and stand with me in this fight? Donate to NinePAC and help me continue to speak TRUTH where it's not welcome and FIGHT to protect the future of women's sports!**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4t3tvs184j2h2e2nis1396t70it1rj1382lr1uo_rp22sh2s8i66o74clhm8o74cth2bs)

name: 1600 Daily
subject: What do you think of K-12 education these days?
body:
Far too many of our country’s K-12 students are INDOCTRINATED rather than EDUCATED.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zju40k67ql5uplmju31qrls494veshpmgkgbpj2o_rp22sh2s8i66o74clhm8o72cph2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend of Liberty, Greetings from Hillsdale, Michigan! My name is Bill Gray, and I’m reaching out to you today as both a graduate of Hillsdale College and someone who works to expand the College’s efforts to pursue truth and defend liberty nationwide. You might not know this, but it’s a task that has only grown harder over the years. Far too many of our country’s K-12 students are INDOCTRINATED rather than EDUCATED. In schools across the country, kids learn American history...but it’s being taught through the lens of dangerous ideologies like critical race theory. The result? More and more young Americans are conditioned to look past our common humanity to categorize people according to characteristics like race. You’ve probably seen the battles over our children’s K-12 education play out in headlines and heated school board meetings across the country. And it’s a promising sign that we’ve watched candidates surge to victory while promising to return greater control to parents. Today, though, I want to make sure you have the chance to let your voice be heard on what’s happening in YOUR community. After all, no one knows the local schools better than those who call it home. The survey is only a few simple questions long. Here’s the first question as a preview: **“Do you think that American civics education, especially the teaching of American history, is at a crisis point?”** We've created a secure page for you [HERE](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7fu7ja3mh5rb6ktpv77h02so6cnn6nkqj55b5ng_rp22sh2s8i66o74clhm8o72cph2bs), where you can share your thoughts. You can also follow the link below to take your survey. If you could take it in the next couple of days, the team and I at Hillsdale would really appreciate it: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/k-12-survey/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0nv393mr84t1m9o5fdjsjtc7ar02u1vha0b1h28_rp22sh2s8i66o74clhm8o72cph2bs)** Your survey answers will help us understand how you see the situation in _your_ backyard and what you think _your_ children should learn. And your answers will inform our efforts to restore excellence to K-12 education (especially in the critical subjects of American history and civics). This work will impact millions of communities nationwide just like yours for the better by passing on America’s great heritage of liberty to current and future generations. I know you’re busy, so we have made sure this survey is short and to the point. Enjoy the rest of your day, and thank you in advance for your opinions! With appreciation, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

1600 Daily
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zn8r96qnfscf0jj5s70pcslrrv8f82gcm1r5lca0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkhhm0o316gqb3d7jkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8o30slh6eoj246h22sh2s8i66o74clhm8o72cph2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhqugsljogtiuj8ffqsemt9jn63dl3fjd0bm6rs0_rp22sh2s8i66o74clhm8o72cph2bs)_

All for nothing._ **_These young Black lawmakers risked everything. They're getting death threats. They'll be targets of nutball right wingers for the rest of their lives. __Let's _****_send a powerful message to the Tennessee 3 and all Democrats that we're with you in the fight!_** [**_Will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to these fighters to continue to stand up to authoritarianism?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T87ed5900-edfb-4530-9196-caadf83afffc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for fighting for democracy and equality for us all._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc5dbae0f-c593-478a-8d6b-b2bce756231e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Caleb Max
subject: Reminder: Need your help with my new venture
body:
Please consider a donation today.
| | |
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MRQd8DQldj5KtUyFZTmxJE9-Ho8_VqSSOfzVmFCTMcshuIcAm7T7qwzQTap6W2TH5i6nWt1pINj6y2VYS3eX_ckIezSIReTwskFHgMk-CjYWLLJQFZzgq_pU6fWqr8DNFU1-2uwxrqg=&c=92RKh0KEPpPuzn6Wmd35Kg9mpcYZ87AbSiTe77XnsJ8uJeeV_WhzqQ==&ch=v_NiWkZRLkdc0Jbkv3eDu5MFanVrKr1H97sYI6WzmgysYqrXm63L6w==)
---
|
---
| Please Support Virginia Faith & Freedom
---
| Dear Peter,
For nearly 40 years my grandfather, Former Congressman Frank Wolf, traversed the globe and back here at home in Virginia was a prodigious advocate for religious liberty. It makes me incredibly grateful and humbled to be able to carry on that torch as a Board Member with the Virginia Faith and Freedom Coalition. [Join me in supporting the Virginia Faith & Freedom Coalition](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MRQd8DQldj5KtUyFZTmxJE9-Ho8_VqSSOfzVmFCTMcshuIcAm7T7qwzQTap6W2THTJouEOj5nW3qhX7BxlzsDzriXOgzpt22w4YtLZhbgHzfdCrvV2Vw5H_pbuxDiwU3joYvgR44DGFqyTs0w8R0nav3jiEJZ77zDt7yaploPbgT5lmTsk1UiDsvIdKY0yzMNvP49eFeG4c=&c=92RKh0KEPpPuzn6Wmd35Kg9mpcYZ87AbSiTe77XnsJ8uJeeV_WhzqQ==&ch=v_NiWkZRLkdc0Jbkv3eDu5MFanVrKr1H97sYI6WzmgysYqrXm63L6w==).
It was the persecution of people of faith that sparked my grandfather's career in public service. Today it is a different type of persecution of people of faith that has sparked my own journey in religious liberty advocacy. People of faith in Virginia have not always had the loudest voices, but FAITH undergirds the strength of our arguments. That FAITH gave way to the establishment of our Nation, sustained the resolve of the Founding Fathers, and allows our Country and Commonwealth to thrive and endure.
Today, more than ever, it is important that as people of FAITH we are not just a part of the public discourse, but play an active role in the policies that determine the future of our Commonwealth. That is why I am so proud to take up the mantle of ensuring values and faith-based involvement in public discourse as a member of the Board of the Virginia Faith and Freedom Coalition. I am honored by this appointment, but I will need your help. [Please consider donating to the Virginia Faith and Freedom Coalition today.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MRQd8DQldj5KtUyFZTmxJE9-Ho8_VqSSOfzVmFCTMcshuIcAm7T7qwzQTap6W2THTJouEOj5nW3qhX7BxlzsDzriXOgzpt22w4YtLZhbgHzfdCrvV2Vw5H_pbuxDiwU3joYvgR44DGFqyTs0w8R0nav3jiEJZ77zDt7yaploPbgT5lmTsk1UiDsvIdKY0yzMNvP49eFeG4c=&c=92RKh0KEPpPuzn6Wmd35Kg9mpcYZ87AbSiTe77XnsJ8uJeeV_WhzqQ==&ch=v_NiWkZRLkdc0Jbkv3eDu5MFanVrKr1H97sYI6WzmgysYqrXm63L6w==)
In partnership with the national Faith and Freedom Coalition, we have revitalized the movement for Faith and Freedom in the Commonwealth. The cornerstone of our approach is Faith in Action. How we build upon this cornerstone depends upon you.
We have hired a professional staff to manage field operations to engage and equip voters of faith. Additionally, we have hired a Virginia-based public affairs firm to handle advocacy and educating Virginia legislators on the issues we champion. We will rely on your contributions to maintain this professional staff, as we work with the Virginia General Assembly to pass values-based legislation. That's why I'm personally asking you to [click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MRQd8DQldj5KtUyFZTmxJE9-Ho8_VqSSOfzVmFCTMcshuIcAm7T7qwzQTap6W2THTJouEOj5nW3qhX7BxlzsDzriXOgzpt22w4YtLZhbgHzfdCrvV2Vw5H_pbuxDiwU3joYvgR44DGFqyTs0w8R0nav3jiEJZ77zDt7yaploPbgT5lmTsk1UiDsvIdKY0yzMNvP49eFeG4c=&c=92RKh0KEPpPuzn6Wmd35Kg9mpcYZ87AbSiTe77XnsJ8uJeeV_WhzqQ==&ch=v_NiWkZRLkdc0Jbkv3eDu5MFanVrKr1H97sYI6WzmgysYqrXm63L6w==) to partner with us in getting these important tasks done.
The Virginia Faith and Freedom Coalition believes that the greatness of America lies not in government but in the character of our people - the simple virtues of faith, hard work, family, personal responsibility, and helping the least among us. We need people of faith to have a seat at the table to ensure that America and Virginia never lose sight of these values. This is not just a political pitch; rather, it is a request for [your investment](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MRQd8DQldj5KtUyFZTmxJE9-Ho8_VqSSOfzVmFCTMcshuIcAm7T7qwzQTap6W2THTJouEOj5nW3qhX7BxlzsDzriXOgzpt22w4YtLZhbgHzfdCrvV2Vw5H_pbuxDiwU3joYvgR44DGFqyTs0w8R0nav3jiEJZ77zDt7yaploPbgT5lmTsk1UiDsvIdKY0yzMNvP49eFeG4c=&c=92RKh0KEPpPuzn6Wmd35Kg9mpcYZ87AbSiTe77XnsJ8uJeeV_WhzqQ==&ch=v_NiWkZRLkdc0Jbkv3eDu5MFanVrKr1H97sYI6WzmgysYqrXm63L6w==) in an organization that will go to work every day for the values that you and I share - values that mean so much to the longevity of a strong, prosperous America and Virginia.

clean_body: Please consider a donation today. | | | | == | | Please Support Virginia Faith & Freedom | Dear Peter, For nearly 40 years my grandfather, Former Congressman Frank Wolf, traversed the globe and back here at home in Virginia was a prodigious advocate for religious liberty. It makes me incredibly grateful and humbled to be able to carry on that torch as a Board Member with the Virginia Faith and Freedom Coalition. ==. It was the persecution of people of faith that sparked my grandfather's career in public service. Today it is a different type of persecution of people of faith that has sparked my own journey in religious liberty advocacy. People of faith in Virginia have not always had the loudest voices, but FAITH undergirds the strength of our arguments. That FAITH gave way to the establishment of our Nation, sustained the resolve of the Founding Fathers, and allows our Country and Commonwealth to thrive and endure. Today, more than ever, it is important that as people of FAITH we are not just a part of the public discourse, but play an active role in the policies that determine the future of our Commonwealth. That is why I am so proud to take up the mantle of ensuring values and faith-based involvement in public discourse as a member of the Board of the Virginia Faith and Freedom Coalition. I am honored by this appointment, but I will need your help. == In partnership with the national Faith and Freedom Coalition, we have revitalized the movement for Faith and Freedom in the Commonwealth. The cornerstone of our approach is Faith in Action. How we build upon this cornerstone depends upon you. We have hired a professional staff to manage field operations to engage and equip voters of faith. Additionally, we have hired a Virginia-based public affairs firm to handle advocacy and educating Virginia legislators on the issues we champion. We will rely on your contributions to maintain this professional staff, as we work with the Virginia General Assembly to pass values-based legislation. That's why I'm personally asking you to == to partner with us in getting these important tasks done. The Virginia Faith and Freedom Coalition believes that the greatness of America lies not in government but in the character of our people - the simple virtues of faith, hard work, family, personal responsibility, and helping the least among us. We need people of faith to have a seat at the table to ensure that America and Virginia never lose sight of these values. This is not just a political pitch; rather, it is a request for == in an organization that will go to work every day for the values that you and I share - values that mean so much to the longevity of a strong, prosperous America and Virginia. == and let's go to work on behalf of Virginians of faith and the values that we hold dear! Thank You! Caleb | | == | | | | | | | Virginia Faith & Freedom Coalition | PO Box 404, Herndon, VA 20170 | | Sent by mailto:maxforcongress@gmail.com in collaboration with

* * *
**_“Gerrymandering brings us lawmaking from the extremes.”_**
Cleveland.com
* * *
No need to search for the damaging impact of gerrymandering on Google, team. Just take a look at what's happening in Mississippi, Ohio, Tennessee, and Florida. Conservative extremists are advancing dangerous legislation that ignores voters, and doing everything they can to protect their political power.
The outpour of these anti-democratic tactics happens when states operate under gerrymandered districts and voters are denied a fair shot to make their voices heard.
**[All On The Line needs support from folks like you to fight back against gerrymandering in 2023 and beyond. I’ll give you a quick heads-up: You’re going to be seeing plenty of headlines about Nevada’s 2024 Senate race. Nevada is as swingy as swing-states come these days. After all, just last year, Senator Catherine Cortez Masto won it by less than 1 percent — less than 10,000 votes. Senator Jacky Rosen is up for re-election next year. Republicans will dump buckets of money into the state to try to flip this seat, take back the Senate, and push their extreme, far-right agenda. We’ve got to stop them. >
When I first met Jacky Rosen, I knew she had the fight in her to do something great.
She hasn’t had anything handed to her. She worked as a cocktail waitress to help put herself through college, and when she started as a computer programmer, she worked as a banquet waitress on the side to pay the bills.
Now she’s a force to be reckoned with in Washington — fighting for affordable health care, protections for Nevada’s beautiful natural environment (a place Bruce and I love to go hiking), and more.
She’s also committed to fighting for the right to an abortion. Just one example: After right-wing extremists on the Supreme Court overturned Roe, we called on the Department of Veterans Affairs to start offering abortion care — and they began offering abortion services.
I’d be very happy to continue serving alongside her. And we can’t let her be replaced by a member of the anti-abortion rights, corporation-coddling, Social-Security-and-Medicare-threatening GOP. But she’s going to have a hard-fought re-election race in Nevada.
Last year, this team came together and pitched in to re-elect Catherine Cortez Masto. It was incredible, and it helped protect and expand our Democratic majority. Now let’s come together and pitch in to re-elect another great Democratic woman senator from Nevada.
If you’re able to support Jacky Rosen today, you’ll be getting in on the ground floor of the next big competitive Senate race. And every time you see another headline about how it’s a toss-up, you’ll know you made a contribution early — when it could go the furthest to help plan for the rest of the campaign.
[_**Please pitch in with a split donation to Jacky Rosen and my re-election campaigns — and let’s win these races side by side.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61825837/401332944/1789514515?amount=3&refcode=EMZ13C_TAN_E_20230414_V1S2_F&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTI5NWE2ZS04ZGRiLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7vMab74tJYqLWrEhvJC_Jc9w3bDtHeMUqrFgjE2g8u4=)
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Ambushed and assaulted

body:
There is a disturbing trend on the left

| | | [](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79886%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hCd2%2bt5dKs3ldmSaPYa7sg&sysid=1)
---
Fellow American,

There is a disturbing trend on the left-- Transgender activists are increasingly emboldened to attack those who oppose them. Time after time, we watch the left enable the rhetoric and justify the violence-- **ENOUGH IS ENOUGH!** This weekend, I was ambushed and assaulted by a transgender activist after speaking to a group of students at San Francisco State University. Students gathered wanting to hear the pro-woman side of the sports debate but were impeded by transgender activists, shouting, cursing, and threatening. This left-wing intimidation campaign won’t work! This is only more evidence that I’m fighting the good fight, and proof that women need sex-protected spaces! I know what I'm doing is right. When they want you silent, speak louder. I’m on the frontlines fighting for women and girls and speaking TRUTH to all, even those who refuse to hear it. [**Will you step up and stand with me in this fight? Donate to NinePAC and help me continue to speak TRUTH where it's not welcome and FIGHT to protect the future of women's sports!**](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79887%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1vvPJ9qee8x5N3EJCLpO4g&sysid=1)

name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: If I tell you a flea can pull a wagon, then start loading it up.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:

---
Friend, right now, it seems to me like a popular thing in Washington, D.C. is to tell people you’re going to do one thing and then do another. Growing up, my mother would call that fibbing. You might know it as lying. Others might even refer to it as bullcrap.

Frankly, I can’t stand it. I’m not always the smartest guy in the room or the best-looking, but I pride myself on being honest and never giving you the runaround.

**If I tell you a flea can pull a wagon, load it up. **

**_Right now, we’re in an all-out brawl against the Socialist Left for common-sense in our country._**

**I’m happy to be on the front lines every single day fighting to keep your family safe by securing our Southern Border, fighting to keep money in your wallet by helping straighten out the economy, and fighting for your values every day from the Left-of-Lenin Neo-Socialist workers.**

**[All that I ask from you is to have my back. Anything that you can spare today below to help me hit a CRITICAL FUNDRAISING DEADLINE will go miles to help me. I’m counting on you the same way you can always count on me to shoot you straight.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7eboavnm4j94l1omiqscoanbuh0n07npmqvdmuo_rp22sh2s8i66o74clhmcor2cth2bs)** | [**RUSH $500**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn0b6dlt5d9bnd3aimpgrslqgm0slsem47svjpk8_rp22sh2s8i66o74clhmcor2cth2bs)

name: Weiss Ratings
subject: Bank Accounts: Frozen!
body:
The Federal Reserve System Docket No. OP-1670, reveals the plan.

| | | | | Dear Subscriber, In 1990, the Brazilian government froze the bank accounts of thousands of citizens. In 2013, the victims were the people of Cyprus. In 2022, it hit closer to home -- in Canada. The government used its 1988 Emergency Act to freeze the bank accounts of hundreds of striking truckers. Think nothing like this could happen in the United States? If so, think again. |
---
The Federal Reserve System Docket No. OP-1670, reveals the plan.
See front page is right here __
It gives the Fed the power to track and potentially even control your checking account.
Not just the money you have in your account at the moment ...
But also, every single check, withdrawal, deposit~~,~~ and transaction.
Practically everything you do with your money!
[You can find out the eerie details by clicking here.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5656d768554c4b2cab3bcc85837733b3&_e=rvOZtTN-EPxEmO_-w_wBGTsaRQBTybW_x_zgy85UfbwM8c8bc8xjFhrWWjr6RkU8A9w2jM7NkRIZK4ZCzpZ5_aBh0yG3GupEVgCTb8hFwht50i3rUsIg6DoIPAR2wiVJodjTUMeriyVTLr-_bOllmHWMj8CS1GZnYoVglgqz2pg1EslPQpN0-3CBWnbSe8hpX0uj5umNahlts-22BawZSG410Kh-b8wy6rOkaV4Sv--LPDRGxuGKOCMkT106YCZiXJzVkcd8vcFn7YsoiHoWTA%3D%3D)
Be sure to do so with urgency.
A pilot program is already underway.
The next step is to roll it out to nearly every bank in America.
[Click here to learn how to protect your money](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5656d768554c4b2cab3bcc85837733b3&_e=rvOZtTN-EPxEmO_-w_wBGTsaRQBTybW_x_zgy85UfbwM8c8bc8xjFhrWWjr6RkU8A9w2jM7NkRIZK4ZCzpZ5_aBh0yG3GupEVgCTb8hFwht50i3rUsIg6DoIPAR2wiVJLwI5mYHJB5HF3Pjs3zQLVj81INz4YfoJCRCMwU9-5e3dXtsTHDVkV2oppJQI-9KmHhZaWeUHgfrum6pDjiGBwQeCTPwW5ZRM_upHdaUjhyt6pYMRN2lh9h1zNUfAgRHQ7W1FUgotED2Tbpk3g7_KwQ%3D%3D).
Good luck and God bless!

Martin D. Weiss, PhD

subject: How we break the teachers unions’ monopoly
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Federation for Children
body:
These unions are more interested in protecting the status quo and serving their own interests than helping students succeed.

| | |
---
| | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=975cf85292fd4b42976ce8798d72b6b5&_e=fHuEQWtXVJTCih8mGLHFS2vXG2QonTX1cdQE4vGwpIwimo6VCdij1RoYYY6VqZj6qQWoxEcTrF_3OdvGGlTqo8jLoG8TDj_fIk_FWTQ-o4R605U3DEXfGt8EF1PSskwqZECQoXKnFfBjqseLnBAJEg1obTOGuYKV1YE_c6x9wnLccGdNfWlPAbP69h6_M1JtmIeUjAbNrv53mpAIkIX50Mc4WPTrOeh3kz-2wkGffJYrDwHGQE4cI-6RCdvszHz_P0DvOOzcukQwFcGLmPaRNQVxJUU7zEPZIIKMwge0GmrGr_EXkAWZ_ZSOcvrPG3aCNVaLi_vwYarYfR_qDMh9ityzv2Q6rgXgg1N1K6G5kgU%3D)

| | Hi Friend,
I recently spoke with Fox News about the problem with teachers unions, and I didn't hold back. Power-hungry teachers unions consistently fight to trap kids in the failing government schools they staff. Their opposition to parental rights in education has everything to do with maintaining their control over the minds of other people's children. It's all about power. Teachers unions are more interested in protecting the status quo and serving their own interests than helping students succeed. Enough is enough. They've overplayed their hand and now we are freeing families from the clutches of the teachers unions once and for all. At the American Federation for Children, we're taking power over education away from teachers unions and putting it back into the hands of parents one state at a time. Already this year, we've helped deliver HUGE wins in Iowa, Utah, Arkansas, and Florida. clean_body: These unions are more interested in protecting the status quo and serving their own interests than helping students succeed. | | | | | | | Hi Friend, I recently spoke with Fox News about the problem with teachers unions, and I didn't hold back. Power-hungry teachers unions consistently fight to trap kids in the failing government schools they staff. Their opposition to parental rights in education has everything to do with maintaining their control over the minds of other people's children. It's all about power. Teachers unions are more interested in protecting the status quo and serving their own interests than helping students succeed. Enough is enough. They've overplayed their hand and now we are freeing families from the clutches of the teachers unions once and for all. At the American Federation for Children, we're taking power over education away from teachers unions and putting it back into the hands of parents one state at a time. Already this year, we've helped deliver HUGE wins in Iowa, Utah, Arkansas, and Florida. | | | | | | | | | | Your contribution will help ensure every family has access to quality education options and every child can reach their full potential. Thank you, Corey DeAngelis, Senior Fellow American Federation for Children | | | | | | | | | | Paid for by American Federation for Children Contributions or gifts to the American Federation of Children are not tax deductible as charitable contributions. | | American Federation for Children 5950 Berkshire Lane, Suite 325 Dallas, TX 75225 | | | | Please see a brief message from the American Federation for Children (AFC): This is a prospecting message not affiliated with this list and is not meant to be an endorsement or opposition towards AFC Reclaiming American Freedom 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: "The Genesis Story" Online Course Now on DVD
body:
Hillsdale College's popular online course, "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," is available on DVD.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bdfca4cd2f2a43078b76d061ff46670b&_e=c_8lL3Sw6K-4oPmIkMKhqC7DOgt5AV4zSUQhWpsyoC2vtUH3_WTacJ7BH4_PCwnZNLZDlHY1pu4qZdjlzEN154Vlatjly2DIlbKsuqhEhq5jbJFlkxIFaxJaFWu4wczq1YYOVSRuCaOLELf7jaP0Zz3iyEl5dowZVtHQesjddVEkXwyb9oEnzIAXdOBt8lVbvfeH9vnli28UC0IoY3WyvYRZc88Fl-Mm1XccIKYgMXOSAmiYUTOkW4Wh6aIenwLFZ_OmvtOd47rHtFhl4osJvJR56ZkVzX0Nhd1wCTgjClHQ0rs_lBWqStc87vTHCL2X6WjFkIIb2hY4tT9HNVgIWKNYZZTJIMAdtKou98_xUAWF4JqcavMUjExbgRFw_-hHu6CizThyaK_JUcpCuC_EVw%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

I hope you're having a good day. I'm writing with some exciting news.

Hillsdale College's popular online course, **" The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives,"** is available on DVD.

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bdfca4cd2f2a43078b76d061ff46670b&_e=c_8lL3Sw6K-4oPmIkMKhqC7DOgt5AV4zSUQhWpsyoC2vtUH3_WTacJ7BH4_PCwnZNLZDlHY1pu4qZdjlzEN154Vlatjly2DIlbKsuqhEhq5jbJFlkxIFaxJaFWu4wczq1YYOVSRuCaOLELf7jaP0Zz3iyEl5dowZVtHQesjddVEkXwyb9oEnzIAXdOBt8lVbvfeH9vnli28UC0IoY3WyvYRZc88Fl-Mm1XccIKYgMXOxBp47QR579ac0BYWL6B05iZtfi4R55Y4Wz3QgOaFSpW1o9nxjlVJb4Ryy6OZ27lnZAClkOHE_ztvW5OnEX6ARk8u3XJciepg50oblPYyZtherQmxm1GVbH18eR-GMeHfskIzm7jCM2qplKFcvqal31Y_d3ZKssQ8u0y5gyDZZoA%3D%3D)In this six-lecture course, you'll explore some of the major themes of Genesis, including the complex relationship between God and man, and what it reveals about divine and human nature.

"The Genesis Story" is taught by Hillsdale College professor of English Justin Jackson, who has taught the subject to undergraduate students here at the College for 15 years. This course aims to deepen a student's theological understanding of the Old Testament by revealing the literary beauty and complexity of the text.

The course begins with a lecture and introduction by the President of Hillsdale College, Dr. Larry P. Arnn, in which he explains why we teach the Book of Genesis at Hillsdale College and why it's important to both faith and higher education.
Then, Dr. Jackson explains the four relationships that dominate the Book of Genesis: God and creation, God and man, man and man, and man and creation.

These relationships are explored in the narratives of Adam and Eve, Abraham and Sarah, Abraham and Isaac, Jacob and Esau, and finally, Joseph.

This course on DVD is perfect for viewing in your home with your family or for use in small groups such as Bible studies and book clubs.

**For your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of Hillsdale College, you 'll receive the DVD as our thank you.**

To receive your Genesis DVD box set or to give it as a gift, please use the secure link here: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-genesis](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bdfca4cd2f2a43078b76d061ff46670b&_e=c_8lL3Sw6K-4oPmIkMKhqC7DOgt5AV4zSUQhWpsyoC2vtUH3_WTacJ7BH4_PCwnZNLZDlHY1pu4qZdjlzEN154Vlatjly2DIlbKsuqhEhq5jbJFlkxIFaxJaFWu4wczq1YYOVSRuCaOLELf7jaP0Zz3iyEl5dowZVtHQesjddVEkXwyb9oEnzIAXdOBt8lVbvfeH9vnli28UC0IoY3WyvYRZc88Fl-Mm1XccIKYgMXOJVUFbYUrPN_pGRuSf-Zegu2jDqc0bYwbwEXWpBIG91D7YQQyRCxfAeYLlYd1CSNV1877PwRnbyV3Tz9yxeNWT8kjG-2zMQpNnbQvRhZF7GxgPKgERMq_Sx1fG4oW4aU4HwfUm-6u43ruCJkqT6pUYZRp_THrBsbVo_MleOqq3YA%3D%3D)**

As you know, Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of state and federal government funding--even indirectly through student loans and grants. That's why your support is so crucial.

Your gift helps expand Hillsdale College's national educational outreach efforts to educate millions of Americans nationwide, including our nation's youth. Your gift will also help to:
* Increase the number of students taking free online courses, such as "Genesis."
* Expand the readership of _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty.
* Establish and guide classical K-12 schools nationwide and provide, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.
* Promote the principles of American constitutionalism through social media and the radio.

Friend, please use the secure link above to make a $100 contribution in support of Hillsdale's educational outreach, and explore the beauty of the first book of the Bible with your new DVD set of **" The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives."**

Warm regards,

Bill Gray
Class of 2001
Vice President
National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
---

Conservative Liberty Wire
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=bdfca4cd2f2a43078b76d061ff46670b&_t=iQa6zOZM6VM_BkuLUB6LDoMA7mlHj8zH5SRnKY7VoIK4luRJZDwlsHJ0FYYNN03OS18pnY2y7CdeTFXQDww2WXy-OAfIDj6ZIC7Czc2zQwjB6l9Jxd-ojbUtHyrN-tMQHpNuU7E9vKeBZk8Ixhnp6R4QshiNwVxPdsXmGI_46b0%3D)

name: Margaret Mary Dunn
subject: Life in prison for doing his job?
body:
I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael.

I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael.

Michael is a police officer who dedicated his life to keeping our community safe in Farmers Branch, Texas.

_**But now he might be facing a life sentence in prison for shooting a dangerous career criminal who tried to run Michael down in a stolen truck.**_

[**Will you help my son?**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3455434fbeb64366929eeefa482d45fe&_e=iTxJnADaxgSCeOpejwKXbj643qTuKhRsmpJ__e_gEhSvEOovH0jv6l87IFR9kWL2VTKGyo1V4VXZkbrXDJ4dgleiBPPUnEA_gvrz2Z4cYkUQ10B_kmwOpXt2LpLSGTC_SC6i4OgIt5jjdR0oYNtncu2yrd_O0e5P5cUgrvgfxaVWk40z8WTyoEfDcXvDoMOhsKT5mQjC4rgHisj4bZB9bXUFU6CXGuYrQiZ3FM-40VzcAeQCuED0UZMmm5aWHjAMXfXwwYtD_fg2VL-6YbLFDZYgI4qoa48qehNA2nyr4eAt941mcYhDUMNZxhycPBEIqph31TIejT0DMIzII9F8v065v_RK4M-FM52jceamGj0%3D)

That's Michael in the photo.

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3455434fbeb64366929eeefa482d45fe&_e=iTxJnADaxgSCeOpejwKXbj643qTuKhRsmpJ__e_gEhSvEOovH0jv6l87IFR9kWL2VTKGyo1V4VXZkbrXDJ4dgleiBPPUnEA_gvrz2Z4cYkUQ10B_kmwOpXt2LpLSGTC_SC6i4OgIt5jjdR0oYNtncu2yrd_O0e5P5cUgrvgfxaVWk40z8WTyoEfDcXvDoMOhp-7QTH5tGbt25D1qlZtG1seKvOA3gpITP9P-9Iak3J2aexq2Fsa0DhoDCyxBMUsupZmguaoHOEtbHdSL1wr1YWhYGZcqVAqwe_sJ1NZIZJRh5iQv_pgRiFwt_pJZRhaB4rJQndz8aGbkZd7weMxzrzPn6P6o_k_W_KVk3_d-Cv4%3D) [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3455434fbeb64366929eeefa482d45fe&_e=iTxJnADaxgSCeOpejwKXbj643qTuKhRsmpJ__e_gEhSvEOovH0jv6l87IFR9kWL2VTKGyo1V4VXZkbrXDJ4dgleiBPPUnEA_gvrz2Z4cYkUQ10B_kmwOpXt2LpLSGTC_SC6i4OgIt5jjdR0oYNtncu2yrd_O0e5P5cUgrvgfxaVWk40z8WTyoEfDcXvDoMOhpnSDt3DcCL7gECnY0EpgvImohXYZci3NoLapKWBpIrjnPUcaAv6Nz2DoCUe2UL36vxeOzO2XRcJYkGLL_1LwtBQFnD6G2yRkY18pPMmXyCtM-mlI4kF9flr1egrHowkA0VGAdEKl4tFdS-zlO-Xju84oMX3QjcXmBpaK963IwQg%3D)

In addition to being a police officer, Michael is also a Master Gunnery Sergeant in the United Stated Marine Corps Reserve.

I knew when he joined the police department that it was a dangerous job.

Every night on the news I saw another story of a police officer ambushed or killed in the line of duty.

It's been a heart wrenching time for the families of police officers in recent years.

What I didn't expect was that so many Americans would turn their backs on Michael in his time of need.

I now realize that it's all about fear. Fear of being attacked as a racist.

Fear of going against woke politicians and bureaucrats.

Fear of losing their jobs.

I assumed that the police department, the prosecutor's office, and everyone else in the government and the community would have Michael's back.

**But I was wrong.**

_So_ _now_ _Michael 's_ _life_ _is_ _at_ _stake_ _for_ _simply_ _doing_ _his_ _job_ _and_ _we_ _have_ _nobody_ _to_ _turn_ _to_ _except_ _for_ _good_ _hearted_ _strangers_ _like_ _you._

**[Will you please help me save my son Michael?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3455434fbeb64366929eeefa482d45fe&_e=iTxJnADaxgSCeOpejwKXbj643qTuKhRsmpJ__e_gEhSvEOovH0jv6l87IFR9kWL2VTKGyo1V4VXZkbrXDJ4dgleiBPPUnEA_gvrz2Z4cYkUQ10B_kmwOpXt2LpLSGTC_SC6i4OgIt5jjdR0oYNtncu2yrd_O0e5P5cUgrvgfxaVWk40z8WTyoEfDcXvDoMOhN7o3gAdM1VSLOa9uD76MOR7_w1R1B0ZKTSiQ_uk00Nkiq0ea4Tjb9R6rZs6-DK3kmZn7H3Sr08cmYEqr8S5IQsPcbVoJ9c9zBSjjSmlEsbnR4ax8h1onRL0YUSI1JWmVbAD6y7145rP9ecfJuJtx5lVqOinDkv-yEzyHPOxaXmQ%3D)**

Let me give you some more of the details...

Michael and other Farmers Branch Police detectives tracked a stolen pickup truck to the parking lot of an "adult arcade."

The truck was stolen by a convicted felon who was well-known to the police.

Michael was assigned the task of arresting this man.

When the suspect came back to the truck, Michael pulled up and stepped out of his police car.

The criminal sped the stolen truck toward him.

Michael had to do what every police officer hopes they never have to do: he drew his weapon and fired.

The man driving the stolen truck died at the scene.

My son suffered back and leg injuries.

Michael had a split-second to think about if the career criminal speeding toward him was going to crush him to death with that stolen truck.

In that split-second, he did what he needed to do in order to save his own life and the lives of his fellow officers and community.

There's no doubt in my mind, and many others, that Michael made the right choice that day.

He should be considered a hero for putting his life on the line to protect others.

But right and wrong seem to have been turned upside down in the last few years.

Why else would they be trying to put my son in prison for murder for what he did?

That's why I'm willing to do whatever it takes to clear his name. **[Even if that means asking folks like you for financial support to help my son afford the best possible attorneys and legal advice.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3455434fbeb64366929eeefa482d45fe&_e=iTxJnADaxgSCeOpejwKXbj643qTuKhRsmpJ__e_gEhSvEOovH0jv6l87IFR9kWL2VTKGyo1V4VXZkbrXDJ4dgleiBPPUnEA_gvrz2Z4cYkUQ10B_kmwOpXt2LpLSGTC_SC6i4OgIt5jjdR0oYNtncu2yrd_O0e5P5cUgrvgfxaVWk40z8WTyoEfDcXvDoMOhenX5RlXidYvTOj5NgUc9xlbV0DldD_qgjt6LRl30NzsO2l4KjPBkUrU2OM2ZjIsfrgmPyCSb0R-Trz5fSKaFmvEy13DGf5OF1PSwbytuVhnDcol5GZy8yU1V1gGrrAUnIkiPHe3cqXSHsHwR77JnDx-XN-4Ou7koAkShbdNZGOs%3D)**

After the incident, Michael was distraught to hear the criminal died.

But the other officers assured him the shooting was justified.

And then our whole world was rocked.

**Just 8 days after the incident Michael was indicted.**

Experts described the indictment as "unusually swift." The president of the Dallas Police Association said:

"We have never had an investigation completed in less than eight days ready to hand over to the District Attorney. Never."

I knew in my heart something was wrong - and we would be facing the fight of our lives to defend Michael in court.

We started a fundraising campaign on the internet site "GoFundMe" to raise money for a proper legal defense.

After a few days, "GoFundMe" shut down the fundraiser.

They claimed Michael's actions as a police officer were an "act of hate" - and helping him violated their terms of service.

So in this anti-police climate, politically woke climate, the case was closed in their minds.

No "innocent until proven guilty." No due process.

Instead, my son was smeared as a "murderer" who committed a "hate crime."

Since then, my husband and I spent half our life savings on legal fees and bills to help Michael.

_With the investigation devastating my family... seeing Michael, an American hero, being smeared on the internet... and our family quickly running out of money to pay mounting court fees... hope was fading._

Until we heard about the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). **LELDF is the best friend a police officer could ever have.**

LELDF defends good officers, like my son, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.

The group's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.

And praise the Lord, LELDF saw it fit to help my son!

**[Will you please consider sending a tax-deductible contribution to the LELDF so they can help my son beat his charges?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3455434fbeb64366929eeefa482d45fe&_e=iTxJnADaxgSCeOpejwKXbj643qTuKhRsmpJ__e_gEhSvEOovH0jv6l87IFR9kWL2VTKGyo1V4VXZkbrXDJ4dgleiBPPUnEA_gvrz2Z4cYkUQ10B_kmwOpXt2LpLSGTC_SC6i4OgIt5jjdR0oYNtncu2yrd_O0e5P5cUgrvgfxaVWk40z8WTyoEfDcXvDoMOhprhEpO0T6wBaHTUqooi5Iumj3pDkVCB0W1LuXEDB6zkAXGnXxRGG4QjWEswqDquwDqGO2eatIe6Yo9DEIuIzCA8xghCveQC_z3GvdguPzut7sXTKZCD-FwYn9ZZ0_Yg6h6mbz8RLHGd1aU0AfkWz5Vq6dk1MpDgUtx3_4jNbqhc%3D)**

You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. It doesn't receive any funds from the government to help our police officers.

Or, if the Lord has blessed you with the means to help with a **[gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more,](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3455434fbeb64366929eeefa482d45fe&_e=iTxJnADaxgSCeOpejwKXbj643qTuKhRsmpJ__e_gEhSvEOovH0jv6l87IFR9kWL2VTKGyo1V4VXZkbrXDJ4dgleiBPPUnEA_gvrz2Z4cYkUQ10B_kmwOpXt2LpLSGTC_SC6i4OgIt5jjdR0oYNtncu2yrd_O0e5P5cUgrvgfxaVWk40z8WTyoEfDcXvDoMOhoAhsexCXa00xjA5Ek3FCZUi2Sx776Vi9QU3Cj3SB-qbQMNEE0f-HjdBVCpMjDOMKzuLXeGf4db9nLAlLmvUI2UQlyyNtRX8RE2dLv2FeLkanEQHlnIV6lfa3P3_yQ_floFEGSdJtNf1FRbb0cPoRglBDBUEZB1Meey2DnXYgoAE%3D)** I pray you will consider doing so.

Please know any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing.

If you can't help financially today, I understand. And please keep Michael and our family in your prayers.

My son Michael is an American hero who served our nation and his community. He shouldn't be locked behind bars for defending his life from a career criminal.

_That's a picture of Michael with his daughter - my granddaughter - Mary-Kaitlyn_

clean_body: I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael. I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael. Michael is a police officer who dedicated his life to keeping our community safe in Farmers Branch, Texas. But now he might be facing a life sentence in prison for shooting a dangerous career criminal who tried to run Michael down in a stolen truck. That's Michael in the photo. In addition to being a police officer, Michael is also a Master Gunnery Sergeant in the United Stated Marine Corps Reserve. I knew when he joined the police department that it was a dangerous job. Every night on the news I saw another story of a police officer ambushed or killed in the line of duty. It's been a heart wrenching time for the families of police officers in recent years. What I didn't expect was that so many Americans would turn their backs on Michael in his time of need. I now realize that it's all about fear. Fear of being attacked as a racist. Fear of going against woke politicians and bureaucrats. Fear of losing their jobs. I assumed that the police department, the prosecutor's office, and everyone else in the government and the community would have Michael's back. But I was wrong. So now Michael 's life is at stake for simply doing his job and we have nobody to turn to except for good hearted strangers like you. Let me give you some more of the details... Michael and other Farmers Branch Police detectives tracked a stolen pickup truck to the parking lot of an "adult arcade." The truck was stolen by a convicted felon who was well-known to the police. Michael was assigned the task of arresting this man. When the suspect came back to the truck, Michael pulled up and stepped out of his police car. The criminal sped the stolen truck toward him. Michael had to do what every police officer hopes they never have to do: he drew his weapon and fired. The man driving the stolen truck died at the scene. My son suffered back and leg injuries. Michael had a split-second to think about if the career criminal speeding toward him was going to crush him to death with that stolen truck. In that split-second, he did what he needed to do in order to save his own life and the lives of his fellow officers and community. There's no doubt in my mind, and many others, that Michael made the right choice that day. He should be considered a hero for putting his life on the line to protect others. But right and wrong seem to have been turned upside down in the last few years. Why else would they be trying to put my son in prison for murder for what he did? That's why I'm willing to do whatever it takes to clear his name. After the incident, Michael was distraught to hear the criminal died. But the other officers assured him the shooting was justified. And then our whole world was rocked. Just 8 days after the incident Michael was indicted. Experts described the indictment as "unusually swift." The president of the Dallas Police Association said: "We have never had an investigation completed in less than eight days ready to hand over to the District Attorney. Never." I knew in my heart something was wrong - and we would be facing the fight of our lives to defend Michael in court. We started a fundraising campaign on the internet site "GoFundMe" to raise money for a proper legal defense. After a few days, "GoFundMe" shut down the fundraiser. They claimed Michael's actions as a police officer were an "act of hate" - and helping him violated their terms of service. So in this anti-police climate, politically woke climate, the case was closed in their minds. No "innocent until proven guilty." No due process. Instead, my son was smeared as a "murderer" who committed a "hate crime." Since then, my husband and I spent half our life savings on legal fees and bills to help Michael. With the investigation devastating my family... seeing Michael, an American hero, being smeared on the internet... and our family quickly running out of money to pay mounting court fees... hope was fading. Until we heard about the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). LELDF is the best friend a police officer could ever have. LELDF defends good officers, like my son, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty. The group's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department. And praise the Lord, LELDF saw it fit to help my son! You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. It doesn't receive any funds from the government to help our police officers. Or, if the Lord has blessed you with the means to help with a I pray you will consider doing so. Please know any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing. If you can't help financially today, I understand. And please keep Michael and our family in your prayers. My son Michael is an American hero who served our nation and his community. He shouldn't be locked behind bars for defending his life from a career criminal. That's a picture of Michael with his daughter - my granddaughter - Mary-Kaitlyn That's a picture of Michael with his Son - my grandson - William I pray you never go through something like this. But if you do, may God touch the hearts of kind people to help you - just as I'm praying He'll touch your heart to help my son today. Sincerely, Margaret Mary Dunn PS: LELDF relies on caring people like you to send donations so they can fight tooth and nail to help wrongly-accused police officers like Michael. And because LELDF is a non-profit, all donations are tax-deductible. Your kind to help Michael will mean so much to my family. \---------------- More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit www.leldf.org. And remember - Blue Lives Matter! (C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | www.PoliceDefense.org 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

Since then, Nikki’s had a jam-packed schedule, and this week was no exception. In just two months, Nikki has held 33 political events all across the country, proving once again that no one will outwork Nikki Haley. This week, Nikki wrapped up her latest Iowa swing where she stopped in six cities, met with hundreds of voters and dozens of farmers, launched the Women for Nikki coalition, and made friends with the cutest little piglet. Nikki is headed back to New Hampshire at the end of this month to host multiple town halls in Bedford, Henniker, and Laconia. Take a look at this week's highlights. IOWA RECAP: https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=e20eb8b4ebbb5d16615d49d6ce74cda180c7524f534c14bfd8ed3cfb0cbb5bed6d261d07545c8296f36d31180e5c3755f3dd36b68c1f23a2140d1b40c0c86fc3 https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=e20eb8b4ebbb5d16615d49d6ce74cda180c7524f534c14bfd8ed3cfb0cbb5bed6d261d07545c8296f36d31180e5c3755f3dd36b68c1f23a2140d1b40c0c86fc3 >" alias="WATCH NOW. >>" conversion="false" data-linkto="https://">WATCH NOW. >> Day One – Salix, IA Town Hall Sioux City Journal: “At Salix campaign event, Haley addresses China, national debt, education” ( https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=e20eb8b4ebbb5d1683db7539f66e3d1179acefaa0442858c683333cf0f2c2f773a82fe0c6ea8b418aa300089db9964b17e13a782816d2fb1f0469f37ff18a8a9 Sioux City Journal, 4/12/23) KCAU: “GOP presidential candidate Nikki Haley is currently meeting with voters in Salix. A large crowd started gathering more than an hour before the former Ambassador to the United Nations arrived.” ( https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=e20eb8b4ebbb5d16273d7398d30afabad7e37922a1cda800fc6c1dd3d09875380bba50029b33bf2a8dd621d451c971fa701c3a4dd4540f1ecdc770eae9746057 KCAU , 4/10/23) Rep. Randy Feenstra: “Beating Joe Biden starts with the #IaCaucus! I’m excited to have @NikkiHaley with me this week traveling #IA04 where Faith, Family and Conservative Values make our state strong!” ( https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=e20eb8b4ebbb5d16abaf1970adc11301c4b45e2bae1f58d281ba9c298bb19def5b1bd300eaa2186c3e4088de7edfa0777f4ca86a77cfbecaa820c3f1b6d5cb34 Twitter , 4/10/23) Day Two – Denison, Storm Lake, Newell, and Fort Dodge KCCI: “She [Haley] plans to set herself apart from other republicans with a grassroots campaign. ‘No one will outwork me in this race, no one. No one will outsmart me in this race. I will tell you, you’re not going to see me come in, do a rally and leave. You’re going to see me here over and over and over again.’ Haley visited Denison, Storm Lake Newell, and Fort Dodge this week.” ( https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=e20eb8b4ebbb5d16435bb3a9d4adff02a8ddbe9acb0eae2dafb5f35f0488b3d52dbc127abec63c49e5e79b63b9abc5924ee57f4833eb45527bfc9964d32c36b4 KCCI , 4/12/23) The Messenger: “Haley is the first presidential hopeful to visit Fort Dodge in advance of the 2024 caucuses.” ( https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=e20eb8b4ebbb5d164248dd119c2b6692f9160a63e2e89f07b2d473c4f7ea3d2f421d169637c805c7184858fae6eb6015d1d3b54f9e811d07626b2f3b40dc55b6 The Messenger, 4/12/23) Sen. Joni Ernst: “Great to be with my friends @RandyFeenstra and @NikkiHaley!
