| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf6fb9d1b-d560-453f-95e0-fd432f23db69/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---

---

name: Courier Newsroom
subject: Got a minute, Peter?
body:
We know it’s the weekend, so we’ll cut right to it.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=860%2E120351%2ESbmO4s)
Hey Peter — we know it’s the weekend, so we’ll cut right to it.

We’re just over $2,500 away from our fundraising goal, with less than 12 hours to get there. **That means:**
[**If 250 of our dedicated supporters chip in $10, we’ll smash through our critical goal and close our budget gap. There’s a lot of money and power behind bad information (we’ll get to that in a second), but our work is powered by grassroots supporters like you, Peter. If you can, please chip in $10 now:**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3660?refcode=em-20230415&t=2&akid=860%2E120351%2ESbmO4s)
**[Chip in $10 »](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3660?refcode=em-20230415&t=3&akid=860%2E120351%2ESbmO4s)**
Peter, right-wing bad actors like Tucker Carlson, Fox News — even Joe Rogan — aren’t putting the best interests of their viewers and our democracy first. For them, it’s all about profit. **Just take a look at the numbers:**
Carlson’s show, Tucker Carlson Tonight, which has championed Trump’s Big Lie and spews divisive, hateful rhetoric is estimated to generate **over $1 billion** in ads revenue for Fox News.1
And Joe Rogan, whose podcast has been a deep source of COVID misinformation reaching millions of listeners, is estimated to earn **$100,000** per episode.2
Peter, the numbers make it clear: for these bad actors, it’s in their best interest to spread sensational and controversial news — **even at the expense of the truth.**
**That means it’s up to local newsrooms like us to set the record straight.** At Courier Newsroom, we never put profit before the truth. Our local newsrooms are fighting the misinformation these bad actors create in real time, but to go up against these media giants, we need your support to keep doing it.
[**Closing our $2,500 fundraising gap is critical to keeping the lights on in our newsrooms, hiring more talented and dedicated reports, and powering our work. So we’re asking one last time: will you chip in $10 now?**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3660?refcode=em-20230415&t=4&akid=860%2E120351%2ESbmO4s)
**[Chip in $10 »](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3660?refcode=em-20230415&t=5&akid=860%2E120351%2ESbmO4s)**
Thanks so much,
Everyone at Courier Newsroom
1 - [Forbes](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3661?t=6&akid=860%2E120351%2ESbmO4s)
2 - [Podcast Rocket](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3662?t=7&akid=860%2E120351%2ESbmO4s)

**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=8&refcode2=860_120351_SbmO4s&akid=860%2E120351%2ESbmO4s)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=860%2E120351%2ESbmO4s)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

We’re just over $2,500 away from our fundraising goal, with less than 12 hours to get there. That means: Peter, right-wing bad actors like Tucker Carlson, Fox News — even Joe Rogan — aren’t putting the best interests of their viewers and our democracy first. For them, it’s all about profit. Just take a look at the numbers: Carlson’s show, Tucker Carlson Tonight, which has championed Trump’s Big Lie and spews divisive, hateful rhetoric is estimated to generate over $1 billion in ads revenue for Fox News.1 And Joe Rogan, whose podcast has been a deep source of COVID misinformation reaching millions of listeners, is estimated to earn $100,000 per episode.2 Peter, the numbers make it clear: for these bad actors, it’s in their best interest to spread sensational and controversial news — even at the expense of the truth. That means it’s up to local newsrooms like us to set the record straight. At Courier Newsroom, we never put profit before the truth. Our local newsrooms are fighting the misinformation these bad actors create in real time, but to go up against these media giants, we need your support to keep doing it. Thanks so much, Everyone at Courier Newsroom 1 - 2 - Email us: mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com

name: Cori Bush
subject: I’m hoping you can help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Are you with me?
#
Hi Peter — it’s Cori.
Our mid-April fundraising deadline is tonight at midnight, and my team just told me we’re **$5,201** from where we need to be at this point in the month.
**I’m reaching out because I’m hoping you could help us catch up, Peter.[If you’re in a place to do so, you can chip in by clicking here. No matter the amount, every donation is powerful, and I’m deeply grateful to have your support.**](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230415-1.ahpmmS&refcode=em20230415-2518&t=1&akid=2518%2E1082990%2EZhYLrI)
**[Donate $5](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230415-1.ahpmmS&amount=5&refcode=em20230415-2518&t=20&akid=2518%2E1082990%2EZhYLrI)**
I know you've received a lot of emails from my team lately, but the truth is our campaign relies on grassroots donations from emails just like this one to fund our year-round campaign, invest in the tools we need to grow our movement, and continue to build momentum around our people-first agenda.
**We don't accept a single cent from corporate PACs, and unlike many of my colleagues in Congress — I don't rely on billionaires to fund my work.**
It's because of your support that we're making historic progress pushing the needle on issues including racial justice, workers' rights, health care, and so much more.
Right now, your $5 donation will make a powerful difference in helping us close our $5,201 fundraising gap. **That’s why I’m asking:**
**[If you’re with me in this work to transform our politics and bring transformative change to our communities, can I count on you to donate $5 or more today? I can’t do this alone.](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230415-1.ahpmmS&amount=5&refcode=em20230415-2518&t=21&akid=2518%2E1082990%2EZhYLrI)**
Thank you for all your support today and every day, Peter.
Your Congresswoman loves you,
Cori

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-20230415-1?refcode=em20230415-2518-footer&t=22&refcode2=2518_1082990_ZhYLrI&akid=2518%2E1082990%2EZhYLrI) **
---
Follow us on **[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/VoteCoriBush/)** , **[Twitter](https://twitter.com/CoriBush)** , **[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/coribush/)** , and **[visit our website](https://coribush.org/)**. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.

Friend, in 2022, with the odds stacked against us, Democrats made history by holding down and expanding our Senate majority. **After the conservative Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade in June, and Republicans started threatening a national abortion ban, we knew we couldn't rest for a second.**

Now, the GOP has taken back the House, and they're using their power at every level of government to attack our fundamental rights. Just last week, a Trump-appointed federal judge in Texas overturned FDA approval of mifepristone, the most commonly used method of abortion in America.

And now, Florida Governor Ron DeSantis is on the verge of signing a bill to ban abortion after just six weeks – a point at which most women don't even know they are pregnant.

**Let me be perfectly clear: They will not stop until abortion is outlawed in America.**
We need to get to work today if we want to have a chance at protecting our reproductive rights and holding Republicans accountable for their blatant attacks on our fundamental freedoms.

Our membership numbers will help determine whether or not we're able to keep control of the Senate and the White House and flip the House to stop a national abortion ban. I need you to stand with me and American Bridge to defeat the Republicans who are on a warpath to ban abortion nationwide.
**[Please, friend, help me reach our goal of activating 1,000 new April Democratic Memberships by midnight. Rush $25 right now. body:
Our team needs to register as many voters as possible by May 1.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61846953/401400731/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230415VoterReg_N_TEAM_90DO_3_G_B_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNiODliOGVhLWIwZGItZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pP9UXgH7SRmGNa86SA6ENXeih7wuKi1xBtNDkkS7AAw=)
| Fellow activist,

May 1, the deadline to register voters ahead of the May 16 primary election, is getting closer and closer. While we have been out on the ground across the Commonwealth since January registering voters in our centered communities, we need to expand our efforts and pack even more community events and canvasses into these next 16 days. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61846954/401400732/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230415VoterReg_N_TEAM_90DO_3_G_B_G1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNiODliOGVhLWIwZGItZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pP9UXgH7SRmGNa86SA6ENXeih7wuKi1xBtNDkkS7AAw=) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61846955/401400733/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230415VoterReg_N_TEAM_90DO_3_G_B_G2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNiODliOGVhLWIwZGItZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pP9UXgH7SRmGNa86SA6ENXeih7wuKi1xBtNDkkS7AAw=)

Community events and voter registration drives like these are vital to our community outreach – and they’re one of the main ways we turn your donations directly into voter outreach, engagement, and registration. Just this week, our Regional Organizing Director from Philadelphia, Carrie Fowler, registered 14 high school seniors who will be eligible to vote in the May 16 primary election! **[With the voter registration deadline right around the corner, we can’t wait until the end of the month to hit our fundraising goals – we need to start nearing our $4,000 end-of-month goal ASAP. clean_body: Our team needs to register as many voters as possible by May 1. = | Fellow activist, May 1, the deadline to register voters ahead of the May 16 primary election, is getting closer and closer. While we have been out on the ground across the Commonwealth since January registering voters in our centered communities, we need to expand our efforts and pack even more community events and canvasses into these next 16 days. = = Community events and voter registration drives like these are vital to our community outreach – and they’re one of the main ways we turn your donations directly into voter outreach, engagement, and registration. Just this week, our Regional Organizing Director from Philadelphia, Carrie Fowler, registered 14 high school seniors who will be eligible to vote in the May 16 primary election! = = We know and have witnessed the ways in which underrepresented and often neglected young, immigrant, Black, Indigenous, and other communities of color have been denied the fundamental right to vote. Events like these are crucial to overcoming those obstacles and tapping into the core of our communities. = = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = In solidarity, Team NPP = | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. We register communities to vote, provide civic education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote in every election. = PA ELECTION DATES : Municipal/Local/Judicial Primary: May 16, 2023 Last day to =: May 1, 2023 Last day to =: May 9, 2023 Municipal/Local/Judicial Election: November 7, 2023 Last day to =: October 23, 2023 Last day to =: October 31, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. name: Team Katie Porter
subject: Good news, bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Tax Day is April 18th.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=21236%2E3422442%2ECvdWvv)
Tax Day is April 18th, and this year, the IRS has the resources to go after ultra-wealthy tax cheats—thanks to legislation Katie pushed for.
**Before this bill was passed, the IRS estimated that we lost $1 trillion a year because of tax evasion from large corporations and some of the very wealthiest individuals.**
**Now House Republicans are trying to rescind this much-needed IRS funding** , but the only group who benefits from an under-funded IRS are big corporations and billionaires who evade taxes. When they avoid taxes, working people are left to pick up the slack, and the Republican bill would add $114 billion(!) to the deficit over ten years.
There’s still so much work to do to improve our tax system: to make sure billionaires pay their fair share, to hold corporations accountable, and to make filing your taxes free and simple. **Katie will always be a voice for working people, not special interests.[Can you chip in $5 today to help take our fight to the Senate?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230415-1?refcode=EMAG15_1_TAX_20230415_V1_F&refcode2=21236_3422442_CvdWvv&akid=21236%2E3422442%2ECvdWvv)**
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230415-1?refcode=EMAG15_1_TAX_20230415_V1_F&refcode2=21236_3422442_CvdWvv&akid=21236%2E3422442%2ECvdWvv)**
Thanks, Derek!
Team Katie Porter
__Because of extreme weather, many Californians don’t have to file until October 16, 2023. Check your eligibility for tax relief in disaster situations[here](https://act.katieporter.com/go/17234?t=2&akid=21236%2E3422442%2ECvdWvv).__

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAG15_1_TAX_20230415_V1_F&t=3&refcode2=21236_3422442_CvdWvv&akid=21236%2E3422442%2ECvdWvv)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=4&akid=21236%2E3422442%2ECvdWvv)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=21236%2E3422442%2ECvdWvv)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616

I’ll keep this short.
My team has reviewed our monthly fundraising data, and unfortunately, we are pacing behind our April goal and have a lot of fundraising ground left to cover.
This is not the news I wanted to share with you today.
The truth is, these fundraising goals are not arbitrary. Every dollar you donate will not only help to continue funding our movement for California families but will help us support Democrats across the country to take back the House majority.

As our nation reels from unending gun violence, Republican Governor Ron DeSantis signed a bill that will allow Floridians to carry concealed guns without a permit. _**No background check.

No training.**_ We don’t need to tell you how dangerous this is. The NRA and MAGA Republicans are not shying away from spreading their “guns everywhere” agenda. And as we approach the 2024 election, they’ll be looking to platform unhinged Republicans like DeSantis.

Stop Gun Violence PAC is fighting back by electing gun safety advocates committed to saving lives. Let’s cut DeSantis’ presidential ambitions short.

But we need to start _**NOW.**_

_**[We need [25] new donors to join Stop Gun Violence PAC in taking on the NRA and their unhinged “guns everywhere” candidates. body:
Let’s be clear: No one is above the law – not even a former president. | | |
---

| Friend
We wanted to let you know that tonight marks the first fundraising deadline of Q2, and we need everyone's help to stay on track for April.
We know times are tough right now. Across America, prices have skyrocketed, forcing millions of families to spend thousands more on goods. So if you don't have the means to donate tonight, don't worry - Soon, we can end the crises and go back to putting America first!
However, if you have the means, let us tell you more about what your donation does for Kat and our team. From the smallest contribution to the highest, your support goes directly to support Kat and her fight to put America First.
Kat's been on the frontlines of nearly every fight, standing up to the Biden Administration's overreach, and becoming a vocal leader in Congress to fight for you, your family, and your rights!
---

Peter,

Five. That's the number of seats Democrats need to flip to take back control of the House:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61849468/401408835/1071353790?refcode=em23_230414_mm2_fndd_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230414_mm2_fndd_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=bd37f16d-b9db-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmQzN2YxNmQtYjlkYi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dBCy8hhAjNMT3i6-xVf9ExwhKHlfATy7mB0PCStBS_8=)

Look, the road ahead in the fight to protect reproductive rights is long, and it won't be an easy one. **But taking back the House is a major first step in continuing to defend the fundamental right to bodily autonomy for millions of Americans.**

While anti-choice legislators and judges continue to prove just how determined they are to lay the groundwork for a total abortion ban, Derek, along with his pro-choice colleagues in the House, will never stop fighting to enshrine the right to reproductive freedom into law. **But Derek needs your support.**

body:
We take feedback from this network very seriously and would sincerely appreciate any input you’re able to provide.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61849530/401408933/1394223873?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230415-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmU1MTQyZDktYjlkYi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=D0q0Yt0MNO8T8-TLqqV0qKAS0-h2q6zscOTqcEQDAYI=)

| Peter,

And $15 could help Adam stand strong against bullies like Donald Trump,

Your donations (just $15 at a time) are helping us overcome the far-right

Will you make a $15 founding donation now to help us kick off the first 15

name: DNC HQ
subject: It’s on us 🤝
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
When you donate now, you'll be automatically entered to win travel, lodging, and admittance to the 2024 Democratic National Convention. And whatever you can give will directly fund the DNC programs that Democratic candidates will rely on to compete and wi | |
---
Derek, We are thrilled to announce that the 2024 Democratic National Convention will be held in Chicago, Illinois! This historic event will showcase the best of our party, and as a vital member of this grassroots team, we want _you_ to be a part of it. **That’s why the DNC is running a special sweepstakes to give you and a friend the opportunity to attend the convention. We’ll cover your travel costs, hotel accommodations, and convention admission fees.** [All you have to do to be automatically entered to win is make a donation of _any_ amount to the DNC today. And the best part is that your contribution will make a huge difference in the work to elect Democrats up and down the ballot. Hi Peter,

I’m reaching out to ask for your help. National Republicans already put me on their top target list going into 2024 and we know they’re getting ready to spend big here in Rhode Island to defeat me and expand their razor-thin House majority.

It’s true. Even though the _GOP’s own, independent research_ verifies that fraud did not play a role in President Biden’s 2020 victory, Donald Trump and his allies are still “addicted” to spreading this false message.

**And even though our movement helped defeat election deniers running for key offices last November, the threat posed by this extreme ideology still persists.**
* In the House of Representatives, a majority of Republican committee chairs are proponents of Donald Trump’s Big Lie.
* In Arizona, defeated GOP candidate Kari Lake has declared herself the “duly elected” governor of the state while attempting to overturn the 2022 election results.
* In states like North Carolina, Ohio, Texas, and others, Republicans are _still_ working to impose onerous new restrictions on voting in the name of combating non-existent voter fraud.

Why is the GOP so committed to bogus voter fraud claims? Attorney General Eric Holder put it perfectly: **“Republicans have accepted that they’re a minority with majority power and they’re okay with not getting votes.”

That’s not democracy, team – quite frankly, it’s the exact opposite.

[_We refuse to sit back while Republicans spread a false narrative to undermine our democracy. That’s why the NDRC is continuing our fight for fairness across the country by working to secure fair maps, protect voting rights, defend our election infrastructure, and more. Biz President, NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 1015 18th Street NW, Suite 1000 Washington, DC 20036 United States ** if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

name: VADEMS
subject: Youngkin: “I don’t have much of an opinion.”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
we need your help protecting abortion in Virginia

|
---
Mifepristone is a critical medication that has been widely used by healthcare professionals for decades — with the stroke of a pen, a Trump-appointed Federal Judge in Texas moved to ban its use. Virginia Governor Glenn Youngkin was asked his opinion on the decision the next day. This was his response: **“I don’t have much of an opinion.”** In yet another example of his lack of leadership, backbone, or empathy, Governor Youngkin has given Virginia voters another proof point of exactly how out of touch he is with his constituents on abortion rights and reproductive healthcare. We probably shouldn’t be surprised, this is a man who hid his extreme stance on abortion during his campaign, got caught on tap admitting he wasn’t sharing his real position with the voters, and promised to “go on offense” to ban abortion in Virginia and since taking office has said he’d sign any abortion ban that comes across his desk into law with a smile. **Glenn Youngkin will ban abortion in Virginia in January 2024 if Virginia Democrats lose in November.** That’s it folks, this is the ball game. Either Democrats win, hold our majority in the State Senate and re-take the House of Delegates, or Virginia Republicans will ban abortion in our Commonwealth. We’re asking you to help us keep Virginia a pro-choice Commonwealth — we’re counting on your support. [**Can you rush a contribution to the Democratic Party of Virginia? name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: NY AG Letitia James is fighting for the good of the country, deposing Trump in a lawsuit to expose his lies, while he stirs up his hateful followers against her. Let’s have her back.
body:
Trump always hated oversight.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0844bd27-686d-4b8c-b8b5-ff5ffe152376/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_Donald Trump had a bad day this week. His lawyers had to drag the befuddled non-billionaire in front of New York Attorney General Letitia James, _**_who from the very beginning courageously pursued the orangina-colored toddler's fraud._ **_James is deposing Trump for a $250MM lawsuit for lying about the value of company properties--hugely inflating them for better loan terms, massively deflating them to rip off NY and dump his tax burden on New York residents._** _So, Trump's mad:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc3bba939-a45f-4bcb-a7c3-7e039351729e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _**Attorney General James refused to back down, even with his attacks and veiled threats against her leading to scores of death threats.**_ [**_Let's get her back, not let Trump end the political career of a talented, young, female, Black AG by making it so hard to campaign in public due to safety risks. Let's give $5, $10, $25 or whatever we can to Attorney General James for her courage in fighting for what's right, even at great personal risk._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8c35bc38-5478-4763-9b58-45e83671c95b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for getting the backs' of those who risk it all for democracy._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. clean_body: Could be the difference in stopping Marjorie Taylor Greene | | | Peter, We’re really confused right now. We know you know that Marjorie Taylor Greene is surging in power, that she’s a potential VP pick for Donald Trump, and that our mid-month deadline just hours from now is a critical juncture in our work to stop her. But, donations are falling flat when they should be surging. And we’re not sure why this is happening. We need to rally right now. If our grassroots team steps up, we can flip the House, boot MTG off her committees, keep the White House, and defeat MTG’s toxic MAGA extremism once and for all. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Let’s do this. –GA Dems | | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. name: Our Revolution
subject: NEWS! Major Race for Philly Mayor, Justin Jones & the Tennessee Three, and more!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

INSIDER NEWS FROM THE FRONTLINES OF THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

HEADLINES: Building Progressive Cities! | New Chicago Mayor Brandon
Johnson | Helen Gym for Philly Mayor! | St. Louis Majority w/ Megan Green
| Sara Innamorato for Allegheny Co Exec | Rep. Justin Jones & OR Nashville
| Bernie ‘Tax the Rich’ Sticker | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

NEW ‘TAX THE RICH’ STICKER

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8608?t=1011&akid=4199%2E5885482%2EdOW23P ][IMG]

NEW STICKER! Tax day is just days away, and Chairman Sanders is taking on
the billionaires — who now pay less in taxes than teachers, baristas, and
the rest of the working class.

It’s absurd that billionaires pay just 3% of their total income in taxes.
This isn’t rocket science, we need to tax the ultra rich and invest in
public education, school meals, child care, and our future!

Get this fresh Bernie sticker when you support our work with a one-time
donation of $10 OR a monthly donation of $5 or more.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8597?t=1012&akid=4199%2E5885482%2EdOW23P ]GET YOUR STICKER

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8608?t=1013&akid=4199%2E5885482%2EdOW23P ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8608?t=1014&akid=4199%2E5885482%2EdOW23P ][IMG]

Progressives won big last week, electing new Chicago Mayor Brandon Johnson
and shoring up our governing majority in St. Louis — and we’re taking that
energy city to city!

“The fact that we were able to out-organize big money with people power
speaks to the growth of the progressive movement as a political force,”
Our Revolution Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8609?t=1015&akid=4199%2E5885482%2EdOW23P ]The Guardian.

Thanks to the surge of support from Our Revolution members and volunteers,
we made nearly half a million voter contacts for our candidates — and it
paid off!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8608?t=1016&akid=4199%2E5885482%2EdOW23P ][IMG]

Former public school teacher Brandon Johnson won on a vision of
co-governance, which is precisely the inside-outside strategy we need for
change.

Outspent 2:1, but with organizing power at his back, Brandon defeated
tough-on-crime school privatizer Paul Vallas by 4 points!

“We were able to show a broader vision of community safety, which means
investment in good schools, mental health, and good jobs,” Joseph said.
“This is the fruit of organizing over multiple election cycles.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4329?t=1017&akid=4199%2E5885482%2EdOW23P ]We’ve got more work to do! Help our team make calls ahead of May 16th
when Helen Gym will be on the ballot for Philly Mayor!

★ ★ ★

NEXT UP, PENNSYLVANIA!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8608?t=1018&akid=4199%2E5885482%2EdOW23P ][IMG]

Our Revolution is shifting our operations to Pennsylvania, where we’re
putting our full support behind Helen Gym in an exciting race for Mayor of
Philadelphia!

A former Philly teacher turned activist for public schools and immigrants
rights, Helen served two terms on city council, where she helped pass fair
work week, eviction diversion, and real material investments in Philly
schools.

Helen has pushed Philadelphia Gas Works to cut ties with industry
lobbyists and transition off fossil fuels faster, and she’d be one of the
nation’s top climate mayors!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8608?t=1019&akid=4199%2E5885482%2EdOW23P ][IMG]

“This isn’t just about Congress, it’s about setting the blueprint for the
country - city by city - and proving we have the kind of vision for our
lives we all deserve!” Helen Gym said on our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8610?t=1020&akid=4199%2E5885482%2EdOW23P ]National Organize-to-Win
Call Monday.

“This work connects all of us together,” she told us. “The fights here in
Philadelphia are echoed throughout the country, and when we win on the
ground in our cities, that’s the blueprint because we cannot wait for
Congress to do what our people need.”

Helen laid out a powerful whole-city vision from guaranteed employment to
transforming education, permanent affordable housing to clean water,
better transit, and green spaces. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8611?t=1021&akid=4199%2E5885482%2EdOW23P ]WATCH HELEN’S CLIP HERE

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8608?t=1022&akid=4199%2E5885482%2EdOW23P ][IMG]

“I hope that, wherever you may be, you’re going to look to Philadelphia
over the next 30 days and you’re going to see a people’s movement really
rise — not just to take on city hall, but the entrenched status quo
politics that have held us down too long,” Helen told us.

Folks, we have a chance to elect a movement leader and longtime ally to
the mayor’s seat in Philadelphia. We did it in Chicago and we can do it
again. Let’s make some calls!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4329?t=1023&akid=4199%2E5885482%2EdOW23P ]PHONEBANK FOR HELEN GYM

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8608?t=1024&akid=4199%2E5885482%2EdOW23P ][IMG]

Our Revolution backed Rep. Sara Innamorato in her run for PA House in 2018
alongside now-US Rep. Summer Lee, and now we’re proud to endorse for
Allegheny County Executive — a key seat in Pittsburgh!

In office, Sara has led dozens of bills for affordable housing, higher
wages, environmental protections, reproductive healthcare, and much more.

At the level of County Exec, she’d have the power to directly affect
people’s lives — from county-wide housing to addressing human rights
violations in the county jail to protecting abortion care.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8608?t=1025&akid=4199%2E5885482%2EdOW23P ][IMG]

“This is the level of government where we take the big ideas and make them
real,” Sara told us on our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8610?t=1026&akid=4199%2E5885482%2EdOW23P ]Live National Call on Monday. “This is
where we show people what’s possible and how we build a better world and
what that better world looks like in our day-to-day lives.”

“Governing is a team sport, which means no one elected official does this
work alone. It requires building coalitions within the halls of government
and on the outside,” she said. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8612?t=1027&akid=4199%2E5885482%2EdOW23P ]WATCH SARA SPEAK HERE

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8608?t=1028&akid=4199%2E5885482%2EdOW23P ][IMG]

These are the races that make the difference. We have an opportunity to
elect a real agent of change and organizing partner to lead Allegheny
County. Let’s get to work!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4329?t=1029&akid=4199%2E5885482%2EdOW23P ]MAKE CALLS FOR SARA

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8608?t=1030&akid=4199%2E5885482%2EdOW23P ][IMG]

“These are two incredible progressive women who are building power in
cities with a real chance to win,” OR Political Director Aaron Chappell
told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8613?t=1031&akid=4199%2E5885482%2EdOW23P ]Politics PA. “They’ve both shown an incredible capacity to stand
up on the issues.”

“We’re not a money organization, we’re a people organization.” Aaron said.
“We’ll be working to turn out nearly 100,000 members in Philadelphia and
Allegheny County to propel them to victory and deliver progressive
change.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?t=1032&akid=4199%2E5885482%2EdOW23P ]HELP FUND OUR GOTV WORK IN PA

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8608?t=1033&akid=4199%2E5885482%2EdOW23P ][IMG]

In St. Louis, we held our progressive governing majority in the city,
electing six to the Board of Alderman to join Board President Megan Green
and Mayor Tishaura Jones.

“It was a good night,” Green, a former Bernie delegate, told the [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8595?t=1034&akid=4199%2E5885482%2EdOW23P ]St.
Louis Post Dispatch. “The future of St. Louis is progressive.”

On our Monday Call, Megan explained how years of organizing and
coalition-building in the city led to these wins, and how they passed a
basic income program. Next up, a tenant's bill of rights and houseless
bill of rights! [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8614?t=1035&akid=4199%2E5885482%2EdOW23P ]WATCH MEGAN’S CLIP HERE

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8608?t=1036&akid=4199%2E5885482%2EdOW23P ][IMG]

In Illinois, Our Revolution-backed Suzanna Ibarra — leader of our local
Will County Progressives — won a seat on Joliet City Council! We also saw
our slates in Kansas City MO and Lincoln NE advance to the general
election.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8608?t=1037&akid=4199%2E5885482%2EdOW23P ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8608?t=1038&akid=4199%2E5885482%2EdOW23P ][IMG]

VICTORY! Our Revolution Nashville Leader Brenda Ross and OR-endorsed Metro
Councillor Zulfat Suara celebrate with Rep. Justin Jones (above) after he
was reinstated to the State House on Monday!

By Wednesday, fellow progressive Rep. Justin Pearson joined him in a
victory for democracy — the result of years of organizing people power at
the grassroots level.

For years, we’ve worked with Justin and other allies to elect progressives
like Zulfat Suara, Delishia Porterfield, and Emily Benedict to the
Nashville Metro Council — which is who voted to reinstate Jones and
Pearson!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8608?t=1039&akid=4199%2E5885482%2EdOW23P ][IMG]

Justin Jones went from a community activist organizing with Our Revolution
to State Rep to now a national hero. That’s why we must empower more folks
like Justin, city by city, across the country.

Here’s a throwback to when Justin Jones spoke with our candidates and
activists at the Our Revolution Nashville training in 2020! [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8615?t=1040&akid=4199%2E5885482%2EdOW23P ]WATCH THE
VIDEO

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8608?t=1041&akid=4199%2E5885482%2EdOW23P ][IMG]

Nashville Metro Council member Delishia Porterfield joined our Monday
Night Call to break the news about Justin’s reinstatement and lay out the
stakes and the work ahead.

She said it’s no coincidence these young leaders are being targeted by
Republicans for standing with the people in demanding basic gun reform.

“Watch what’s happening in Tennessee because it can come to your state,”
Delishia told us. “We're asking folks to invest in organizing. Support the
good candidates, the nonprofits, and activists doing this work because
without us working together, they're going to try to take over.” [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8616?t=1042&akid=4199%2E5885482%2EdOW23P ]WATCH
THE CLIP HERE

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8608?t=1043&akid=4199%2E5885482%2EdOW23P ][IMG]

As we see unfolding in Nashville, the organizing work we’ve put into
building local power is crucial. But we need to put more of tomorrow’s
fighters in office today — and power is up for grabs in cities nationwide
this year.

We’re taking the energy from our wins in Chicago and St. Louis to our next
big races in PA: Helen Gym for Philly Mayor and Sara Innamorato for
Allegheny Co. Exec!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8223?t=1044&akid=4199%2E5885482%2EdOW23P ]JOIN OUR ELECT PROGRESSIVES TEAM

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8608?t=1045&akid=4199%2E5885482%2EdOW23P ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8608?t=1046&akid=4199%2E5885482%2EdOW23P ][IMG]

Our Revolution NYPAN rallied on Wall Street Monday with NYC Comptroller
Brad Lander and our One Fair Wage coalition, demanding publicly-traded
companies end the subminimum wage for tipped workers!

We were joined by the National Center for Law and Economic Justice,
Adasina Social Capital, and RFK Human Rights in issuing the call on
shareholders.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8608?t=1047&akid=4199%2E5885482%2EdOW23P ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8608?t=1048&akid=4199%2E5885482%2EdOW23P ][IMG]

Don’t miss our next [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8473?t=1049&akid=4199%2E5885482%2EdOW23P ]LIVE National Organize-to-Win Call with
progressive leaders from around the country! It kicks off next Monday at
8:30pm ET/5:30 PT

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8473?t=1050&akid=4199%2E5885482%2EdOW23P ]RSVP

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8608?t=1051&akid=4199%2E5885482%2EdOW23P ][IMG]

NEW STICKER! As we prepare for tax day, Bernie is battling the
billionaires to make them pay their fair share. It’s time to take a lesson
from Bernie: Tax the rich and invest in public education, school meals,
child care, and our future.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8597?t=1052&akid=4199%2E5885482%2EdOW23P ]GET YOUR STICKER

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8608?t=1053&akid=4199%2E5885482%2EdOW23P ][IMG]

The brand-new Our Revolution Store is open! We’ve got lots of new items —
from hoodies to coffee mugs, even a baby onesie! Now is a great time to
grab some gear, make a statement, and help fund the movement.

clean_body: [ stdin# ][IMG] INSIDER NEWS FROM THE FRONTLINES OF THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION HEADLINES: Building Progressive Cities! | New Chicago Mayor Brandon Johnson | Helen Gym for Philly Mayor! | St. Louis Majority w/ Megan Green | Sara Innamorato for Allegheny Co Exec | Rep. Justin Jones & OR Nashville | Bernie ‘Tax the Rich’ Sticker | & MORE! ★ ★ ★ NEW ‘TAX THE RICH’ STICKER [ ][IMG] NEW STICKER! Tax day is just days away, and Chairman Sanders is taking on the billionaires — who now pay less in taxes than teachers, baristas, and the rest of the working class. It’s absurd that billionaires pay just 3% of their total income in taxes. This isn’t rocket science, we need to tax the ultra rich and invest in public education, school meals, child care, and our future! Get this fresh Bernie sticker when you support our work with a one-time donation of $10 OR a monthly donation of $5 or more. [ ]GET YOUR STICKER ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Progressives won big last week, electing new Chicago Mayor Brandon Johnson and shoring up our governing majority in St. Louis — and we’re taking that energy city to city! “The fact that we were able to out-organize big money with people power speaks to the growth of the progressive movement as a political force,” Our Revolution Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese told [ ]The Guardian. Thanks to the surge of support from Our Revolution members and volunteers, we made nearly half a million voter contacts for our candidates — and it paid off! [ ][IMG] Former public school teacher Brandon Johnson won on a vision of co-governance, which is precisely the inside-outside strategy we need for change. Outspent 2:1, but with organizing power at his back, Brandon defeated tough-on-crime school privatizer Paul Vallas by 4 points! “We were able to show a broader vision of community safety, which means investment in good schools, mental health, and good jobs,” Joseph said. “This is the fruit of organizing over multiple election cycles.” [ ]We’ve got more work to do! Help our team make calls ahead of May 16th when Helen Gym will be on the ballot for Philly Mayor! ★ ★ ★ NEXT UP, PENNSYLVANIA! [ ][IMG] Our Revolution is shifting our operations to Pennsylvania, where we’re putting our full support behind Helen Gym in an exciting race for Mayor of Philadelphia! A former Philly teacher turned activist for public schools and immigrants rights, Helen served two terms on city council, where she helped pass fair work week, eviction diversion, and real material investments in Philly schools. Helen has pushed Philadelphia Gas Works to cut ties with industry lobbyists and transition off fossil fuels faster, and she’d be one of the nation’s top climate mayors! [ ][IMG] “This isn’t just about Congress, it’s about setting the blueprint for the country - city by city - and proving we have the kind of vision for our lives we all deserve!” Helen Gym said on our [ ]National Organize-to-Win Call Monday. “This work connects all of us together,” she told us. “The fights here in Philadelphia are echoed throughout the country, and when we win on the ground in our cities, that’s the blueprint because we cannot wait for Congress to do what our people need.” Helen laid out a powerful whole-city vision from guaranteed employment to transforming education, permanent affordable housing to clean water, better transit, and green spaces. [ ]WATCH HELEN’S CLIP HERE [ ][IMG] “I hope that, wherever you may be, you’re going to look to Philadelphia over the next 30 days and you’re going to see a people’s movement really rise — not just to take on city hall, but the entrenched status quo politics that have held us down too long,” Helen told us. Folks, we have a chance to elect a movement leader and longtime ally to the mayor’s seat in Philadelphia. We did it in Chicago and we can do it again. Let’s make some calls! [ ]PHONEBANK FOR HELEN GYM ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our Revolution backed Rep. Sara Innamorato in her run for PA House in 2018 alongside now-US Rep. Summer Lee, and now we’re proud to endorse for Allegheny County Executive — a key seat in Pittsburgh! In office, Sara has led dozens of bills for affordable housing, higher wages, environmental protections, reproductive healthcare, and much more. At the level of County Exec, she’d have the power to directly affect people’s lives — from county-wide housing to addressing human rights violations in the county jail to protecting abortion care. [ ][IMG] “This is the level of government where we take the big ideas and make them real,” Sara told us on our [ ]Live National Call on Monday. “This is where we show people what’s possible and how we build a better world and what that better world looks like in our day-to-day lives.” “Governing is a team sport, which means no one elected official does this work alone. It requires building coalitions within the halls of government and on the outside,” she said. [ ]WATCH SARA SPEAK HERE [ ][IMG] These are the races that make the difference. We have an opportunity to elect a real agent of change and organizing partner to lead Allegheny County. Let’s get to work! [ ]MAKE CALLS FOR SARA ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] “These are two incredible progressive women who are building power in cities with a real chance to win,” OR Political Director Aaron Chappell told [ ]Politics PA. “They’ve both shown an incredible capacity to stand up on the issues.” “We’re not a money organization, we’re a people organization.” Aaron said. “We’ll be working to turn out nearly 100,000 members in Philadelphia and Allegheny County to propel them to victory and deliver progressive change.” [ ]HELP FUND OUR GOTV WORK IN PA ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] In St. Louis, we held our progressive governing majority in the city, electing six to the Board of Alderman to join Board President Megan Green and Mayor Tishaura Jones. “It was a good night,” Green, a former Bernie delegate, told the [ ]St. Louis Post Dispatch. “The future of St. Louis is progressive.” On our Monday Call, Megan explained how years of organizing and coalition-building in the city led to these wins, and how they passed a basic income program. Next up, a tenant's bill of rights and houseless bill of rights! [ ]WATCH MEGAN’S CLIP HERE ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] In Illinois, Our Revolution-backed Suzanna Ibarra — leader of our local Will County Progressives — won a seat on Joliet City Council! We also saw our slates in Kansas City MO and Lincoln NE advance to the general election. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] VICTORY! Our Revolution Nashville Leader Brenda Ross and OR-endorsed Metro Councillor Zulfat Suara celebrate with Rep. Justin Jones (above) after he was reinstated to the State House on Monday! By Wednesday, fellow progressive Rep. Justin Pearson joined him in a victory for democracy — the result of years of organizing people power at the grassroots level. For years, we’ve worked with Justin and other allies to elect progressives like Zulfat Suara, Delishia Porterfield, and Emily Benedict to the Nashville Metro Council — which is who voted to reinstate Jones and Pearson! [ ][IMG] Justin Jones went from a community activist organizing with Our Revolution to State Rep to now a national hero. That’s why we must empower more folks like Justin, city by city, across the country. Here’s a throwback to when Justin Jones spoke with our candidates and activists at the Our Revolution Nashville training in 2020! [ ]WATCH THE VIDEO [ ][IMG] Nashville Metro Council member Delishia Porterfield joined our Monday Night Call to break the news about Justin’s reinstatement and lay out the stakes and the work ahead. She said it’s no coincidence these young leaders are being targeted by Republicans for standing with the people in demanding basic gun reform. “Watch what’s happening in Tennessee because it can come to your state,” Delishia told us. “We're asking folks to invest in organizing. Support the good candidates, the nonprofits, and activists doing this work because without us working together, they're going to try to take over.” [ ]WATCH THE CLIP HERE [ ][IMG] As we see unfolding in Nashville, the organizing work we’ve put into building local power is crucial. But we need to put more of tomorrow’s fighters in office today — and power is up for grabs in cities nationwide this year. We’re taking the energy from our wins in Chicago and St. Louis to our next big races in PA: Helen Gym for Philly Mayor and Sara Innamorato for Allegheny Co. Exec! [ ]JOIN OUR ELECT PROGRESSIVES TEAM ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our Revolution NYPAN rallied on Wall Street Monday with NYC Comptroller Brad Lander and our One Fair Wage coalition, demanding publicly-traded companies end the subminimum wage for tipped workers! We were joined by the National Center for Law and Economic Justice, Adasina Social Capital, and RFK Human Rights in issuing the call on shareholders. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Don’t miss our next [ ]LIVE National Organize-to-Win Call with progressive leaders from around the country! It kicks off next Monday at 8:30pm ET/5:30 PT [ ]RSVP ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] NEW STICKER! As we prepare for tax day, Bernie is battling the billionaires to make them pay their fair share. It’s time to take a lesson from Bernie: Tax the rich and invest in public education, school meals, child care, and our future. [ ]GET YOUR STICKER ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] The brand-new Our Revolution Store is open! We’ve got lots of new items — from hoodies to coffee mugs, even a baby onesie! Now is a great time to grab some gear, make a statement, and help fund the movement. [ ]CHECK OUT OUR NEW STORE! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Make a recurring gift of $5 or more, we’ll send you an official Our Revolution 2023 membership card. For $10 a month, you'll also get our new sticker pack; and for $15, get the Bernie HELP poster, too! For a monthly donation of $27, you’ll receive all of these great gifts plus a tote bag — and at the $50 bundle, get the whole package and Our Revolution t-shirt, too. [ ]BECOME A MEMBER TODAY! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] [ ]WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN! ★ ★ ★ [ ]Facebook | [ ]Twitter | [ ]Instagram | [ ]Youtube | [ ]Website | [ ]Sign Up [ ]Our membership swag Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive group in America. [ ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the establishment by committing to a recurring donation of just $5 or more a month! body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61852042/401419187/62647395?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTQ0OTNlYmEtY2FkYi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5jx5CuA3RrbMYknvnvOOa9ri7TijAmXGSFtRN9IeN8o=) Hey there, team.

Earlier this week, I sat down for an interview with _WEHOville_ to chat about my track record as a legislator, my story, and, ultimately, why I’m running for Congress in CA-30.

I’ll link the full interview below, but here’s a quick recap:
* **My beginnings.** Although I’ve been part of this community for over twenty years as a volunteer, in city government, and as a state legislator, my spark for advocacy began decades before that. Growing up, my mother was an activist in South Florida, where we marched for abortion rights, the ERA, and civil rights.

* **My values and track record.** I’m grateful my constituents have entrusted me for so many years to address huge challenges facing transportation, the environment, wildfire response, homelessness, and so much more.

* **Why I’m running.** This seat has never been held by a woman. And right now, we need women in Congress to fight for our reproductive rights - women with experience and proven records of success. On fundamental issues, like abortion rights, I have made my values clear, and will never back down.

**[Check out the article here:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61852043/401419193/489421764?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTQ0OTNlYmEtY2FkYi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5jx5CuA3RrbMYknvnvOOa9ri7TijAmXGSFtRN9IeN8o=&emci=93493eba-cadb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=94493eba-cadb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=8447100)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61852044/401419201/489421764?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTQ0OTNlYmEtY2FkYi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5jx5CuA3RrbMYknvnvOOa9ri7TijAmXGSFtRN9IeN8o=&emci=93493eba-cadb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=94493eba-cadb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=8447100) | ****[Read the Interview](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61852045/401419208/489421764?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTQ0OTNlYmEtY2FkYi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5jx5CuA3RrbMYknvnvOOa9ri7TijAmXGSFtRN9IeN8o=&emci=93493eba-cadb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=94493eba-cadb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=8447100)****
---

**[While I have you, I would appreciate it if you could chip in a $3 donation to my campaign for Congress. We’re entering the next phase of our grassroots operation, and your support will help make a huge difference in helping build our team to speak to more voters.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61852046/401419215/62647395?refcode=em-4.15.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTQ0OTNlYmEtY2FkYi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5jx5CuA3RrbMYknvnvOOa9ri7TijAmXGSFtRN9IeN8o=)**

Thank you, friend.

\- Laura

I’ll link the full interview below, but here’s a quick recap: My beginnings. Although I’ve been part of this community for over twenty years as a volunteer, in city government, and as a state legislator, my spark for advocacy began decades before that. Growing up, my mother was an activist in South Florida, where we marched for abortion rights, the ERA, and civil rights. My values and track record. I’m grateful my constituents have entrusted me for so many years to address huge challenges facing transportation, the environment, wildfire response, homelessness, and so much more. Why I’m running. This seat has never been held by a woman. And right now, we need women in Congress to fight for our reproductive rights - women with experience and proven records of success. On fundamental issues, like abortion rights, I have made my values clear, and will never back down. | = Thank you, friend. \- Laura =** | | Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress Laura's campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs and completely relies on grassroots supporters like you! To chip in to Laura's campaign = To learn more about Laura's progressive record of supporting our working families, please visit: We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Laura Friedman for Congress PO Box 27296 Los Angeles, CA 90027 United States

name: Team Baldwin
subject: We need you on our team
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=171%2E35263%2EeAQ-sO)
Peter — A few days ago, Tammy launched her reelection campaign for the U.S. Senate. Since then, we’ve reached out to you to ask for your support as we begin the groundwork for our campaign. Today, we’re making it official: **We are building a team that will be at the forefront of the fight to keep this seat blue. We want to make sure we can count on grassroots supporters who are all-in for Tammy, and we’re hoping you’ll add your name to the list.[**Peter, will you become an endorser of Tammy’s Senate campaign to continue making progress for Wisconsin?**](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2304_endorseTammy2024/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_LAU_PET_AC_20230415_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=171%2E35263%2EeAQ-sO)** | [ENDORSE TAMMY](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2304_endorseTammy2024/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_LAU_PET_AC_20230415_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=171%2E35263%2EeAQ-sO)
---
With abortion rights, Social Security, Medicare, and voting rights facing constant threats from Republican leaders, we need a real champion for our rights. We need someone who will lay it all out on the line to defend our freedoms and move our country forward. We need leaders like Tammy.
Tammy has dedicated her career to public service. She has a track record of taking on big fights and doing everything she can to build a future of opportunity and prosperity for every American. Keeping her in the Senate is key if we want to fight back against those who want to take our fundamental freedoms away — especially since our Senate majority is so narrow.
Political pundits are already naming this seat as one of the most competitive in the country, and Republicans are going to invest millions to defeat us. But if Tammy knows you’re on her side, she knows we can accomplish anything.
[**We can win this, but we need all hands on deck to make it happen. So join our fight today and personally endorse Tammy’s campaign for the Senate today.**](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2304_endorseTammy2024/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_LAU_PET_AC_20230415_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=171%2E35263%2EeAQ-sO)

---
Knowing we can count on you from the start makes all the difference, so thank you for endorsing Tammy’s campaign.
— Team Baldwin
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701
**[www.tammybaldwin.com](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=2&akid=171%2E35263%2EeAQ-sO) | [INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM](mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=3&akid=171%2E35263%2EeAQ-sO)**

| | I’m reaching out to make sure you saw this message from my team.

In just a few hours, we’re facing our biggest deadline since an extremist judge in Texas banned access to a safe and effective abortion pill used by millions of women.

In 2016, I ran for Congress against an anti-choice extremist with the promise that I would fight to defend the right to choose. As your Congressman, I have fought to ensure that every individual can make their own decisions about their health, and I won’t stop now.

[We have a chance to show the right-wing extremists waging war on a woman's right to choose that they are outnumbered. clean_body: Take Back The Senate | | | | | | Governor Glenn Youngkin Endorsement== | == | Tom Leonard Fundraiser | Fellow Americans, I need YOUR help! We must be fully prepared for the Virginia Republican Senate District 10 Convention on Saturday, May 6. The convention is just 21 days away. == == | Please join me at Tom Leonard's home for my "Take Back the Senate" Fundraiser with keynote speaker Aliscia Andrews, Deputy Secretary of Homeland Security, on April 20th, at 2330 Loreine's Landing Lane, Henrico, VA 23233. Please share this flyer, and RSVP to mailto:britton@mcguireforvirginia.com. | == | Seventy Plus Endorsement List == | You will not have to guess how I will vote as your State Senator. I am one of just nine, out of one hundred and forty legislators in the General Assembly, to earn the highest award for conservatism in Virginia, "Conservative Excellence". With Governor Glenn Youngkin's help, and many others, last year we successfully passed my bill for the largest tax decrease in Virginia history for veterans. Again, you will not have to guess how I will vote. To continue fighting for you, we must raise enough money to win. I need YOUR help. == == You can donate == or by mail. If you'd like to donate by mail, please make a check out to "Friends of John McGuire" and send to: Friends of John McGuire P.O. name: Collin Steele
subject: The State of the Race:
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie-reelect-logo-outlined.png]
We’re now a quarter of the way through what people in campaigns call the “off-year,” but there’s no such thing as an “off-year” when it comes to running a strong campaign! We’re building the groundwork for 2024, because frankly, 2024 is so important.
This campaign is investing in the future of #TX07 and in the future of Texas. We’ve got a lot going on. As the political director, it’s my job to keep an eye on everything happening, and there is a lot to prepare for until November of 2024.
Primary Election. We won a competitive primary in 2018, defeating seven candidates in the primary and runoff elections in the spring. Building on that work, we won the general election that year–changing the balance of power in the House, and we won re-election in 2020 in one of the most competitive races in the country.
So far, three people have filed paperwork to challenge Lizzie and become the Democratic nominee for #TX07. That means, we will work as hard as we always have to talk to voters during the primary election about the great job Lizzie is doing for our district, and why we should send her back to Washington.
General Election. We will work just as hard in the general election to turn out the vote and make sure that we win #TX07, win back the majority in the House of Representatives, and send a Democrat from Texas to the U.S. Senate!
To do that, we are bringing on a group of fellows participating in Democracy Summer, working with clubs and organizations across our community, and talking to Texans every day about what is at stake in the 2024 elections.
We’re investing in the future of Texas. Whether it’s recruiting interns and volunteers, hiring staff, planning our field strategy, or running ads on TV, online, or through the mail—it all takes money.
Your contributions help us keep our campaign running strong from now through next year. Any amount you can contribute makes a difference. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230414?refcode=folf230414]
Talk soon,
Collin
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf-footer]

name: Jacqueline Coleman
subject: Education is everything.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Peter — We have a 30-day pre-primary reporting deadline right around the corner, and **[I'm going to ask you to contribute to Andy's re-election campaign shortly.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61855291/401421220/523659758?refcode=em23_230415_file2_fnd_gq_act___jc_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230415_file2_fnd_gq_act___jc_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=54d92f7a-d0db-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGQ5MmY3YS1kMGRiLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aloD6_HfiuNL_qFrZcWfcwz1dLT3Yxvi45n_JfxLCHA=)** But first, I want to talk about something close to my heart.

I'm a proud parent, and before serving as lieutenant governor, I was a teacher, an assistant principal, and a basketball coach. I see firsthand how special Kentucky’s kids are, and I can see boundless potential in all of them. It’s our job as parents, teachers, and leaders to make their path to success as clear and straight as possible.

But we must be honest with ourselves. As of January of this year, we have far too many teacher vacancies, and we rank 44th nationally for starting teacher pay. Those aren't stats to brag about. But it doesn't have to be this way. **Andy has a plan to improve public education in Kentucky, and we all have good reason to get behind it.**

Andy's Education First Plan would **raise pay by 5%** for every single school staff member, increase funding for **textbooks, technology, and training,** add **more mental health resources** for students and teachers, and fully fund **universal pre-K**. This is a huge and necessary investment into our education system to help every child, regardless of their zip code, reach their full potential.

We should all be able to support these common-sense policies across party lines, because making Kentucky schools better shouldn't be a political issue. It's an investment in the future of millions of bright, young Kentuckians. And I think that's a worthwhile investment.

**This isn’t about right or left, red or blue. It’s about investing in the future of millions of bright, young Kentuckians. And our kids are worth it.**

**We can make this happen, but Andy needs your support to win this tough re-election race so we can continue fighting for Kentucky’s students and educators.**

**[Please, donate any amount before our pre-primary reporting deadline at midnight tomorrow and help us put Kentucky schools back on track>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61855292/401421221/523659758?refcode=em23_230415_file2_fnd_gq_act___jc_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230415_file2_fnd_gq_act___jc_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=54d92f7a-d0db-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGQ5MmY3YS1kMGRiLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aloD6_HfiuNL_qFrZcWfcwz1dLT3Yxvi45n_JfxLCHA=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61855294/401421223/523659758?refcode=em23_230415_file2_fnd_gq_act___jc_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230415_file2_fnd_gq_act___jc_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=54d92f7a-d0db-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGQ5MmY3YS1kMGRiLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aloD6_HfiuNL_qFrZcWfcwz1dLT3Yxvi45n_JfxLCHA=)

clean_body: Peter — We have a 30-day pre-primary reporting deadline right around the corner, and = But first, I want to talk about something close to my heart. I'm a proud parent, and before serving as lieutenant governor, I was a teacher, an assistant principal, and a basketball coach. I see firsthand how special Kentucky’s kids are, and I can see boundless potential in all of them. It’s our job as parents, teachers, and leaders to make their path to success as clear and straight as possible. But we must be honest with ourselves. As of January of this year, we have far too many teacher vacancies, and we rank 44th nationally for starting teacher pay. Those aren't stats to brag about. But it doesn't have to be this way. Andy has a plan to improve public education in Kentucky, and we all have good reason to get behind it. Andy's Education First Plan would raise pay by 5% for every single school staff member, increase funding for textbooks, technology, and training, add more mental health resources for students and teachers, and fully fund universal pre-K. This is a huge and necessary investment into our education system to help every child, regardless of their zip code, reach their full potential. We should all be able to support these common-sense policies across party lines, because making Kentucky schools better shouldn't be a political issue. It's an investment in the future of millions of bright, young Kentuckians. And I think that's a worthwhile investment. This isn’t about right or left, red or blue. It’s about investing in the future of millions of bright, young Kentuckians. And our kids are worth it. We can make this happen, but Andy needs your support to win this tough re-election race so we can continue fighting for Kentucky’s students and educators. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = = | = | = Thank you, Jacqueline Lieutenant Governor | Andy is fighting to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, and he needs you on board. Will you chip in today to Andy's re-election campaign? = PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR Andy Beshear for Governor PO Box 4278 Louisville, KY 40204 United States

And that's not to say that grassroots donations like yours don't matter because they do _– so much_ more than I can ever articulate. In fact, it's thanks to grassroots donors like you that I'm even able to hold the most powerful and corrupt forces in the nation accountable –**because I know that, no matter how many millions of dollars they spend slandering me, I have an unwavering base of supporters behind me. **
I hate asking for money because I don't want to be distracted from my work – but with fights as large and vital as ours, I just can't afford to fall short of my fundraising goals. name: Tim Scott
subject: I grew up with plastic spoons, not silver
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT PRESIDENTIAL EXPLORATORY COMMITTEE
body:
| |
---
| | |

I was raised by a single mother in poverty. We had plastic spoons, not silver.

But we had faith.

We put in the work. We had an unwavering belief that we too could live the American Dream.

**I know America is a land of opportunity, not a land of oppression. I know it because I 've LIVED it.**

---
| | | [STAND WITH TIM SCOTT](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=a2cb3bdbdee9467d93762460137f7af4&_e=EkCALo8S7xeukMjThykxYZcy_fF0OPtGCPNPzr92Uls9q8M1hmvHeVgW1eUGcW23ArqnpA1gyBJAtaZWaMt-1Jt7ma19WOPysdIvD-QvbcmPHbwGVwUxBe8F81J_RhKBC3gxbk-lVlvechLDWprCA6CRpMHvmauGCV2NbW9K8ytzt5MAz8Pwrwm8EN-rQo6maIyW0o5AC1fNfEp3340RetEHXfUFDpoukdkGuko4YR_Ybo42pd3s3VpwjSojyVHPY4DEOn3FXU8k4sqLEb2WOBIK-vLMZHjmlIzsJMpcysMRt4MIcofXWGhy6wyH3R9ietrU2S7Mu6K2-9qhuFcuH5TlAP7gWdwx-oHqTho3QhQ77KksS2kUtoPf72DQ_E57 "STAND WITH TIM SCOTT")
---

That's why it pains my soul to see the Biden liberals attacking every rung of the ladder that helped me climb.

If the radical Left gets their way, millions more families will be trapped in failing schools, crime-ridden neighborhoods, and crushing inflation.

Not on my watch! This is personal to me.

**I will never back down in defense of the conservative values that make America exceptional. Are you with me?

I just launched my Presidential Exploratory Committee, and I couldn't be more excited to hit the ground and listen to more Americans about their concerns, worries, fears, and priorities.

But the truth is, accomplishing our goal isn't cheap. _**[So today, I'm humbly asking if you could please chip in $5, $10, $25, or anything you can afford to help my team and I keep trying to restore FAITH in America.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=a2cb3bdbdee9467d93762460137f7af4&_e=isDHoNB-SS7Qc-5dZZ_fZC_5VgbJhGCn21FB5lgZ0or-r8__7oAFzoijARek_oFXi9ok2QZHpLajRdzrwhLJba4sE7VIOw79wEGM_JjCQ392F2y0SYtlS5IuKQ7LbYHQuEEzHYLCTGLC1plXOPFy0RdJc9cD-6aGOKZ85f57zHW6ZzIgJBRL52D1bNKTxjjU35BRiuhcPWmDCHUAbQ0W95yPsYttpp2zLHBAxdsMrTLMHTmAb9WVWm6h5cA6qwopXKkLZwy0BUZoLWfisxw826IKeKwc8xgAnOqpS5uDKJYYO1cfQyNH-2HLXUHDVSCt5BGTIilDTXbAvxu_4DDt4Vn72tL6myW_nsGAMjM21MU4DJNdK_FymS5hT8qJ7p5j "So today, I’m humbly asking if you could please chip in $5, $10, $25, or anything you can afford to help my team and I keep trying to restore FAITH in America.")**_ I believe our best days are ahead of us, but I can't do this alone. Are you with me?

I was raised in a single-parent household in North Charleston, South Carolina. My mom worked 16-hour days to keep food on the table and a roof over our heads. I got my first job, changing oil at a gas station, when I was 13. **I understand the value of a dollar.**

I don't take asking for money lightly. I know that every donation made is a sacrifice, and I am forever grateful for each and every gift.

body:
We’re hours away from our deadline and tracking a couple hundred donations behind where we need to be.
#
Hi Peter, we’ll keep this quick.
We set a goal of raising 1,500 individual donations to elect Lucas Kunce before midnight TONIGHT, but now we’re just hours away and still a couple hundred donations behind where we need to be.
If every person reading this chipped in right now, we’d hit our goal in no time. But not everyone will, so we’re counting on top supporters like you to help us close the gap: **[So Peter, will you chip in $5 or whatever you can to help our campaign stay on track + prepare for the fight ahead?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/30868?refcode=em20230415-3000&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3000%2E614464%2EbdX2fq)**
**We even made a link just for you:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-20230415?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com-em20230415](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/30868?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com-em20230415&amount=5&t=2&akid=3000%2E614464%2EbdX2fq)**
**[ADD A DONATION NOW »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/30868?refcode=em20230415-3000&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3000%2E614464%2EbdX2fq)**
_National Journal_ said Lucas Kunce “represents one of the Democratic Party’s better offensive targets” this cycle — and between Josh Hawley’s tanking approval rating and the already vicious attacks about Lucas coming from GOP insiders, it’s clear they’re right.
We have a real shot to defeat Hawley, flip this seat, and take back power for everyday people this cycle... but we can’t do it without your help.
**Help our campaign close the gap on Lucas’ goal of raising 1,500 individual donations and stay prepared for the fight ahead by adding your first $5 donation before midnight tonight.**
**Here’s your personalized link:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-20230415?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com-em20230415](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/30868?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com-em20230415&amount=5&t=4&akid=3000%2E614464%2EbdX2fq)**
Thanks for all your help,
Emma Dillon
Team Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20230415-3000-footer&t=5&refcode2=3000_614464_bdX2fq&akid=3000%2E614464%2EbdX2fq)**
