name: Mark Lamb
subject: It’s time to throw politically correct out the door
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate
body:
I have personally carried dead bodies from our communities’ ditches, rescued children from sex trafficking rings, and arrested gang members and drug dealers.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_s=2118e6bfc6df4c31b91f173838c6cac6&_t=8_eq617hp5YQY7Lkg2EXq3mZs8da5vdFGlcxU4VUMZj8h6EP9nypM8UyHBZbK6lWFa0frtC5a1m3LQuH_1VwepyyfEIP4HAYiD1zQBWBRlM%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_s=2118e6bfc6df4c31b91f173838c6cac6&_t=8_eq617hp5YQY7Lkg2EXq3mZs8da5vdFGlcxU4VUMZj8h6EP9nypM8UyHBZbK6lWFa0frtC5a1m3LQuH_1VwepyyfEIP4HAYiD1zQBWBRlM%3D)

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=2118e6bfc6df4c31b91f173838c6cac6&_e=A4RnuOX-_WOwuq19sNd48g8awPRV0BP7Gu4hG-iAuIb9TLLn7TeFmkyZ5-Xdp9B6PWv_6nyxkQyrUKPaw8g6g5KpOHxcSjqThgp1uaPHbbG7TqMUxV8iIBbDC_RItTGUQnUBZmTZzTeDkUg_GrbpEjeRMmX79U_wdiZ4505iUs_Gx58qzb9_EhWJdHZyh1JwlsjCC0BcEk5-gaFG4Xx44okvfWM-i7K3zqIKv9fzvR2In7A3hqf9ooO85Nu94n12aaZMknOEuh4iKwhEPiRASKoSOTiQ_GlrcXGJgnmCCmabdEESPU5XCTaYCs10j7PAyA9SdfBdIORyo4Il-ufy_mPr3usgrUaQW3WAlmV1AXCSYL8hq7hTreE6ScV9KTpGTFksXpuBNYUzHQ2Mxdw0oQ%3D%3D)
|
Peter,

My name is Mark Lamb - I'm a husband, father, God-fearing American, and proud Sheriff of Pinal County in the great state of Arizona.

**Washington needs a new Sheriff in town, which is why I am announcing my candidacy for the United States Senate and[hope you will become one of my campaign's first official supporters.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=2118e6bfc6df4c31b91f173838c6cac6&_e=A4RnuOX-_WOwuq19sNd48g8awPRV0BP7Gu4hG-iAuIb9TLLn7TeFmkyZ5-Xdp9B6PWv_6nyxkQyrUKPaw8g6g5KpOHxcSjqThgp1uaPHbbG7TqMUxV8iIBbDC_RItTGUQnUBZmTZzTeDkUg_GrbpEjeRMmX79U_wdiZ4505iUs_Gx58qzb9_EhWJdHZyh1JwlsjCC0BcEk5-gaFG4Xx44okvfWM-i7K3zqIKv9fzvR2In7A3hqf9ooO85Nu94n12KNcSM4qsqD0t5aW4UvblAxjpQPiNKArOcKBw-ZkJAiBNiwIdZbZspl53a4oERTqKm_67ndqp0lU_Qu4FF3qfGJDKCgTwjAD-9_TDno4SbK7YA1Cyznn4DJxfRdZJP_I3VkHR6uEwus6HpsFOY9wNxg%3D%3D)**

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=2118e6bfc6df4c31b91f173838c6cac6&_e=A4RnuOX-_WOwuq19sNd48g8awPRV0BP7Gu4hG-iAuIb9TLLn7TeFmkyZ5-Xdp9B6PWv_6nyxkQyrUKPaw8g6g5KpOHxcSjqThgp1uaPHbbG7TqMUxV8iIBbDC_RItTGUQnUBZmTZzTeDkUg_GrbpEjeRMmX79U_wdiZ4505iUs_Gx58qzb9_EhWJdHZyh1JwlsjCC0BcEk5-gaFG4Xx44okvfWM-i7K3zqIKv9fzvR2In7A3hqf9ooO85Nu94n12a-61cNp793HxHCgrXrvVH5H2nbFFNkWjfb7ZdDxDd2da3TCZM6KWLvySpVOKx-bsOSzKsHsHXVIfIQnDVI4N1JODKl5ejB4AQOjwK6xjBec4sxZoGNgibBhrEb5MlBOTzxakQpaffrOLGbLvHF7jmw%3D%3D)
[**JOIN MY TEAM » WATCH MY ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=2118e6bfc6df4c31b91f173838c6cac6&_e=A4RnuOX-_WOwuq19sNd48g8awPRV0BP7Gu4hG-iAuIb9TLLn7TeFmkyZ5-Xdp9B6PWv_6nyxkQyrUKPaw8g6g5KpOHxcSjqThgp1uaPHbbG7TqMUxV8iIBbDC_RItTGUQnUBZmTZzTeDkUg_GrbpEjeRMmX79U_wdiZ4505iUs_Gx58qzb9_EhWJdHZyh1JwlsjCC0BcEk5-gaFG4Xx44okvfWM-i7K3zqIKv9fzvR2In7A3hqf9ooO85Nu94n12Xh1ooAhgFm7EBlRZJHMEESGrr9cyouY5PZBTDGGAq7P5vbjxWaJeOfbZvtkqrGqppNhOrDqZNudKNVnqGL_WVlihbvhQEihsVd_Iw8vq_8A4XIUZTQBKeFnhrJeYI09bsW19RCmKLvt6DpG-h8xvHA%3D%3D)

Our sliver of Arizona is home to more than 420,000 Americans spread out over 5,000+ square miles; the place we call home is a vast and arid sundrenched landscape that also happens to be on the frontlines of several conflicts. **Not only are we fighting a war on illegal narcotics, but we're also simultaneously fighting an immigration battle.**

As the top law-enforcement officer in the area I'm responsible for the safety and wellbeing of every man, woman, and child who calls this place home. Unlike most of the career politicians in Washington, D.C., and in Phoenix, I know that in Pinal County, the buck stops with me - _**that's why I take my job so seriously.**_

Like so many Americans, our family has experienced deep loss over the last couple of years. We lost our son and our one-year-old granddaughter eight days before Christmas. **There is simply no pain that compares to losing a child, let alone a grandbaby.** During my son's life, he struggled with drug addiction; he even spent time in my jail for using fentanyl.

As a result of my personal loss and the tragedy I see play out every day as Sheriff, I am hyper-aware that families across Arizona and America have been adversely affected by rising crime and drug use in our communities.

**[That is why I'm announcing my candidacy for the United States Senate to level up my fight for Arizona families and yours in our nation's Capitol.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=2118e6bfc6df4c31b91f173838c6cac6&_e=A4RnuOX-_WOwuq19sNd48g8awPRV0BP7Gu4hG-iAuIb9TLLn7TeFmkyZ5-Xdp9B6PWv_6nyxkQyrUKPaw8g6g5KpOHxcSjqThgp1uaPHbbG7TqMUxV8iIBbDC_RItTGUQnUBZmTZzTeDkUg_GrbpEjeRMmX79U_wdiZ4505iUs_Gx58qzb9_EhWJdHZyh1JwlsjCC0BcEk5-gaFG4Xx44okvfWM-i7K3zqIKv9fzvR2In7A3hqf9ooO85Nu94n12gm3_vvbUkwsl2zd1CSGFpUaZ1f0X74c-oVLi0hGzTPxNZGh3UbCwR1e2D3Lb-4VP2RGKtkfzsiqhQReshi3HVdXY9LiBA6v5yZDa6HHfYXA_Md5pYmuCONJyUSlpBsJZStrbtXAwQ5vzKZb8E7J3Wg%3D%3D)**

[**JOIN MY TEAM » WATCH MY ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=2118e6bfc6df4c31b91f173838c6cac6&_e=A4RnuOX-_WOwuq19sNd48g8awPRV0BP7Gu4hG-iAuIb9TLLn7TeFmkyZ5-Xdp9B6PWv_6nyxkQyrUKPaw8g6g5KpOHxcSjqThgp1uaPHbbG7TqMUxV8iIBbDC_RItTGUQnUBZmTZzTeDkUg_GrbpEjeRMmX79U_wdiZ4505iUs_Gx58qzb9_EhWJdHZyh1JwlsjCC0BcEk5-gaFG4Xx44okvfWM-i7K3zqIKv9fzvR2In7A3hqf9ooO85Nu94n12IYll1OypyrAsAJOrWbFFRmWUqfkCL4fzfEMuIHhoKUqRcZ468OLMky7qOpVZaA3bW0Xh_WFFUuA5llGMXQjAS6TfwXTMoo26NwYMCxj4th7asWH8FEY5EETsRLaphgyZqXrUIubDuASSOAd0BUOZpA%3D%3D)

I can talk about personal responsibility all day long, but what's the point if I'm not willing to **step up and speak out** against the failure of career politicians in Washington who are too politically correct to protect us?

Not only did I have to witness my son's incarceration in one of my jails, but I have personally **carried dead bodies from our communities' ditches, rescued children from sex trafficking rings, and arrested gang members and drug dealers.**

Each day that I get up and put my Sheriff's badge on, I remind myself that I'm no better than any man or woman who works for me; I have been - _and continue to be_ - on the front lines of the opioid epidemic and the border fight.

To find out more about my candidacy, **[sign up for our campaign emails here.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=2118e6bfc6df4c31b91f173838c6cac6&_e=A4RnuOX-_WOwuq19sNd48g8awPRV0BP7Gu4hG-iAuIb9TLLn7TeFmkyZ5-Xdp9B6PWv_6nyxkQyrUKPaw8g6g5KpOHxcSjqThgp1uaPHbbG7TqMUxV8iIBbDC_RItTGUQnUBZmTZzTeDkUg_GrbpEjeRMmX79U_wdiZ4505iUs_Gx58qzb9_EhWJdHZyh1JwlsjCC0BcEk5-gaFG4Xx44okvfWM-i7K3zqIKv9fzvR2In7A3hqf9ooO85Nu94n12qE2-RXL__2l_4YBnSAu-p4z1oQtXPtAlGLyQ5PPH96UmCVxDPimvD6-F-g8jfHa6Ba7bgW5IoTgV7S8jfDu-Bgcxo4Dpguq2JaX6-bmYao-dr0tuU6OGODpb9-rashdrs4wMnwI5_CPzD6COL1WyUA%3D%3D)**

In my capacity as the Sheriff of Arizona's third most populous county, I demand excellence from myself and everyone under my command. It's our DUTY to provide protection to the people we serve, along with an unwavering commitment to the communities under our jurisdiction.

I may currently have a big job title, **but I have even more responsibility.**

**When cartel violence spills over the border into our communities, my team is responsible for holding the thugs perpetrating the crimes in our communities accountable.**

**And when domestic violence allegations are made, my team is responsible for bringing justice to the victims.**

I was raised with a deep sense of personal responsibility that has remained with me throughout my life. Today in the United States of America, it seems to me that personal responsibility has come to be seen by many as a liability rather than an asset.

**[I'll stand up to the woke left and the weak political establishment in Washington.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=2118e6bfc6df4c31b91f173838c6cac6&_e=A4RnuOX-_WOwuq19sNd48g8awPRV0BP7Gu4hG-iAuIb9TLLn7TeFmkyZ5-Xdp9B6PWv_6nyxkQyrUKPaw8g6g5KpOHxcSjqThgp1uaPHbbG7TqMUxV8iIBbDC_RItTGUQnUBZmTZzTeDkUg_GrbpEjeRMmX79U_wdiZ4505iUs_Gx58qzb9_EhWJdHZyh1JwlsjCC0BcEk5-gaFG4Xx44okvfWM-i7K3zqIKv9fzvR2In7A3hqf9ooO85Nu94n12Zqezh9NiU9BX6BgmvJYBcDKtzdyA-KXTeWgeceUGET9g48-Qv4WU19kmMauKq9uWsIbmLkxDjJ-RYFlCSmLUhWelD_wfv7ldsv051BZ5gJHSu6D82rifDOAiTtHkI8DmcKyBaEUiSyZwEa24GMAjCw%3D%3D) **I'll work 24/7 to do everything in my purview to secure the southern border and provide our law enforcement officers with the resources they need to succeed as our first responders.

[**JOIN MY TEAM » WATCH MY ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=2118e6bfc6df4c31b91f173838c6cac6&_e=A4RnuOX-_WOwuq19sNd48g8awPRV0BP7Gu4hG-iAuIb9TLLn7TeFmkyZ5-Xdp9B6PWv_6nyxkQyrUKPaw8g6g5KpOHxcSjqThgp1uaPHbbG7TqMUxV8iIBbDC_RItTGUQnUBZmTZzTeDkUg_GrbpEjeRMmX79U_wdiZ4505iUs_Gx58qzb9_EhWJdHZyh1JwlsjCC0BcEk5-gaFG4Xx44okvfWM-i7K3zqIKv9fzvR2In7A3hqf9ooO85Nu94n12ApNw3DWz9Tmy-fa8VqO0QgThf60UHkS8BWiAaQIv-1L_Y1aAguqkBsk3s8vm4uGKhvHl8vASXHq7bPWEcSu4kPOK6FGFSKpJKDWQGXXq8s8iMMhtMWm47ojPTdH8mmFDfiG7i9m7gVNF6y-HbOTHkQ%3D%3D)

As sheriff, I understand that the freedoms granted to us by the Constitution to make choices also mean the freedom to make bad choices. **That's where personal responsibility is important.** There are times when I will have to intervene and voice objections to others in law enforcement who, despite their good intentions to control a situation or public behavior, are attempting to violate the Constitution and an individual's rights.

Benjamin Franklin famously said, _**“Those who would give up essential liberty to purchase a little temporary safety deserve neither liberty nor safety.”**_

Pinal County, Arizona voters elected me to be their top enforcement official because they know that **[I'm tougher than a $2 dollar steak.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=2118e6bfc6df4c31b91f173838c6cac6&_e=A4RnuOX-_WOwuq19sNd48g8awPRV0BP7Gu4hG-iAuIb9TLLn7TeFmkyZ5-Xdp9B6PWv_6nyxkQyrUKPaw8g6g5KpOHxcSjqThgp1uaPHbbG7TqMUxV8iIBbDC_RItTGUQnUBZmTZzTeDkUg_GrbpEjeRMmX79U_wdiZ4505iUs_Gx58qzb9_EhWJdHZyh1JwlsjCC0BcEk5-gaFG4Xx44okvfWM-i7K3zqIKv9fzvR2In7A3hqf9ooO85Nu94n12sj6APDnMZgUU0JflJTPUXZN234mstZUaBYzSYaBuKB-RuePOj05ms7fm34CNqUswthv_dZbosi-BfiwknikhRd_rQNnLxbJ9LtsdcJRuVMG9YL3QBr6Pk3mK8-HDimclIvvx0o5QxVBiKBuLAJ7BbA%3D%3D)** Right now, Washington desperately needs someone who isn't afraid to tell it how it is or to get their hands dirty. I feel strongly that the Constitution must be protected**,a fight I will proudly continue as your next Senator in Washington.**

The voters who gave me the use of the sheriff's badge that I wear on my lapel know that the only interest I have in elected office is their safety. _**For me, my community and family are everything.**_

Thank you,

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=2118e6bfc6df4c31b91f173838c6cac6&_e=A4RnuOX-_WOwuq19sNd48g8awPRV0BP7Gu4hG-iAuIb9TLLn7TeFmkyZ5-Xdp9B6PWv_6nyxkQyrUKPaw8g6g5KpOHxcSjqThgp1uaPHbbG7TqMUxV8iIBbDC_RItTGUQnUBZmTZzTeDkUg_GrbpEjeRMmX79U_wdiZ4505iUs_Gx58qzb9_EhWJdHZyh1JwlsjCC0BcEk5-gaFG4Xx44okvfWM-i7K3zqIKv9fzvR2In7A3hqf9ooO85Nu94n12_pmwOqjbgHcx_6a39pMOHK7BoYDDYeZ1crZ4MpgLbXirceRX00Cp1QY6_w98uI5LLhG5AoZmlee621kBmrvoJUEoAOdA1sbqMWR6qdjxD1xzRb6Im71Alnli4-N2Pr04QQhmqplbtD6vTZ7lvFxwLQ%3D%3D)

clean_body: I have personally carried dead bodies from our communities’ ditches, rescued children from sex trafficking rings, and arrested gang members and drug dealers. | | Peter, My name is Mark Lamb - I'm a husband, father, God-fearing American, and proud Sheriff of Pinal County in the great state of Arizona. Washington needs a new Sheriff in town, which is why I am announcing my candidacy for the United States Senate and Our sliver of Arizona is home to more than 420,000 Americans spread out over 5,000+ square miles; the place we call home is a vast and arid sundrenched landscape that also happens to be on the frontlines of several conflicts. Not only are we fighting a war on illegal narcotics, but we're also simultaneously fighting an immigration battle. As the top law-enforcement officer in the area I'm responsible for the safety and wellbeing of every man, woman, and child who calls this place home. Unlike most of the career politicians in Washington, D.C., and in Phoenix, I know that in Pinal County, the buck stops with me - that's why I take my job so seriously. Like so many Americans, our family has experienced deep loss over the last couple of years. We lost our son and our one-year-old granddaughter eight days before Christmas. There is simply no pain that compares to losing a child, let alone a grandbaby. During my son's life, he struggled with drug addiction; he even spent time in my jail for using fentanyl. As a result of my personal loss and the tragedy I see play out every day as Sheriff, I am hyper-aware that families across Arizona and America have been adversely affected by rising crime and drug use in our communities. I can talk about personal responsibility all day long, but what's the point if I'm not willing to step up and speak out against the failure of career politicians in Washington who are too politically correct to protect us? Not only did I have to witness my son's incarceration in one of my jails, but I have personally carried dead bodies from our communities' ditches, rescued children from sex trafficking rings, and arrested gang members and drug dealers. Each day that I get up and put my Sheriff's badge on, I remind myself that I'm no better than any man or woman who works for me; I have been - and continue to be - on the front lines of the opioid epidemic and the border fight. To find out more about my candidacy, In my capacity as the Sheriff of Arizona's third most populous county, I demand excellence from myself and everyone under my command. It's our DUTY to provide protection to the people we serve, along with an unwavering commitment to the communities under our jurisdiction. I may currently have a big job title, but I have even more responsibility. When cartel violence spills over the border into our communities, my team is responsible for holding the thugs perpetrating the crimes in our communities accountable. And when domestic violence allegations are made, my team is responsible for bringing justice to the victims. I was raised with a deep sense of personal responsibility that has remained with me throughout my life. Today in the United States of America, it seems to me that personal responsibility has come to be seen by many as a liability rather than an asset. I'll work 24/7 to do everything in my purview to secure the southern border and provide our law enforcement officers with the resources they need to succeed as our first responders. As sheriff, I understand that the freedoms granted to us by the Constitution to make choices also mean the freedom to make bad choices. That's where personal responsibility is important. There are times when I will have to intervene and voice objections to others in law enforcement who, despite their good intentions to control a situation or public behavior, are attempting to violate the Constitution and an individual's rights. Benjamin Franklin famously said, “Those who would give up essential liberty to purchase a little temporary safety deserve neither liberty nor safety.” Pinal County, Arizona voters elected me to be their top enforcement official because they know that Right now, Washington desperately needs someone who isn't afraid to tell it how it is or to get their hands dirty. I feel strongly that the Constitution must be protected,a fight I will proudly continue as your next Senator in Washington. The voters who gave me the use of the sheriff's badge that I wear on my lapel know that the only interest I have in elected office is their safety. For me, my community and family are everything. Friend – you might find this hard to believe when you think about the _tens of millions_ of dollars _ _ that GOP super PACs are set to spend to defeat us, **but the average grassroots donation to our campaign is just $26.**
We're mighty proud of that fact – and of the grassroots movement that we're building together. It's made up of folks like you who believe in our fight and chip in what you can, when you can.

This grassroots movement is how we're going to win a race that NBC News says will be "one of the nastiest and most expensive in the country" and defend our razor-thin Senate majority.
**But here's the problem:** The Cook Political Report is calling our race a toss-up – and experts at FiveThirtyEight say Ohio could decide Senate control. We simply cannot surge ahead and win without ALL hands on deck.
**Now, we're coming up on a critical fundraising deadline, but we're still falling short of our $15,000 goal. If everyone reading this chipped in $26, we could reach our goal in no time – but we know not everyone will, so we're asking you, friend.**

body:
The Left will not stop. Neither can we.
| | | [ ](https://email.info.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kUGPmzAQhX-NuYHsMdhw4NCtFalKVVXqqtucImMPyaywYcEEbX99RZT0-r2n0fs0NkwD9Z8t0y8M4Ep-YQBMfmEAx_Llzw91fDua_C-ebrlRVbntKXxlAOlzwv_Vx5UCg6Vhp9pkvlVdKbTPsBWqFlWjeV1n1xY4upr3HXLZ9JXmIB14WUHNUdsG-oxa4CB5KSoAoStdABdOIrdeiUr4RrKSU-zHwo_RDv49zWuYCjeGbGivKU3LfdOBwWFBt85YbBRn9HtjZ_aGuQ04k7P5-0gx5f0a_WxpoXjJ3RgCpYTI4BDd0JSdrR02ne0aoRxn8rCmcA7oaQ1Mmoew2uEyrrNDJo2js30wZ8Nk6RKZNE-pZzLGhDExaWpVAwN1jgN5Js3Hr16-_X69nV7v8P4SaU7b0XzbPr7_zObWTxsNAy1Ks5Jf9gW7278AAAD__8SWjgY)

Friend,
Yesterday, I returned to New York for yet ANOTHER witch hunt.

body:
Arizonans have been left behind and forgotten for far too long, and it’s time for us to change things.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61861470/401426619/215821870?refcode=BLU-KKFC-20230415-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0MDEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWJhYjIwMTEtZGRkYi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=QNE1yfAqV8dITIQrGitJj_YPnubiG6VHRcGCiuSSUyA=)
---
| Peter,

Earlier this week, I announced my campaign for Congress.

Corrupt DC insiders like David Schweikert rake in millions in Corporate PAC donations every year and then vote how those companies want. Everyday Arizonans like you and me know just how ludicrous that is - that’s why I will never take Corporate PAC money, I’m relying on grassroots donors like you.

It’s not enough to talk the talk. We need leaders who will fight for our values.
Instead of chasing the headlines, Jason’s focused on delivering results for our communities — including investing in our childrens’ mental health, upgrading our aging water lines, and supporting our small businesses.
Dark money groups are going to flood in money to smear our record and take back Colorado. We have to be ready to fight back — starting with tonight's deadline.
I won’t lie: Raising 2,500 individual donations for our first mid-month deadline of the quarter is ambitious — but it’s not impossible. Our team has never shied away from tough fights. We can hit our fundraising goal if we have a strong grassroots push these final few hours.
[**Can you help us reach our 2,500 donor goal? Be 1 of the 4 folks we need to make a donation right now >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61861520/401426675/687873841?refcode=AU_JC_FR_GEN_MMG_NO_20230415_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2Y3NzcwYS1kZGRiLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tHdSF6p3S2v2OeOl0S31iM0TF4XJcWUKG29rtmV2pzY=)

clean_body: | Hey there, it’s Elijah with Team Crow. I hate sharing bad news — but as one of our top supporters, I want to be transparent: Unless 4 more folks in your area chip in before tonight's mid-month deadline, we’re going to fall short of our 2,500 donor goal. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = It’s not enough to talk the talk. We need leaders who will fight for our values. Instead of chasing the headlines, Jason’s focused on delivering results for our communities — including investing in our childrens’ mental health, upgrading our aging water lines, and supporting our small businesses. Dark money groups are going to flood in money to smear our record and take back Colorado. We have to be ready to fight back — starting with tonight's deadline. I won’t lie: Raising 2,500 individual donations for our first mid-month deadline of the quarter is ambitious — but it’s not impossible. Our team has never shied away from tough fights. We can hit our fundraising goal if we have a strong grassroots push these final few hours. = Thank you for your support, — Elijah Campaign Manager Jason Crow for Congress | Now more than ever, we need strong leaders like Jason working for us in Congress. Jason is fighting for you, your family, and the American people in Congress — and he's not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. Will you pitch in now to help him continue working for us? | = Jason Crow for Congress 8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543 Greenwood Village, CO 80112 United States | mailto:info@jasoncrowforcongress.com | Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress Jason Crow was a Captain in the U.S. Army. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | | | Peter, we know it’s the weekend, so we’ll keep it quick — this is an urgent plea. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | Our country is in desperate need of strong Black leadership right now. Every day, some new injustice makes its way into the headlines and makes us question what on Earth is going to happen next. In short? We can’t afford to waste a single second in our efforts to elect Black progressive champions. That’s why we need your help so urgently right now. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | — The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. subject: Open for an important message from President Barack Obama >>
body:
President Obama is using his voice to echo the importance of state legislatures. | | |
---
| | **President Obama is using his voice to amplify the critical importance of state legislatures:** [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zg_VLrMrMFvj2eg_NergVk0RMpp5VCBNbBXS7sUaF4ODH36l9TH6wBXBocAQoVemPYnJm7g98XvTLIGXwMJ8W1Oc36GKrzLY40yBulLraWmDame9yplybKv9oq-5WBDepftxdeODKMPyXrAdGkGiNKQ4MtEaH9PiIG1wDjK1V9mxBid99HVtPp-JFmdrRp6cxS_dXgSEJ_C2GCPzJiRuEjNdk4qzgzgWtB5XGJIRx8C_KxHZGI8uZ5ulMkCNdF-FfmFGOaVvntlqe70aR6crtCRPLTa51Zi_qOz7muDxYvcd34WR4TPLU6LRP891SmQ-H8XZ_n0P1gBVKG64fjCSiF7f9-elvbH9gtK9FtLejXq5scS6vRUN9DqnBEMq0zT5ZgJ1Soq5ZLLPAQ90_WIMtX4zgnAUnuN8qxbuvyntDVkg/3vd/FyJ1VIDOTR2j9Nx-ihQXkQ/h0/soBh_vRCH-5VcUyEzNIytTWlMrYh7GjD3ExfNeTP8fU) And no one would be better than President Obama – he served THREE terms in the Illinois State Senate! Here’s exactly why he’s so right: **While legislation stalls on the federal level, state legislators are making key decisions about access to abortion, public education, health care services, and even decisions about the roads you drive on.** Where Republicans have stripped their constituents of these rights, state Democrats have protected the right to choose, expanded early and absentee voting, and much, much more. **Simply put, state Democrats are the last line of defense against GOP extremism.** But with nine must-win special elections quickly approaching, we need every Democrat reading this to listen to President Obama and step up. [Will you listen to President Obama and chip in $7 right now to help secure victories for Democrats across the country?](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zg_VLrMrMFvj2eg_NergVk0RMpp5VCBNbBXS7sUaF4ODH36l9TH6wBXBocAQoVemPYnJm7g98XvTLIGXwMJ8W1Oc36GKrzLY40yBulLraWmDame9yplybKv9oq-5WBDepftxdeODKMPyXrAdGkGiNKQ4MtEaH9PiIG1wDjK1V9m16NxF201x9_ThpVvJPTnomlFCunJIMnJkSiuLKMOpsaXfvUYb4zJMIs1itG1MNsEUwwrrtXkeZTcxmqJ5ee3QbTDyPt5My9GdjuzT9nBSAgRNCS64cJz55HkMHW65NaPtSuxDGMPNJq8nTXU-wCSfdf9FZgG-OYIiq4Je0Ca-lUiN4HEa_iDHbx9v4Z-YFtbO7iasxX3EPvJj4OzDq_pQYI2_BBBIl5H2PzNmvcZpy7RpuTW1Ho4eE4ij2TotrLqwt3YZlTCncD-UvGZ-Pe4rk/3vd/FyJ1VIDOTR2j9Nx-ihQXkQ/h1/M7tldIdT4Qj6t8gHusf7TrqEZ3iGkdJh3ZkpbTVLyf4) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

clean_body: President Obama is using his voice to echo the importance of state legislatures. | | | | | President Obama is using his voice to amplify the critical importance of state legislatures: And no one would be better than President Obama – he served THREE terms in the Illinois State Senate! Here’s exactly why he’s so right: While legislation stalls on the federal level, state legislators are making key decisions about access to abortion, public education, health care services, and even decisions about the roads you drive on. Where Republicans have stripped their constituents of these rights, state Democrats have protected the right to choose, expanded early and absentee voting, and much, much more. Simply put, state Democrats are the last line of defense against GOP extremism. But with nine must-win special elections quickly approaching, we need every Democrat reading this to listen to President Obama and step up. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | You have the power to help us on our path to holding, expanding, and building Democratic majorities across the country. name: Seth Dillon, Babylon Bee
subject: The Babylon Bee Is Suing The Attorney General Of California
body:
Help Us Fight This Law
| | | [](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJw8j7tu4zAQRb9m1FkQhw_RBYvd1SpFgKROZYzIkc2AtGQ9IPjvAwlG2nMHd86lPKbYPx3UfwHxFsMMiCD_AOLja8vT-p3f306f3f_Tw3xkvYf4DxCX58i_l6-SkjPFtNO6KYIjQz2Hgp0wVuizra0obs6yYcVogtXcd9roc9971dNZe83eqCI6rFBWSmhEZURdBouhtlLYSpA3wYCqjkcliY2maRhy6YdcJHdblnE-jFrAtqPumYZ7x7zHgO2Y6D6DbNclX-ZhnTyDbF4NgGbHmUNcM8jmteSAnvJI8XoH2STaLvMal2JyYdxiSnE2Najqevj4If8EAAD__1XiaOg)
---
|
---
Dear Friend, It should be evident to everyone by now that, despite jokes being our bread and butter, The Babylon Bee takes free speech and fighting censorship seriously. That is why we’ve filed a lawsuit against California’s Attorney General to stop the enforcement of its new censorship law. The state of California passed a law in 2022 that imposes new regulations on social media companies. This law, AB 587, requires companies to give the California Attorney General’s Office regular reports regarding disinformation, misinformation, extremism, radicalization, and hate speech. The law allows the state to impose fines if companies do not comply with these reporting regulations. You may be asking, “Isn’t controlling misinformation and hate speech online a good thing?” The truth of the matter is that the government and Big Tech companies working together to control what everyone is allowed to say is a _bad_ thing. A good thing is when everyone is allowed to speak freely. Not everyone’s definitions of “misinformation” or “hate speech” are the same. In the case of our work at The Babylon Bee, jokes and satire are often incorrectly cited as examples of misinformation or hateful conduct by organizations and government agencies who think our views don’t fit their prescribed narrative. When people in power don’t like what you have to say, they can use that power to categorize your speech as “hateful,” even if what you’re saying is factually accurate.
---
[Support The Bee](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJw8j7tu4zAQRb9m1FkQhw_RBYvd1SpFgKROZYzIkc2AtGQ9IPjvAwlG2nMHd86lPKbYPx3UfwHxFsMMiCD_AOLja8vT-p3f306f3f_Tw3xkvYf4DxCX58i_l6-SkjPFtNO6KYIjQz2Hgp0wVuizra0obs6yYcVogtXcd9roc9971dNZe83eqCI6rFBWSmhEZURdBouhtlLYSpA3wYCqjkcliY2maRhy6YdcJHdblnE-jFrAtqPumYZ7x7zHgO2Y6D6DbNclX-ZhnTyDbF4NgGbHmUNcM8jmteSAnvJI8XoH2STaLvMal2JyYdxiSnE2Najqevj4If8EAAD__1XiaOg)
---
This law is not about keeping social media companies transparent — **it’s about censorship**. The state of California, along with other government entities and Big Tech firms, is seeking to use censorship to protect their preferred narrative. We believe this is a violation of the First Amendment and we — along with our co-plaintiffs Tim Pool and Minds — are taking California to court to fight it. In times like these, your support is crucial. If you have not taken the step to become a paid supporter of The Babylon Bee, **now is the time**. Each paid member helps us keep fighting these attempts to control what we can and can’t say. Free speech — even when it comes to satire and jokes — is a vital pillar of our nation. Standing up for this fundamental right is something we will never back away from. With your help, we will continue fighting these battles in and out of the courtroom, in any way we can. [Click here to view our subscription plans and sign up](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJw8j7tu4zAQRb9m1FkQhw_RBYvd1SpFgKROZYzIkc2AtGQ9IPjvAwlG2nMHd86lPKbYPx3UfwHxFsMMiCD_AOLja8vT-p3f306f3f_Tw3xkvYf4DxCX58i_l6-SkjPFtNO6KYIjQz2Hgp0wVuizra0obs6yYcVogtXcd9roc9971dNZe83eqCI6rFBWSmhEZURdBouhtlLYSpA3wYCqjkcliY2maRhy6YdcJHdblnE-jFrAtqPumYZ7x7zHgO2Y6D6DbNclX-ZhnTyDbF4NgGbHmUNcM8jmteSAnvJI8XoH2STaLvMal2JyYdxiSnE2Najqevj4If8EAAD__1XiaOg) to offer your support.
---
[Stand With Us](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJw8j7tu4zAQRb9m1FkQhw_RBYvd1SpFgKROZYzIkc2AtGQ9IPjvAwlG2nMHd86lPKbYPx3UfwHxFsMMiCD_AOLja8vT-p3f306f3f_Tw3xkvYf4DxCX58i_l6-SkjPFtNO6KYIjQz2Hgp0wVuizra0obs6yYcVogtXcd9roc9971dNZe83eqCI6rFBWSmhEZURdBouhtlLYSpA3wYCqjkcliY2maRhy6YdcJHdblnE-jFrAtqPumYZ7x7zHgO2Y6D6DbNclX-ZhnTyDbF4NgGbHmUNcM8jmteSAnvJI8XoH2STaLvMal2JyYdxiSnE2Najqevj4If8EAAD__1XiaOg)
---
Thank you in advance for joining us in the battle for free speech.
---
— Seth Dillon CEO

---
|
---
| PO Box 546, Jupiter, FL 33468
---

[View this email in your browser](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJw8j01TwyAQQH_N5tZMWMhCDhy0FZ2pX1ePCMTigKRJY6b_3mmsXnffvH1r85Bif9YgbwHxEP0EiMBvAPH4tuRx_sz7-83L-93mSM-5vSxxC4in8xD-yaukDtnGdJnKXeW1JdsHXwXNSLG2U1Kx6qBbYmiVIM56YkjWOcKucxT6jgvbhypqbJA3grWIgpisvUIvFWeqYdaRJxDNeqi2bLHjWEquXclV0ofTaZjWIgNolrHUX7NLYZ5-cVcyoLm2AppvQINPgs973NoM3Kzf851_bB9ec_HVqP2wxJTiRBJE8_Fn-QkAAP__ypFcIw)

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 300 Alexandria, VA 22314

[**Unsubscribe**](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJw8kM1OwzAQhJ9mc2vk3cQ_PfgAlIAEAq4cHdulRnad2omivj1qKVxnR99-GpOmGPZnDfIeiA7BVSCC7g6ITp9rKst3ennavI-Pm5N4S_xypAcgms-T_2_eIK1PJsRLKneN00aYvXeN1ygU8q2SCpuDNo4pbpBI9dsR0ROhN8zZPUfPvbRN0MSoYz1yol6gbJ0iJ1WHiqGxwgno2fVRa3A1peScWptTE_Vhnqd6NRqAhrXk9rjY6Jf6W7c5AQ03V6ChLmO1JUxzyMcKNCzHWzJ66IbrFN3OvfLnj5RdU7Sb1hBjqEJCz77-kD8BAAD__2aKY0M)

name: CaucusRoom
subject: CaucusRoom Weekend Edition ☀️
body:
Woke Alert! No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-e-qujdkll-trhiujldw-jr/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujdkll-trhiujldw-r/)
### ** Welcome to the Weekend Wrap Up! **
**Do you have friends or family that would enjoy CaucusRoom? Forward this newsletter to them and ask them to join!**
### ** Here are the top articles that CaucusRoom members shared:**
* Leaked documents reveal **[secrets about Russia-Ukraine](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujdkll-trhiujldw-y/)** War.
* **[AOC wants to ignore](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujdkll-trhiujldw-j/)** judge's ruling.
* Global warming **[helps home runs](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujdkll-trhiujldw-t/)**.
* France turns **[against us](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujdkll-trhiujldw-i/)**.
* Evidence that Dems are [**laundering money**.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujdkll-trhiujldw-d/)
* Was **[Biden involved](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujdkll-trhiujldw-h/)** in the raid at Mar-a-Lago?
* Is it **[time to panic](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujdkll-trhiujldw-k/)**?
* Biden's plan to **[cut water supply](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujdkll-trhiujldw-u/)** to western states.
* **[The COVID emergency](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujdkll-trhiujldw-o/)** is officially over.
* DNC picked **[a dangerous city](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujdkll-trhiujldw-x/)** for their convention.
* Car makers target conservative talk radio and **[remove AM from cars.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujdkll-trhiujldw-m/)**
* Why did the**[Pentagon send a cease and desist](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujdkll-trhiujldw-c/) **letter to priests?
* The Pentagon document **[leaker has been arrested](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujdkll-trhiujldw-q/).**
* Biden**[takes us all for fools](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujdkll-trhiujldw-a/).**
* **[Ex-Obama staffer has info on Hunter](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujdkll-trhiujldw-f/), **but FBI doesn't want it.
* FBI has new **[naughty words list.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujdkll-trhiujldw-z/)**

### **Woke Alert**
## A new service is being offered that will **[text"Woke Alerts" to shoppers' phones](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujdkll-trhiujldw-v/)** so they'll know which brands are backing anti-conservative views.

### **How ****Embarrassing**
Hunter Biden had to explain a child's question to his father during the president's trip to Ireland. **[The apparent confusion came after the elder Biden struggled to answer the child's question about success](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujdkll-trhiujldw-e/). **Later, he told the people of Ireland **[to 'lick the world](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujdkll-trhiujldw-s/)'.** **Separating Children from Un-woke Parents** **[Legislators in California are considering a bill that would allow state officials to separate children from their families](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujdkll-trhiujldw-g/) **without letting the parents know until after the fact. [**Here For The Laughs**](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujdkll-trhiujldw-w/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujdkll-trhiujldw-yd/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujdkll-trhiujldw-yh/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujdkll-trhiujldw-yk/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujdkll-trhiujldw-yu/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujdkll-trhiujldw-jl/) | CaucusRoom, LLC
800 Washington Ave Ste C
Golden, CO 80401 You are receiving this email because you are a member of CaucusRoom [Preferences](https://caucusroom.updatemyprofile.com/i-qujdkll-6F882DBF-trhiujldw-jy) | [Unsubscribe](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-u-qujdkll-trhiujldw-jj/)

Will you stand with our movement today?
#
Hi, Peter, with our mid-month fundraising deadline **TONIGHT** at midnight, we're still short of where we need to be at this point of the month.
Being an entirely grassroots funded campaign, we believe that politicians and elected leaders shouldn't be bought by billionaires and corporate PACs. Cori was elected to serve folks like you, **_not the one percent.**_
Since Cori was elected to Congress, we have seen what's possible when our movement campaigns and organizes around a people-first agenda — and this work is powered by our network of grassroots supporters.
**_Every single contribution**_ makes a difference in our ability to sustain our year-round organizing efforts, continuing to build the momentum we need to transform our politics, and expand our movement.
[**Will you stand with our movement today and chip in $5 or more to help us meet our mid-month goal? We have made a personal link for you below!**](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230415-2.QKuxhK&amount=5&refcode=em20230415-2522&t=1&akid=2522%2E1082990%2ENjzyr5)

The sick and twisted radicals of the far-left Deep State would rather DESTROY our once great Republic than lose their grip on power.

**But as I told Tucker Carlson the other night in my FIRST interview since the sham indictment, absolutely NOTHING the Left throws at me – _even a politically charged ARREST_ – will get me to end our 2024 campaign.**
